representative.name: Orderbook Supply Demand Mapping
representative.description_zh: 持续跟踪近端被动卖墙、买墙及其撤单/加单行为，识别当前市场供给区、需求区与关键拍卖中枢价。
representative.description: Continuously map nearby passive ask depth, bid depth, pull/stack behavior, and identify the current market supply zone, demand zone, and pivotal auction price.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-08-03]“Market Demand = $112K - $110K Market Supply = $115K - $116K Current pivotal price = $114K”；[2026-02-16]“Clear respected market supply around $70K & Clear tested market demand around $65K”。

representative.name: TWAP Flow Detection
representative.description_zh: 通过持续的被动挂单/出货、稳定足迹压力以及价格被钉住的表现，识别算法执行盘，尤其是 TWAP 买卖流。
representative.description: Detect persistent algorithmic execution such as TWAP buying or selling via repeated passive/offer behavior, steady footprint pressure, and price pinning despite changing liquidity.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-09-18]“Asia twap seems to be back 👀”；[2025-07-25]“running short position which continues to twap into price”；[2025-10-16]“Constant twap selling since pre-market & open”。

representative.name: Spot vs Perp Leadership
representative.description_zh: 判断当前是现货吃单、现货被动承接还是永续仓位在主导价格，并据此评估行情质量与可持续性。
representative.description: Classify whether spot takers, passive spot buyers, or perpetual futures positioning is leading price, and use the leader to determine move quality and sustainability.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-04-30]“spot buyer has been absorbing sell pressure all day on coinbase”；[2025-05-23]“de-risk selling from spot”；[2025-10-17]“loss of coinbase premium”；[2024-01-30]“for today keep an eye on coinbase spot flows ... for binance spot taker bid”。

all_proposals.name: Spot vs Perp Leadership

representative.name: Auction Acceptance Rejection
representative.description_zh: 结合价值区、POC、周开年开及反复测试，判断市场是在某价位上方/下方完成接受，还是拒绝后回归原价值区。
representative.description: Use value area, POC, weekly/yearly opens, and repeated testing to determine whether the market is accepting above/below a level or rejecting it back into prior value.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-06-25]“market to auction & accept higher”；[2026-02-16]“actual acceptance above $70K and VAH would be required for real relief”；[2025-05-23]“important level from here for the market to auction above”。

all_proposals.name: Auction Acceptance Rejection

representative.name: Absorption and Iceberg Detection
representative.description_zh: 识别大型被动参与者对主动流的吸收，或不立即推动价格但持续承接/压制的隐藏冰山单。
representative.description: Identify large passive participants absorbing aggressive flow or hidden iceberg orders that cap or support price without immediate displacement.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-04-30]“large passive spot buyer has been absorbing sell pressure all day on coinbase”；[2025-07-25]“Potential absorption around $115K”；[2026-03-25]“Looks like we got ourselves an iceberg buyer 👀 $60M+”。

all_proposals.name: Absorption and Iceberg Detection

representative.name: Stair-Step Box Consolidation
representative.description_zh: 价格快速上冲后进入横盘箱体，突破后在更高位置再搭建新的横盘平台。连续的“平台抬升”被视为趋势健康、适合顺势持有或等回踩接回。
representative.description: After an impulse move, price forms a horizontal box, breaks higher, then builds a new higher box above prior support. Repeated base-building is treated as trend health and continuation.
representative.example_evidence: 图7 的 FARTCOIN 画出两个连续抬高的平台；图8 的 PENGU 也是水平箱体突破后扩张；他常说“bit more chop and next leg up soon”。

representative.name: Post-Dump Base Duration Analogy
representative.description_zh: 把当前暴跌后的横盘整理与历史底部在持续时间、K线数量、成交量上做类比，用来判断局部底部是否“盘够了”。
representative.description: Compare the current post-dump consolidation in bars/days/volume versus a prior base to estimate whether enough time has passed for a local bottom to form.
representative.example_evidence: 图1 直接比较两段 BTC 底部区间：左侧“18 bars, 54d, Vol 1.74M” 对右侧“14 bars, 42d, Vol 819.65K”，明显是在做历史底部时长/量能 analog。

representative.name: Lower-High Rollover Sequence
representative.description_zh: 反弹一波比一波低，常表现为连续拱顶/圆弧高点，说明买盘衰竭，随后更容易出现加速下跌。
representative.description: A series of rallies failing at progressively lower highs, often drawn as repeated rounded tops or arches, signaling buyer exhaustion before a sharper breakdown.
representative.example_evidence: 图2 在 BTC 1h 上连画三段弧顶并给出下跌路径；2025-08-31 也反复说“lower highs every time”。

all_proposals.name: Lower-High Rollover Sequence

representative.name: HTF Confluence Demand Zone
representative.description_zh: 用斐波回撤、关键均线和水平支撑/需求区重叠来定义买点，共振强于单一指标。
representative.description: A buy zone defined by overlapping Fibonacci retracement, major moving average, and horizontal support/demand. The confluence matters more than any single tool.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-04-30: “52k for BTC really has so much confluence.... 200d EMA .382 fib... Demand area/support”；图3 对 RNDR 的绿色区域正是这种多重共振买法。

representative.name: Hash Ribbons Confirmation
representative.description_zh: 使用 Hash Ribbons 买入信号或重复出现的“蓝点/蓝丸”作为比特币大级别趋势恢复的确认器。
representative.description: Uses Hash Ribbons buy signals or repeated blue-pellet confirmations as a timing filter for major BTC trend resumptions.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-06-14“+Hash Ribbons : Double blue pellets +UP”；2025-03-24“HASH RIBBONS BLUE PILL NOW UP !!! Direction 300K ?!”；2025-07-30“Three blue affiliate stickers of HASH RIBBON ! Hyper Bullish !”

representative.name: Quarterly VWAP Magnet
representative.description_zh: 使用锚定/季度 VWAP 作为被防守的支撑与未触及的价格磁吸位，给出短中期方向框架。
representative.description: Uses anchored or quarterly VWAPs as defended support and untapped upside magnets, especially for short-term directional context.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-04-11“Quarterly VWAP holding us from below. Defended every single test. Q1 VWAP close sitting untapped above. Unvisited. A magnet.”

representative.name: Log-Scale Parabolic Projection
representative.description_zh: 在对数坐标上结合抛物线轨迹、浪型计数与历史对称性，推演周期后段的扩展目标，而非简单线性测幅。
representative.description: Projects late-cycle extensions on logarithmic charts using parabolic arcs, wave counts, and historical symmetry rather than linear targets.
representative.example_evidence: 图 4/5 以 log 风格的 BTC 大级别上冲到 245k-326k 区域；2026-04-11 对黄金/白银/SPX/Brent 多次标注“log; parabolik çıkış bitmiş olabilir”。

representative.name: Right-Side Tightness Base Breakout
representative.description_zh: 寻找长时间打底后右侧价格收紧的结构，再参与突破，尤其用于强势成长股/动量股。
representative.description: Looks for long basing structures followed by right-side price tightness before initiating breakout attempts, especially in momentum equities.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-04-09“$NBIS 6-month base is forming ... I would love some tightness here on the right side before attempting the breakout.”

all_proposals.name: Right-Side Tightness Base Breakout

representative.name: S/R Flip Throwback Continuation
representative.name_zh: 支撑阻力翻转回踩延续
representative.description_zh: 突破后不追价，等待原阻力翻为支撑并完成回踩确认，再做趋势延续单。
representative.description: After a breakout, wait for the old resistance to flip into support, then enter on the throwback if price holds the level.
representative.example_evidence: 他推文中几乎把“s/r flip”当成口头禅：2025-08-11“textbook throwback to $112K… after a successful S/R flip”；2025-10-31“$TAO projection aging like wine at $485 after s/r flip”。

representative.name: Descending Broadening Wedge Continuation
representative.description_zh: 在更高周期偏多背景下，价格形成向下倾斜且振幅扩大的楔形/喇叭口，向上突破后作为延续形态使用。
representative.description: A widening, downward-sloping structure that resolves upward as continuation when higher-timeframe trend remains bullish.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-06-27 原文“Here comes the next very simple pattern -> Descending broadening wedge continuation pattern”；2025-08-09 也写“Just one descending broadening wedge breakout away from continuation”。

all_proposals.name: Descending Broadening Wedge Continuation

representative.name: Parallel Channel Rotation
representative.description_zh: 用长期平行通道判断震荡趋势，在下沿或中线回踩承接，目标看向中线或上沿。
representative.description: Use long-lived rising or falling channels to buy/support near the lower bound and target the upper bound or midline.
representative.example_evidence: 图 8 是典型 2 年通道上沿目标；2025-03-26 写“Perfect bounce off the mid-channel trendline and the 200MA on the 3D timeframe”。

representative.name: POC / Volume Profile Confluence
representative.description_zh: 把 POC 与可见区间成交密集带当成价格磁吸位、拒绝位和翻转确认位，与结构位共振使用。
representative.description: Use point of control and visible-range volume shelves as magnets, rejection zones, and confirmation levels for flips.
representative.example_evidence: 图 5 右侧明确画出体积分布，并标注“HTF SL if s/r flip sub POC”；这不是 seed 中已有能力，但在他的图表框架里很核心。

representative.name: Bitcoin Stables Dominance Rotation
representative.name_zh: BTC 稳定币主导率轮动
representative.description_zh: 用 BTC 相对稳定币主导率作为风险偏好与山寨轮动代理指标，辅助判断何时从 BTC 转向 ETH/山寨。
representative.description: Track BTC relative to stablecoin dominance as a cross-market risk appetite and alt rotation proxy.

representative.name: Hidden RSI Divergence
representative.description_zh: 在既有趋势中，用 RSI 隐性看多/看空背离作为延续信号，常与布林带位置和价格结构联合使用。
representative.description: Use hidden bullish or bearish RSI divergence as a continuation signal within an existing trend, often in combination with Bollinger Band location and price structure.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-09-30“$BTC 4H hidden bullish divergence on lower BB dip with volume”；2025-02-28“$BTC 4H RSI working on hidden bearish divergence”

representative.name: Outside/Inside Bar Context Read
representative.description_zh: 将日线或4H的 outside bar、inside bar、2x inside 与附近枢轴位、趋势状态和后续跟随结合解读，而不是孤立看单根K线。
representative.description: Interpret daily or 4H outside bars, inside bars, and 2x inside sequences in relation to nearby pivots, trend state, and follow-through rather than as isolated candles.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-04-29“needs above 64.5k for daily outside”；2024-09-29“$BTC closing in on 2x inside daily”；2025-03-31“now working on daily outside bar with 84.5k pivot above”

representative.name: Throwback Retest
representative.description_zh: 突破或收复后，不追第一脚，而是等价格回踩突破位、通道线或关键均线，确认守住后再做延续。
representative.description: After a breakout or reclaim, wait for price to revisit the breakout zone, channel line, or major moving average and judge whether it holds cleanly before positioning for continuation.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-07-30“another throwback to 66k range”；2024-05-31“another throwback on daily”；2025-04-30“nice response to the throwback”；图4、图5 都是在颈线/箱体上沿附近等待回踩确认。

representative.name: Candle Body Progression
representative.description_zh: 在关键位附近观察 K 线从扩张实体到缩小实体、再到 spinning top 的递进，作为动能衰竭或转弱信号。
representative.description: Read the progression from strong expansion candles to smaller bodies or spinning tops as evidence of momentum exhaustion or rollover risk near decision levels.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-02-28“Medium body > large body > spinning top”；2025-02-28“Note body progression”

representative.name: Neck-Base Priority
representative.description_zh: 在头肩/头肩底结构中，更重视颈基线是否清晰、可交易，而不是肩部是否完美对称。
representative.description: In head-and-shoulders and inverse head-and-shoulders structures, prioritize the quality and clarity of the neck-base over perfect symmetry of shoulders.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-01-31“Shoulder structure is often flexible, though the most important feature is a well defined neck-base”

representative.name: Unusual Options Flow via Volume/OI Dislocation
representative.name_zh: 期权成交量远超未平仓量异动
representative.description_zh: 识别同日或超短期期权在多个相邻执行价上出现“成交量显著高于未平仓量”的情况，作为新仓大举进场或情绪/信息流异动信号。
representative.description: Detect strikes where same-day or very short-dated option volume is multiple times open interest across several nearby strikes, signaling fresh speculative positioning or informed flow.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-04-09：“$TSLA $TSLL ... Volume was outpacing OI on these strikes anywhere from 3x to over 10x”，且配套图片5-8展示多个 4/10 call strike 的 volume >> OI。

representative.name: Broadening Flag / Megaphone Continuation
representative.name_zh: 扩张旗形 / 喇叭口延续
representative.description_zh: 识别冲击走势后的波动逐步扩张整理区，把其视为扩张旗形/喇叭口，结合趋势背景判断后续延续或破位。
representative.description: Identify widening price swings after an impulse move, interpreted as a broadening consolidation that can resolve with continuation or breakdown depending on context.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-04-10：“$MU #MU Broadening flag?” 说明他会主动用非标准教科书形态命名。

representative.name: Intermarket Leadership Confirmation
representative.description_zh: 用半导体、运输等领先板块，或其他对经济/风险偏好敏感的资产，来确认大盘或加密的风险开启是否真实。
representative.description: Use leadership from cyclical sectors, transports, semis, or related macro-sensitive assets to confirm whether a broader risk-on trend is genuine.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-04-09：“Back to back days with the semis and transports hitting ATH’s... Market and economic leaders charging higher together. Supremely bullish.”

all_proposals.name: Intermarket Leadership Confirmation

representative.name: Commodity Headwind Valuation Filter
representative.name_zh: 大宗商品逆风估值过滤器
representative.description_zh: 把高油价等投入成本压力当作宏观过滤器：当商品价格过高时，不追逐股票 beta，只在大跌日分批买入。
representative.description: Use elevated crude or other input-cost commodities as a macro filter to avoid chasing equity beta and instead wait for deep-red pullbacks.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-04-11：“India can’t have a proper bull market $100 crude... Only buy on big red days, till the time crude is > 95.”

representative.name: nPOC Retest Framework
representative.description_zh: 识别历史成交量分布留下的裸 POC（nPOC）价位，把它们当作回踩买点、反弹目标或价格磁吸位；若与当前区间上下沿重合，则优先级更高。
representative.description: Identify naked Point of Control prints from prior volume profiles and use them as discounted re-entry or magnet targets. Bias strengthens when price revisits nPOC inside a broader range and shows acceptance/rejection.
representative.example_evidence: 几乎是他最鲜明的方法：2025-07-30 "$115,655 nPOC print hit. Now run it back up to $122,560"；2025-01-23 "Would love a re-test of $91,794 nPOC level"；2025-03-26 "Do we get the $80,347 nPOC re-test?"

representative.name: Range Acceptance / Rejection
representative.description_zh: 围绕价格是否重新被区间接纳、在边界被拒绝、或发生偏离后回归来交易，本质是拍卖市场里的接受/拒绝判断。
representative.description: Trade around whether price gains acceptance back into a prior range, rejects from the edge, or deviates beyond the boundary and snaps back. Focus is less on candle pattern and more on auction acceptance.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-01-31 "Either we run up and rejection recent support and it turns into resistance, or we get acceptance back into range"；2024-01-29 也直接提到 "getting acceptance back into range"。

all_proposals.name: Range Acceptance / Rejection

representative.name: Discount vs Premium Bidding
representative.name_zh: 折价区挂单、溢价区回避
representative.description_zh: 只在看涨结构中的折价区逐步建仓，尽量不在局部高位或 ATH 附近重仓追多，除非有很强的趋势延续证据。
representative.description: Prefer building size only at discounted zones inside a valid bullish structure; avoid initiating large longs at local highs or ATH unless forced by strong trend continuation evidence.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-01-23 "I look to buy at discounted prices, not premiums."；2025-06-26 "DCA into levels of discounted price, and scaling out to the upside"。

representative.name: Higher-Lows Defense
representative.description_zh: 只要抬高低点结构还在，即使市场情绪偏空、价格尚未突破关键阻力，也维持偏多判断。
representative.description: Maintain bullish bias as long as successive higher lows remain intact, even if sentiment is bearish or price has not yet broken major resistance.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-03-31: "Do we just ignore the higher lows on $ETH or what??"；图片 8 在 ETH 2h 上也明确标了连续抬高低点。

representative.name: Log Scale Regime Framing
representative.description_zh: 默认用对数坐标观察比特币历史，把不同数量级的涨跌放到统一百分比尺度上，避免被名义价格锚定，并用于跨周期比较。
representative.description: Use logarithmic scale as the default lens for Bitcoin history to normalize percentage moves, avoid anchoring to nominal price, and compare cycles across orders of magnitude.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-05-26] “Is it even possible to make sense of the #bitcoin price history without grasping log scale?”；[2024-09-25] “Linear scale is for amateurs. Step up your game by using log scale.”；附图 1 同时对比 log 与 linear。

representative.name: On-This-Date Cross-Cycle Analog
representative.description_zh: 把当前日期与 4/8/12 年前同一天对照，比较价格、CAGR 和周期位置，用于估算当前所处阶段和潜在路径。
representative.description: Compare Bitcoin's price, CAGR, or position in the cycle against the exact same calendar date 4/8/12 years ago to infer cycle progress and expected path.

all_proposals.name: On-This-Date Cross-Cycle Analog
all_proposals.description_zh: 把当前日期与 4/8/12 年前同一天对照，比较价格、CAGR 和周期位置，用于估算当前所处阶段和潜在路径。
all_proposals.description: Compare Bitcoin's price, CAGR, or position in the cycle against the exact same calendar date 4/8/12 years ago to infer cycle progress and expected path.

representative.name: Realized Price Gravity
representative.description_zh: 把实现价格及其衍生比率视为长期估值锚；熊市价格有回归实现价格的倾向，牛市中对实现价格的高溢价则定义市场过热程度。
representative.description: Treat realized price and its derived ratios as a long-cycle valuation anchor; price tends to gravitate back toward it in bears, while extended premiums define bull-cycle heat.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-02-29] “Realized Price Index”; [2024-11-30] “The Bitcoin price has always revisited the realized price during bear markets.”；[2024-06-18] “Realized Mayer Multiple momentum turning sour...”

representative.name: Price Range Residency
representative.description_zh: 统计比特币在各价格区间停留的天数，用于判断成熟度、价值接受度，以及向下一数量级价格区间迁移的概率。
representative.description: Measure how many days Bitcoin spends in each price band to infer maturity, acceptance, and the probability of eventual migration into the next magnitude band.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-01-26] “Days Bitcoin has spent in price ranges...”；[2025-03-29]/[2025-05-23]/[2025-08-30] 多次重复这个统计框架。

representative.name: Sats Per Dollar Compression
representative.description_zh: 跟踪每 1 美元能买到多少 satoshis，观察其在减半和跨年尺度上的压缩，用作采用率提升和长期上涨叙事工具。
representative.description: Track how many satoshis one dollar buys over successive halvings or years as an adoption/compression narrative for long-term upside framing.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-04-26] “At #bitcoin's first halving, a dollar snagged you 8M sats... Now, we're down to just 1,600 sats per dollar.”；[2024-03-30] “1427 sats/$”；[2024-01-28] “2364 sats/$”。

representative.name: Coinbase Premium Thrust
representative.description_zh: 把 Coinbase 溢价或 Coinbase 现货主导买盘的突然抬升，当作美国机构需求与短线趋势确认信号。
representative.description: Use spikes in Coinbase Premium / Coinbase spot-led buying as a real-time proxy for US institutional demand and short-term trend confirmation.
representative.example_evidence: 他写过“$BTC $ETH Mencetak titik tertinggi di coinbase premium index sejak Desember 2025”以及“Coinbase 一口气买了12000枚”。

representative.name: Weekly Close Gatekeeper
representative.description_zh: 在高时间框架关键位附近，先不急于下结论，等周线收盘后再决定方向，把周末波动视为暂时性噪音。
representative.description: Delay directional commitment until the weekly candle closes above or below the contested HTF level; treat weekend price action as provisional.
representative.example_evidence: “probably chops around all weekend, will assess on Monday how the weekly closed”。

all_proposals.name: Weekly Close Gatekeeper

representative.name: Simple Market Rotation Filter
representative.description_zh: 优先交易最清晰的市场和最简单的品种，不在难做的环境里硬做；必要时在加密、股票、黄金之间轮动寻找最容易的一张卷子。
representative.description: Choose the cleanest market and cleanest instrument rather than forcing trades in a messy tape; rotate from crypto to stocks or gold when those offer clearer setups.
representative.example_evidence: “交易就是找最简单的卷子来做 同一个市场找最简单的品种，不同的市场找最简单的市场道理是一样的 这几天在加密上亏的，在黄金上都赚回来了”。

representative.description_zh: 把钱包转账截图、交易所流向和价格 K 线结合起来，构造关于吸筹、派发或操纵的方向性叙事。
representative.description: Fuse wallet transfer screenshots, exchange flow data, and price candles into a directional narrative about hidden accumulation, distribution, or manipulation.
representative.example_evidence: 图3把 BTC 图表与 Arkham 流向并列；推文写“BITCOIN IS BEING MANIPULATED AND I HAVE 100% PROOF!! ... I connected th...”。

representative.name: HTF Horizontal Level Reclaim And Retest
representative.name_zh: 高周期水平位收复与回踩确认
representative.description_zh: 价格收复关键周线/3日水平位，收盘站上后回踩确认支撑，再做趋势延续判断。
representative.description: Price reclaims a major weekly or 3D horizontal level, closes above it, then retests it as support before continuation.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-09-29: “Weekly closes, retests and sweeps”; 图3 ETH 周线粉色横带就是收复后回踩；图6 BTC 也是长期前高平台即将/正在收复。

representative.name: Momentum Reset Within Uptrend
representative.name_zh: 上升趋势中的动能重置
representative.description_zh: 强趋势中通过横盘或浅回调让 RSI/短线动能降温，但不破坏结构，从而为下一段上涨蓄势。
representative.description: In a strong uptrend, RSI or short-term momentum cools off through sideways or shallow pullback without structural damage, preparing the next leg higher.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-08-25: “In strong trends divergences tend to invalidate in the prevailing trend direction.”；2025-04-29: “vertical accumulation with a nice trend reset?”；图7 的 PENGU RSI 高位回落后继续维持强势。

representative.name: Weekend Thin Book Flush
representative.name_zh: 周末薄量订单簿杠杆清洗
representative.description_zh: 周末或低流动性时段，薄量订单簿中的急跌/急拉更像杠杆清洗，若高周期方向未坏，通常提供顺势加仓机会。
representative.description: On weekends or low-liquidity sessions, abrupt leverage flushes in a thin orderbook create opportunistic entries in the prevailing higher-timeframe direction.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-08-24: “Nothing like a leverage flush on a quiet orderbook Sunday.”；他多次把红日、周末下杀定义为 bull market 中的机会。

representative.name: Alt Rotation During BTC Chop
representative.name_zh: BTC 横盘时山寨轮动扩散
representative.description_zh: 当 BTC 稳住局部区间或高周期支撑并进入压缩时，资金倾向轮动至 ETH、SOL 及生态山寨，形成补涨。
representative.description: When BTC holds a local range/high-timeframe support and compresses, capital rotates into majors or ecosystem alts that begin outperforming.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-01-31: “alt szn weekend”; 2024-10-30: “hold on to $71.5k LTF now, chop around and let alts spread their wings a little.”；大量 SOL ecosystem / ETH rotation 推文。

representative.name: Ecosystem Leader Relative Strength
representative.name_zh: 生态龙头相对强度比较
representative.description_zh: 通过市值排名和同赛道龙头横向对比，建立“某生态第一龙头最终翻转其他生态龙头”的结构性交易假设。
representative.description: Rank tokens by market cap, draw pairwise comparisons against sector leaders, and build a thesis that the category leader in one ecosystem will eventually flip peers in other ecosystems.
representative.example_evidence: 多次用 BRETT 对比 WIF/FLOKI/BONK/DOGE/SHIB；图7 直接贴 WIF 与 BRETT 市值排名；2024-11-30 说“ First we flip Floki, then we snatch the hat ”。

representative.name: Airdrop Liquidity Reflexive Bid
representative.name_zh: 空投流动性反身性抬价
representative.description_zh: 预判大型生态代币发行或空投会注入新增流动性，并在事件前后反身性流向该生态头部 meme 币。
representative.description: Anticipate that a large ecosystem token launch or airdrop injects fresh liquidity that reflexively rotates into the top memecoin of that ecosystem before and after the event.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-05-31 说“ If BASE drops a token = mega bullish for $BRETT ”；2025-09-30 说“ massive pump once everyone gets their airdrop and 25-40% of that BASE airdrop flows into BRETT ”；图8 用 Base net flows 做辅助。

representative.name: Boredom Accumulation Window
representative.description_zh: 把下跌后或长时间盘整后的沉寂、无聊、低关注阶段视为大行情前胜率最高的吸筹窗口。
representative.description: Treat silent, frustrating, low-attention periods after drawdowns or long consolidations as the highest expectancy accumulation window before a large move.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-07-27 说“ The silence in the space... is one of the most bullish patterns ”；2025-07-26 说“ EMBRACE quiet times ”。

representative.name: Market Cap Ladder Targeting
representative.description_zh: 用历史同类龙头的市值区间和逐级超越路径来推导目标，而不是只靠传统量度涨幅。
representative.description: Project upside by mapping the asset to prior category winners and estimating sequential market cap flips instead of using only chart-measured moves.
representative.example_evidence: 反复说“ flip BONK and FLOKI ”、“ 40B-80B market cap this cycle ”、“ $BRETT at 2B today is better than $DOGE at 5B in 2021 ”。

representative.name: Multi-timeframe Wick Fill Strategy
representative.description_zh: 当 4H/1D/1W 出现明显长影线时，价格倾向回补该影线，常先回到 50%，再看是否走向 100%。影线回补位被他当作方向磁铁与择时工具。
representative.description: When a large wick is left on 4H/1D/1W, price tends to revisit and partially or fully fill the wick, often first to 50% and later to 100%. The fill level becomes a directional magnet and timing tool.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-02-22 说“Price tends to fill the 100% of the wick after revisiting the 50% level”；2026-03-16 说“The wick fill strategy is my favorite trading strategy!”；图8写“>50% wick has already been filled”，图1/2/5/7都有影线回补思维。

representative.name: Weekly 50EMA Bull/Bear Pivot
representative.description_zh: 将 1W50EMA 作为最核心的牛市支撑/熊市阻力。价格对该均线的反应决定是否做波段多、减仓，或等待收复确认。
representative.description: Use the 1W 50EMA as the primary bull-market support / bear-market resistance. Reactions at this level define whether to swing long, de-risk, or wait for reclaim.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-02-28 直接说“1W50EMA is historically the best $BTC bull/bear market support & resistance indicator level”；图3、图4、图7都把 1W50EMA 写成 Bull Market Support / buy zone。

representative.name: Liquidity Run Then Reversal Projection
representative.name_zh: 先扫流动性再反转路径投影
representative.description_zh: 在明确区间或局部结构中，先预判价格会去扫某一侧止损/清算池，随后被拒绝，再朝另一侧流动性池移动。这更像路径投影，而不是单点形态。
representative.description: In a defined range or local structure, project price to first run one side's stop-loss/liquidation pool, reject, and then travel toward the opposite pool. This is used as a forward path map rather than a static setup.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-01-30 说“projection 100% completed... projecting this 1 month in advance”；图1、图2都画出先上扫 local resistance/liquidity run，再跌向 local support/local low 的完整白线路径。

representative.name: Market Manipulation Psychology Framework
representative.description_zh: 用“多数人会被困在哪里、止损堆在哪里、做市商如何先最大化强平再走真实方向”的思维解释价格行为。
representative.description: Interpret price action by asking where the majority are trapped, where stop losses sit, and how market makers can maximize forced liquidations before the real move.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-01-29 说“99% of traders use the same conventional trading systems”；2024-05-20 说“trying to think like the MM so we can jump on their trades”；2025-03-29 说“usual market manipulation targetting stop losses”。

representative.name: Level Reclaim After Damage
representative.description_zh: 在急跌或结构受损后，不直接抄底，而是等待价格重新收复明确的水平位/区间边界后再偏多。
representative.description: After a violent breakdown or trend damage, avoid bottom-fishing and wait for price to reclaim a clearly defined horizontal level before getting long.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-02-27: "Don’t knife catch, wait for reclaim"；图 4 在大阴线跌破区间后，核心问题就是是否重新站回蓝线/区间。

representative.name: Mid-Range No-Trade Filter
representative.description_zh: 当价格位于清晰区间中部、上下边界都不占优时，主动空仓，等待到区间边缘或等待突破解决方向。
representative.description: If price is in the middle of a well-defined range with no edge at either boundary, stand aside until range high/low or a clean resolution is reached.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-02-27 和 2025-07-18 都使用原话："Don’t diddle in the middle"。这几乎是他的签名规则，但 seed 里没有把“区间中部禁止交易”单独抽象出来。

representative.name: Core Spot Inventory For Trend Participation
representative.description_zh: 在高时间框架结构健康时持有核心现货底仓，这样即使短线没有完美做到，也能顺势参与而不陷入 FOMO 追涨。
representative.description: Maintain a core spot position during constructive higher-timeframe conditions so that short-term execution imperfections do not force emotional chasing.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-07-11: "buy enough spot Bitcoin... to allow me to relax and ride this trend without FOMO"；2025-09-28: "Comfy in spot contains meaningful wisdom"。

representative.name: BTC Benchmarking Selectivity
representative.name_zh: 以 BTC 为基准的机会筛选
representative.description_zh: 把 BTC 作为默认收益基准，只有当山寨币在当前资金高度集中的市场里有真实超越 BTC 的把握时才参与。
representative.description: Use BTC as the default benchmark for opportunity cost; only rotate into alts when they can credibly outperform BTC under concentrated flow conditions.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-05-22: "outperforming BTC is extra hard because dispersion is that wide"；其长期内容也反复强调 buy/hold BTC 往往优于多数主动交易。

representative.name: Broadening Wedge Breakout
representative.description_zh: 价格在两条发散趋势线之间震荡，最终向上或向下突破；目标通常取形态最宽处做投射。
representative.description: Price oscillates inside two diverging trendlines and eventually breaks out, with target projected from the widest part of the formation.
representative.example_evidence: 这是他高频专用词。2024-10-29: "$BTC is finally Breaking out of Broadening Wedge after 8-months of Consolidation"；2024-11-29: "#ETH Descending Broadening Wedge Upside Breakout is Finally Confirmed"；2025-06-09: "$BTC Descending Broadening Wedge Upside Breakout is Confirmed"。

representative.name: Bullish Pennant Breakout
representative.description_zh: 强势拉升后，价格缩进为小型收敛三角旗，向上突破后延续原趋势。
representative.description: After a strong impulse, price compresses into a small converging pennant and breaks higher for trend continuation.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-12-23: "$SOL Breaks Out and Retests the Bullish Pennant on the Weekly Chart!"；2024-10-22: "$SOL is Preparing for the Bullish Pennant upside Breakout"；2024-07-27: "$SOL Bullish Pennant Upside Breakout has Confirmed"。

representative.name: Symmetrical Triangle Breakout
representative.description_zh: 价格在抬高低点与降低高点之间收敛，对称三角形突破方向决定后续偏向。
representative.description: Price compresses between converging higher lows and lower highs; breakout direction determines continuation or reversal bias.

all_proposals.name: Symmetrical Triangle Breakout

all_proposals.description: Price compresses between converging higher lows and lower highs; breakout direction determines continuation or reversal bias.

representative.name: Bump and Run Reversal

representative.name: Horizontal Level Ladder Pathing
representative.description_zh: 把价格拆解成一层层水平支撑/阻力位，交易从一个价位走向下一个价位的路径，常配合先扫流动性再延续。

representative.name: Fear Headline Bottoming
representative.description_zh: 若地缘或宏观恐慌消息冲击下价格拒绝显著创新低，则把极端恐慌新闻视为局部底部信号。
representative.description: Treat peak geopolitical or macro fear headlines as likely local bottoms if price refuses to make materially lower lows.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-02-28] “Bitcoin not making new lows and barely flinching on the attack of Iran… Good sign”，[2024-10-31] “Iran / Iraq fud again   This has marked every local low on this move up”。

representative.name: Prior ATH Retest Analogy
representative.name_zh: 前高/前周期 ATH 回踩类比
representative.description_zh: 把当前结构类比到上一轮周期的前高突破与回踩，把旧 ATH 视为需要消化和回测的关键中枢，而不是一破就单边拉升。
representative.description: Anchors current market structure to prior-cycle ATH breakout and retest behavior; treats old all-time highs as major pivot zones rather than instant breakout levels.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-10-31] “When Bitcoin retested its previous ATH near $20K in late 2020, it didn't immediately rip past it. It initially pulled back on a quick wick nearly 20%...”

representative.name: Magnet Level Narrative
representative.description_zh: 把整数关口或大市值里程碑视为价格天然会被吸引去测试的“磁铁位”，用于在震荡和洗盘中维持方向信念。
representative.description: Frames large round numbers or major market-cap milestones as magnets that price is naturally pulled toward, often used to maintain conviction through consolidation.

representative.name: Sentiment Washout as Bullish Setup
representative.description_zh: 把时间线的绝望情绪、利空落地后的失望、或普遍看空共识视为潜在轧空燃料，只要结构未破就偏向反向看多。
representative.description: Treats timeline despair, underwhelming news, or public bearish consensus as fuel for a squeeze higher when structure has not broken.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-03-07] “Summit is over and we're not at zero yet... soooo, send it?”；[2025-04-30] “At the first sign of a red candle everyone on here is ready to pack it up and call for new lows. Simply ignore the noise and be more bullish.”

representative.name: Liquidity Sweep Then Reversal
representative.description_zh: 价格先去扫明显前高/前低或局部流动性池，随后快速反向回到区间或原趋势中。他把这个当作方向确认和时机触发器，尤其常用于关键位与事件窗口前后。
representative.description: Price first runs obvious highs/lows or local liquidity pools, then sharply reverses back into range/trend. Used as a directional trigger and timing tool around key levels and event windows.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-09-30]“Took the liquidity above the recent highs, and is coming back down.”；[2024-12-30]“Liquidity taken and bounce back on #Altcoins and #Bitcoin.”；图3 直接画出向下扫支撑后反弹路径。

representative.name: ETH-Led Altcoin Rotation
representative.name_zh: ETH 领涨驱动山寨轮动
representative.description_zh: 当 ETH/BTC 走强或出现看多背离时，预期资金从 BTC 轮动进入山寨。他用它来判断风格切换，而不是单纯判断大盘涨跌。
representative.description: When ETH/BTC strengthens or prints bullish divergence, capital rotation into altcoins is expected. Used to time sector/style rotation rather than outright market direction.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-01-31]“Massive bullish divergence on $ETH / $BTC... rotation taking place.”；[2025-06-29]“#Altcoin summer... it's because of $ETH.”；[2024-11-30]“The rotation from $SOL to $ETH is taking place.”

representative.name: Altcoin Sentiment Washout Accumulation
representative.description_zh: 当山寨严重跑输、社交热度极低、情绪进入抑郁/怀疑阶段时，他把这视为后续延迟牛市前的优质吸筹窗口。
representative.description: When altcoins are deeply underperforming, social engagement is absent, and sentiment reaches depression/disbelief, he treats it as a favorable accumulation window before a delayed bull phase.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-12-29]“Most #Altcoins are still at their cycle low in $BTC valuation. The social media platforms are ghost towns.”；[2025-03-30]“We're at depression with #Altcoins. The bull market hasn't even started.”；图5 市场周期心理图被他直接引用。

representative.name: Horizontal Box Consolidation Breakout
representative.description_zh: 冲高后进入清晰水平箱体，反复测试阻力或守住支撑，表示蓄势待突破；目标通常看向更高周期的下一个阻力区。
representative.description: A clear horizontal range/box forms after impulse; repeated resistance tests or support holds imply accumulation before breakout. Targets are projected to the next HTF resistance zones.

representative.name_zh: 山寨同步下降通道突破
representative.description_zh: 跟踪多个山寨币相似的下降通道结构，把大范围同步上破视为市场风格切换，而不是单币偶发走势。
representative.description: Tracks multiple altcoins forming similar descending channels and treats broad simultaneous breakouts as a regime shift signal rather than isolated coin-specific moves.

representative.name: Range Reclaim Targeting
representative.name_zh: 区间收复后看对侧边界
representative.description_zh: 价格跌破关键区间后若不能快速收复，则以区间另一端为目标；若成功收复，则否定空头延续并重新上修目标。
representative.description: When price loses a major range and fails to reclaim, target the opposite side; when price reclaims the range, invalidate bearish continuation and rotate targets upward.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-05-01 “If this bearish trend helds (not reclaiming the range), then aiming toward 52k seems not that crazy”；2024-04-29 也以 BTC 上下区间为核心框架。

representative.name: Pro-Crypto Political Catalyst Trade

representative.name: Altseason Countdown Narrative
representative.description_zh: 在价格完全确认前，就用“山寨季即将开启”的倒计时框架进行轮动预判。

representative.name: Horizontal Level Reclaim Entry
representative.description_zh: 把前期失守或反复争夺的水平位作为核心触发条件，只有在价格重新收复并最好收盘站稳后才入场。
representative.description: Use a previously lost or contested horizontal support/resistance as the main trigger. Enter only after price reclaims the level and preferably holds it on close.
representative.example_evidence: "$2750 reclaim and we are good to go"、"0.80c is the level to reclaim"、"0.34c to reclaim for a solid entry"、"$1.68 reclaim for an entry"。这是他最稳定、最重复的执行语法，但 seed 里没有专门的水平位收复规则。

representative.name: Q4 Crypto Seasonality Bias
representative.description_zh: 基于 Uptober、Moonvember、年末冲刺等季节性叙事，在每年 Q3 末到 Q4 给市场施加一个先验看多偏置。
representative.description: Apply a bullish prior into late Q3/Q4 based on recurring seasonal narratives such as Uptober, Moonvember and year-end momentum.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-09-30] "#UPTOBER TOMORROW"、[2025-09-30] "Who's ready for Q4 tomorrow? -Uptober -Moonvember -Bullcember"、[2024-11-30] "BRING ON #PUMPTEMBER TOMORROW"。

representative.name: Trendline Break Confirmation Entry
representative.description_zh: 等待主要下降趋势线被有效突破后再开多，通常还结合附近水平位站稳作为二次确认。
representative.description: Wait for a clean break of a major descending trendline before initiating a swing long, often combined with a horizontal hold above nearby support.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-11-30] "$CRV / $USD - Update   Break that trend line. I will enter"；图 6 的 DOGE 周线也是典型的长期下降趋势线突破后再看上方水平目标。

representative.name: Sector Rotation Watchlist
representative.description_zh: 跟踪当前领涨叙事板块，并提前埋伏下一个可能接力的板块，而不是把整个山寨市场当成一个整体来交易。
representative.description: Track which narrative sector is currently leading and rotate focus into the next likely group rather than treating the whole alt market as one block.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-02-29] "Different sectors will pump one at a time. Right now we have #Memecoins pumping .. I am keeping an eye on #Gamefi for clues of an impending move"；[2024-05-31] 还专门发了 "$INJ Ecosystem" 图。

representative.name: Box Consolidation Breakout
representative.description_zh: 先定义水平箱体，等待足够长的压缩整理，再交易假跌破后的收回，或箱体边缘突破后的扩张。目标通常是箱体高度或下一关键阻力位。
representative.description: Define a horizontal trading box, wait for prolonged compression, then trade either the reclaim after a false break or the expansion through the box edge. Target is typically the box height or the next major resistance.
representative.example_evidence: 图 4、图 7 都是标准箱体；[2025-06-30] “The longer the consolidation, the bigger the breakout.”

representative.name: BTC Seasonality Calendar
representative.description_zh: 用 BTC 历史月度/季度季节性作为方向先验，尤其是在当前结构中性时，用来决定偏多还是偏谨慎。
representative.description: Use month-by-month and quarter-by-quarter historical BTC seasonality as a directional prior, especially when current structure is neutral and the trader wants to lean bullish or cautious.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-05-28] “JUNE-JULY BULL SEASON AHEAD”; [2025-06-30] “July: typically bullish”; [2026-03-31] “April up 10/15 times; +18.93% avg. gain.”

representative.name: Altseason Breadth Trigger
representative.description_zh: 不只看 BTC.D，而是跟踪主流山寨相对 BTC 的广度表现；当足够多的大市值山寨同步跑赢 BTC，就视为山寨季启动信号。
representative.description: Track breadth across top alts versus BTC rather than relying only on BTC dominance; when enough large-cap alts outperform together, treat it as altseason ignition.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-11-30] “Altcoin Season Is 68% Ready! Momentum and breadth building up.” 这比单纯 BTC.D 切换更接近广度框架。

representative.name: Delta Time Pivot Forecasting
representative.description_zh: 先预设具体日期或时间窗作为拐点，再用小级别走势确认方向，而不是纯靠价格形态临场判断。
representative.description: Forecast directional pivots by pre-declared calendar dates or date windows, then use lower-timeframe price action only for confirmation.
representative.example_evidence: 他大量使用具体日期：2025-08-27“8月28号or9月2号 随时出现不回头暴涨”；2025-10-07“上涨目标6202...超级上涨结束时间2026/1/5”；2026-01-30“一直要下跌到2/15附近”。

representative.name: Support Friction vs V-Reversal Classifier
representative.name_zh: 支撑位磨底 vs V 反分类器
representative.description_zh: 通过支撑位附近的行为区分‘反弹’和‘新上涨’：反复摩擦震荡更像反弹，触及支撑后直接V反更像新趋势启动。
representative.description: Distinguish whether a move is only a rebound or a genuine trend reversal based on how price behaves around support: repeated friction implies rebound, direct V-launch implies new trend.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-03-31他明说：“在支撑位反复摩擦上下震荡则大概率是个反弹，遇到支撑位直接v反起飞则大概率是新的上涨。”

representative.name: Key Level Reaction Map
representative.description_zh: 围绕少数明确关键位建立交易计划，只有当价格站稳、跌破或假破这些位置时才切换方向判断。
representative.description: Anchor the whole trade plan to a few explicit price levels and update directional bias only when those levels are reclaimed, lost, or rejected.

representative.name: Forward Box Projection
representative.description_zh: 先把未来一段时间的横向箱体提前画出来，再用箱体下沿/上沿作为主要买卖地图。箱体本身被当作核心市场结构，而不是普通支撑阻力线。
representative.description: Draw a forward-looking horizontal box before price reaches it, then use the box low/high as the main buy-sell map. The box itself is treated as the core market structure, not just a support/resistance line.
representative.example_evidence: 图3的“2025 BOX”与图4对 2026 年后续箱体的前瞻绘制；[2026-02-05] “At the same time the box is created, it is designed and drawn forward-looking by the chart itself.”

representative.name: Bitcoin Production Cost Floor
representative.name_zh: 比特币生产成本底部框架
representative.description_zh: 把比特币生产成本当作估值底部。现货跌破生产成本时，视为历史上不对称的做多机会。
representative.description: Use Bitcoin production cost as a valuation floor. When spot trades below production cost, treat it as a historically asymmetric long opportunity.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-02-25] “#Bitcoin production cost is now at $95,000 Current price is lower than production cost level Historically one of the best buying opportunities”；图1也在展示该指标。

representative.name: Market Maker Trap Mapping
representative.description_zh: 标记交易所/做市商可能先清算一侧仓位、再反转或延续的区域。这比单一清算热区更宽，包含对市场心理和操纵节奏的判断。
representative.description: Map likely zones where exchanges/market makers will first force liquidations on one side, then reverse or continue after weak hands are flushed out. This is broader than a single liquidation cluster and includes narrative psychology.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-02-25] “The mafia of ByBit and Binance... mainly to cause mass liquidations”；[2025-05-31] “Market makers know exactly how to shake out the weak hands”；[2026-04-09] “TRAP THE RETAILS FIRST, CRASH AFTER!”

representative.name: Six-Stage Bear Market Model
representative.description_zh: 把熊市划分为连续阶段并对应不同策略：顶部/派发、第一波下跌、诱多反弹/横盘箱体、恐慌出清、筑底、复苏。
representative.description: Classify the bear market into sequential stages with different tactics: initial top/distribution, first leg down, trap rally/sideways box, capitulation, bottom formation, and recovery.
representative.example_evidence: 图8标题“The Six Stages of the Bear Market”；[2026-02-22] “Bitcoin is currently in Stage 4 out of 6 in the current bear market”。

representative.name: Elliott Corrective Wave Counting
representative.description_zh: 识别 wave II/IV 回调、zigzag、flat、irregular flat 等修正结构，并据此推演下一段推动浪或更深回撤。
representative.description: Identifies corrective structures such as wave II/IV pullbacks, zigzags, flats, irregular flats, and complex corrections, then projects the next impulsive leg or deeper retracement.
representative.example_evidence: “currently trading within wave (c) of the corrective wave (IV)”；“wave (iii) has been completed, and a retracement within wave (iv) is expected”；“followed by an Irregular Flat correction (a–b–c)”。

representative.name: Elliott Leading/Ending Diagonal
representative.description_zh: 把引导楔形和终结楔形作为 Elliott Wave 计数中的趋势起始或末端衰竭结构。
representative.description: Uses leading and ending diagonals as early-trend initiation or terminal-exhaustion structures inside Elliott Wave counts.
representative.example_evidence: 他单独发过“Leading Diagonal In Elliott Wave Theory”与“Ending diagonal in Elliott Wave Theory”。

representative.name: ICT PD Array Violation Rule
representative.name_zh: ICT PD Array 三层失守规则
representative.description_zh: 跟踪连续排列的 ICT PD Arrays；当相邻三层阵列被跌破/破坏时，认为结构失效，需要调整止损和减仓。
representative.description: Tracks stacked ICT PD arrays; when three nearby arrays fail or are violated, the setup is considered structurally compromised and stops/partials must be adjusted.
representative.example_evidence: “3 PD Array Rule ✔️ ‘When 3 PD Arrays are violated, your ass is next.’ ... Learn where to keep yours stops, partial according to ICT”。

representative.name: Candle Compression Exhaustion
representative.description_zh: 趋势中先出现大实体推进，随后连续缩小 K 线实体，被视为反转预警或流动性压缩后的爆发前兆。
representative.description: After a strong directional trend marked by large candles, a sequence of smaller candles is treated as either reversal warning or liquidity compression before a breakout.
representative.example_evidence: “When the Trend Is Up & We See Big Candles, Then The Price Starts Forming Smaller Candles… Two Possibilities: 1. A Trend Reversal Is Coming 2. Low Liquidity”。

all_proposals.description_zh: 趋势中先出现大实体推进，随后连续缩小 K 线实体，被视为反转预警或流动性压缩后的爆发前兆。
all_proposals.description: After a strong directional trend marked by large candles, a sequence of smaller candles is treated as either reversal warning or liquidity compression before a breakout.
all_proposals.example_evidence: “When the Trend Is Up & We See Big Candles, Then The Price Starts Forming Smaller Candles… Two Possibilities: 1. A Trend Reversal Is Coming 2. Low Liquidity”。

representative.name: Whale Wallet Tracking
representative.description_zh: 持续追踪已识别的鲸鱼、机构、基金会、项目方和重复出现的交易地址，通过多次转账、提币、归集、成交路径来推断其仓位变化、真实意图与潜在市场影响。
representative.description: Track identified whales, funds, foundations, protocol treasuries, and repeat actors across wallets to infer positioning, intent, and likely market impact from sequential transfers and fills.
representative.example_evidence: 大量推文都以特定角色为主线持续更新，如 James Fickel、James Wynn、BitMNR、Trend Research、Vitalik、Tether、pump.fun。

representative.name: CEX Internal Transfer Filter
representative.description_zh: 区分真实的入所/出所与交易所内部热冷钱包调拨、钱包重平衡、跨链中转，避免把内部转账误判成真实买卖信号。
representative.description: Distinguish true exchange inflows/outflows from internal exchange wallet rebalancing, hot-cold wallet shuffles, and cross-chain operations to avoid false bearish/bullish signals.
representative.example_evidence: 图 3、图 4 对 ASTER 谣言的拆解，以及 [2024-08-30] “这实际上并不是哈，这是币安在进行 Arbitrum→Ethereum 跨链”。

representative.name: Oracle-Lag Liquidation Timing
representative.description_zh: 在链上借贷系统中，清算取决于预言机更新时间而非单纯现货插针；通过监控预言机节奏与还款窗口来判断清算是否真的会发生。
representative.description: For onchain lending venues, liquidation depends on oracle update timing rather than spot wick alone; monitor oracle cadence and borrower repayment windows to trade/interpret liquidation events.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-03-31] “他的仓位是开在 Maker 上，Maker 的预言机价格更新是以小时为单位，只有预言机当前价格低于清算价格时，才会开始清算。”

representative.name: Loop Leverage Build/Unwind
representative.name_zh: 循环贷加杠杆与去杠杆
representative.description_zh: 识别借贷协议上的循环贷加杠杆结构，并跟踪还款、卖币、补抵押、债务轮转如何改变清算风险和方向性敞口。
representative.description: Detect recursive borrow-buy-supply leverage loops on lending protocols and map how partial repayments, collateral sales, and debt rotation alter liquidation risk and directional exposure.
representative.example_evidence: 图 7、图 8 展示 Aave 上 stETH/WBTC 仓位变化；[2025-12-29]、[2025-12-28]、[2026-02-26] 多次分析“通过循环贷做多 ETH”的巨鲸。

representative.description: Treat public-company crypto treasury accumulation, staking deployment, and treasury policy changes as medium-horizon structural demand or supply signals.

representative.name: Public PnL Story Tracking
representative.description_zh: 不是孤立分析一笔交易，而是连续记录某位交易者的浮盈、保证金、清算价与行为变化，从动态过程里提炼交易经验与反面教材。
representative.description: Build trade lessons by serially documenting a trader's changing PnL, margin, liquidation level, and behavioral decisions through time rather than from a single isolated trade.
representative.example_evidence: James Wynn、Hyperliquid 全胜鲸鱼、麻吉、Techno_Revenant 等案例都被他连续多帖追踪直至平仓/爆仓/回本。

representative.name: Box Consolidation With Volume Build
representative.description_zh: 识别价格在清晰横向箱体内整理、但成交量或参与度持续抬升的资产，视为突破前的蓄力结构。
representative.description: Identify assets trading inside a clear horizontal box while participation/volume steadily rises, implying energy build-up before expansion.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-05-20] “most of my money was made by finding Assets which were consolidating in a range but seeing constant increase in volume.”

representative.name: Repeated Test Weakens Level
representative.name_zh: 关键位反复测试后弱化
representative.description_zh: 支撑或阻力在被多次干净测试后更容易失效，尤其是价格持续顶住该位置却缺乏有效反抽时。
representative.description: A support or resistance level becomes more likely to fail after repeated clean tests, especially when price keeps pressing it without meaningful rejection.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-04-19] “The more times a resistance is tested, the weaker it becomes.”；[2024-12-25] “Bitcoin is Constantly Touching 100K. The more times a price is touched, the weaker a resistance Becomes.”

representative.name: Holiday Liquidity Strength Read
representative.name_zh: 节假日流动性强弱解读
representative.description_zh: 通过节假日或低参与度时段的价格表现判断底层强弱；在流动性偏薄时仍不下跌，被视为强吸收和偏多信号。
representative.description: Judge market underlying strength by how price behaves during holidays or low-participation periods; refusal to dump despite thin liquidity is read as bullish absorption.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-12-25] “The fact that Bitcoin didn't dump on Christmas day... is incredibly Bullish longterm.”；[2024-12-23] “If Bitcoin doesn't Dump much during new year and Christmas, that means the market is Ultra Bullish.”

representative.name: Yearly Open Analog Box
representative.description_zh: 将当年年初开盘后的 BTC 结构，与上一年同期的箱体、均线位置和突破节奏进行类比，以推演后续路径。
representative.description: Compare current post-year-open BTC structure with the prior year's post-open box, moving-average relationship, and expansion timing to infer likely path.
representative.example_evidence: 图表 #6 直接把 “2024 Open” 与 “2025 Open” 两段箱体并列比较，并叠加均线来做路径类比。

representative.name: Exchange Listing And Liquidity Catalyst
representative.name_zh: 交易所上币/流动性催化
representative.description_zh: 围绕交易所上币、Launchpool、公示流动性增强计划、做市支持等事件做催化交易，预期短期成交量和估值重定价。
representative.description: Trade around exchange listings, launchpool announcements, liquidity-boost programs, or added market-maker support as near-term catalysts for altcoin momentum and repricing.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-04-11] “Binance Updates the Spot Altcoin Liquidity Boost Program!”；大量历史推文围绕 “KuCoin listing might be coming”, “Launchpool”, “Binance Futures Will Launch...” 展开交易。

representative.name: Ecosystem Meme Rotation Beta
representative.name_zh: 生态 Meme 轮动 Beta
representative.description_zh: 当某条公链主币强势或接近新高时，切换到该生态内更小市值 meme/次级资产，博弈补涨轮动。
representative.description: When a base ecosystem coin trends strongly or approaches major highs, rotate into smaller ecosystem memes expected to lag and then catch up.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-03-30] “$MYRO... $sol memes exploding”；[2024-11-18] “$HUND... $sol close to its ATH so its meme will print higher”；这类“主链强 -> 生态 meme 补涨”在他内容里反复出现。

representative.name: Headline Screenshot Momentum Trading
representative.description_zh: 用新闻标题截图、论文截图、公告截图等高传播素材，快速捕捉市场尚未完全消化的叙事驱动并重估仓位。
representative.description: Use fast-moving screenshots of headlines, papers, announcements, or viral news as immediate narrative fuel to reassess positioning before the broader market digests the information.
representative.example_evidence: 图 2 是量子安全 Bitcoin 论文截图，图 8 是 Binance Announcement 封面，图 3 是 Binance Research 成交量图；他的高互动内容常直接由截图驱动。

representative.name: Bond Market Leads Macro Risk
representative.description_zh: 把 10 年期美债收益率与债市走势视为“聪明钱”领先指标，用来预判经济走弱、政策转向以及股市/加密去风险。

representative.name: Crypto Leads Equities Risk Sentiment
representative.name_zh: 加密先行指示股市风险情绪
representative.description_zh: 把比特币/加密的急跌或关键反转视为股市即将进入去风险状态的领先信号。
representative.description: Treat sharp weakness or reversal in Bitcoin/crypto as a leading indicator that broader equities may soon enter de-risking mode.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-01-25] “Crypto slammed. May be an ominous sign for the stock market this week. Crypto has a habit of being a leading indicator of risk off.”

representative.name: Break Confirm Projected Target
representative.name_zh: 关键位破位确认后做目标投射
representative.description_zh: 先定义重大支撑/阻力区，等待日线收盘或确认破位，再推演下一目标区，而不是抢跑预判。
representative.description: Define a major support/resistance zone, wait for a daily close or confirmation break, then project the next downside/upside target zone rather than anticipating prematurely.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-02-25] “Bitcoin testing the major support of $92,000-$91,000. If it breaks and confirms, a significant drop is likely...potentially $75,000-$74,000.”

representative.name_zh: 初请失业金阈值分层框架
representative.description_zh: 用周度初请失业金的明确阈值分层，划分中性、预警、衰退型劳动力市场状态。
representative.description: Map labor-market regime using hard thresholds in weekly jobless claims to classify neutral, warning, and recessionary conditions.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-03-26] “anything between 200K-250K is nothing to worry about, above 250K is a warning, above 300K is a likely recession.”

representative.name: Narrative Pump Distribution
representative.name_zh: 叙事拉升后的派发识别
representative.description_zh: 当新闻或政策叙事制造隔夜跳涨/盘中拉升时，若价格无法维持，则怀疑机构借题材向散户派发。
representative.description: When headlines or policy narratives produce overnight gaps or intraday pops, suspect institutions may be using the story to distribute into retail demand unless price can hold the move.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-09-27] “Institutions bidding things up overnight, dumping into retail (distribution).”；[2025-09-26] “Insiders once again got the info early.”

representative.description_zh: 把散户极端狂热、杠杆堆积和单边叙事共识视为行情末端衰竭信号，尤其适用于垂直上涨的商品或加密资产。
representative.description: Extreme retail enthusiasm, leverage, and one-sided narrative acceptance are treated as a late-stage exhaustion signal, especially in vertical commodity or crypto moves.

representative.name: OTC absorption dominance
representative.description_zh: 当 OTC 份额显著上升、交易所可见流通量下降时，视为机构在场外吸筹；这既能形成价格底座，也会让盘面流动性变薄、增加快速插针风险。
representative.description: When OTC share of traded or absorbed supply rises sharply while exchange float shrinks, interpret it as institutional absorption supporting price but also reducing visible liquidity and increasing air-pocket risk.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-03-29] “With 90.23% OTC dominance and record capitulation ... Smart Money locks supply”；[2026-03-30] “On exchanges, only $761M (6.17%) remain”。

representative.name: Structural floor ladder
representative.description_zh: 用机构成本区和链上估值带构建多层下行地图，区分结构支撑、周期底和极端投降底，而不是只给单一目标位。
representative.description: Build a multi-level downside map using institutional cost basis and proprietary on-chain valuation bands, distinguishing structural support, cyclical bottom, and absolute capitulation floor.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-03-25] “$70K: New institutional re-pricing support. $60K: Current cyclical Bottom ... $54K: Absolute ...”；[2026-03-23] “Liquidity ladder: $65k, $60k ...”。

representative.name: Empty storefront liquidity warning
representative.description_zh: 如果价格维持或上涨，但交易所流动性和稳定币库存同步流失，则把行情视为战术上脆弱；浅盘口会放大挤压与闪崩。
representative.description: If price holds up or rallies while exchange liquidity and stablecoin inventory drain, treat the move as tactically vulnerable because shallow books can amplify squeezes and flash moves.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-03-31] “-$177M de USDT saíram das exchanges ... 'vitrine esvaziada'”；[2026-03-31] “Low exchange liquidity makes $65k support a Flash Crash target”。

representative.name: Geopolitical stress test
representative.description_zh: 用“地缘冲击压力测试”来评估 BTC：当油价飙升、战争升级、跨资产避险发生时，链上吸收和机构支撑能否承受外生冲击。
representative.description: Assess Bitcoin by asking whether on-chain absorption and institutional support can withstand exogenous shocks such as oil spikes, war headlines, or cross-asset flight-to-safety.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-03-29] “The Ghost of 1973: Oil at $100 is BTC's 'Trial by Fire'”；[2026-04-06] “Bitcoin Tests $70K Amid Geopolitical Tension”。

representative.name: Base Shelf Reversal
representative.description_zh: 长期下跌后不再有效创新低，在低位横向筑一个窄平台/货架，平台上破后视为高赔率反转启动。
representative.description: After a prolonged downtrend, price stops making meaningful new lows, flattens into a narrow shelf/base, then launches when the shelf breaks upward.
representative.example_evidence: 图片 #7 的 BABY 从 0.00784 一带长期横住后，他直接给出 0.01-0.015 反转区和更高目标；图片 #2 的 SOL 也是先筑底再预判加速。

representative.name: Memecoin Holder Quality Filter
representative.description_zh: 在做 memecoin 之前，先看狙击比例、捆绑持仓、创建者占比、内幕/集群集中度、持有人结构和平台用户等筹码质量指标。
representative.description: Screen memecoins by sniper ratio, bundled supply, creator share, insider concentration, holder clusters, and early platform-user metrics before taking the trade.
representative.example_evidence: 图片 #3 里他直接展示 Bundled 25.3%、Snipers 72.2%、Creator 11.8%、Fresh 7.4%；2026-04-11 的 WLFI 推文还写了 "doesn't have snipers... top holders... bubblemap cluster"。

representative.name: Narrative Leader Rotation
representative.description_zh: 在新催化出现后，优先寻找最可能成为该叙事龙头的标的，并在市场广泛认知前提前埋伏轮动。
representative.description: Identify the coin or subnet most likely to become the leader of a fresh narrative after a catalyst, then front-run the rotation before broad market recognition.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-04-10 推文："there's clear opportunity post-templar to be the king subnet on $tao... is @ridges_ai the next $100M subnet"，这是典型的催化后叙事龙头押注。

representative.name: Pre-Outperformer Relative Strength Positioning
representative.description_zh: 不是等币已经明显领涨才追，而是先找在回撤后抗跌、先吸收资金、即将接过注意力的标的，提前埋伏“未来的 outperformer”。
representative.description: Instead of chasing coins after they visibly outperform, identify the symbols already absorbing flow, holding up after wipes, or benefiting from upcoming attention rotation, then enter before broad consensus labels them leaders.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-01-20: "continue longing the outperformers before they're the outperformers"；2024-03-29: "put on the hat a month ago ... about to hit a 10x with 0 mins spent underwater"；2024-03-28: "choose pre outperformers"。

representative.name: Perp Listing Rotation Trade
representative.description_zh: 跟踪交易所永续合约上新节奏，以及它对新币和相关板块造成的短时资金迁移；交易的是流动性转移，不是假设市场出现了净新增需求。
representative.description: Track exchange perpetual listing cadence and the short-lived flow migration it creates across newly listed or adjacent sectors; trade the liquidity transfer rather than assuming net-new market demand.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-01-18: "short term probably going to be more fruitful to play the flavour of the 24-72hr cartel coins perps"；2025-01-24: "a new listing doesn't mean there's a net increase in total volume, most often it's just volume being transferred from other pairs"；2025-11-03: "nance on track to list more perps this year than the past 3 years combined"。

representative.name: Headline Volatility Event Cycle
representative.name_zh: 新闻标题波动事件周期
representative.description_zh: 把新闻/政策/舆情爆点视为周期性波动事件，短时压过慢变量叙事；降低方向执念，预期杠杆被清洗，交易的是反应与仓位结构，而不是新闻标题本身。
representative.description: Treat scheduled or emergent headline bursts as recurring volatility events that temporarily override slower narratives; reduce certainty, expect leveraged flushes, and trade the reaction rather than the headline itself.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-01-23: "thanks for participating in the daily headline induced volatility event"；2025-01-29: "time to lock in for the weekly volatility event"。

representative.name: Round-Number Reflexivity
representative.description_zh: 把大整数关口视为情绪与仓位的磁铁；临近、触及、站上后都会放大注意力和过度反应，但关口前后底层结构往往变化不大。
representative.description: Treat large round numbers as sentiment and positioning magnets where attention spikes, meme volume expands, and traders overreact despite little underlying structural change before versus after the level.
representative.example_evidence: 附图 #1 的梗图把 "PRE $100k / $100k / POST $100k" 对比成只有触及整数位时全场亢奋，过位后又恢复平静，说明他很在意 round-number 的行为金融学意义。

representative.name: Box Re-accumulation Range
representative.description_zh: 识别牛市主趋势中的长时间横盘或轻微上倾箱体；将无聊震荡、假跌破与支撑反复守住视为再积累，后续倾向于向上扩张。
representative.description: Identify prolonged horizontal or slightly rising consolidation boxes inside a broader bull trend; treat boredom, failed breakdowns, and repeated support holds as accumulation before expansion.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-02-26: "13-month re-accumulation range"；2024-06-30: "re-accumulation phase within a bull market"；2025-09-21: "trapped between 4K and 5K"。这是他最反复使用但 seed 里没有被单独命名的核心框架。

representative.name: Sell in May Crypto Seasonality
representative.name_zh: Sell in May 季节性模板
representative.description_zh: 用季节性模板推演加密周期：Q1/Q2 上涨并在 5 月前后到达阶段高点，然后止盈回调，年内后段再展开下一段行情。
representative.description: Project crypto cycle path with a recurring pattern: bullish Q1/Q2 expansion into May, then profit-taking, correction, and later re-expansion into year-end.
representative.example_evidence: 图 #1、#2、#3 多次在 5 月垂线附近直接写上 "SELL IN MAY AND RUN AWAY"；2024-11-25: "Bullish on $ETH until May, aiming for 10k. Then, take profits and step back."

representative.name: ETH-Led Rotation Thesis
representative.description_zh: 追踪资金从 BTC、SOL、XRP、ADA 或 meme 板块轮动到 ETH；把这种相对强弱切换视为下一段牛市的核心驱动。
representative.description: Track capital rotation from BTC, SOL, XRP, ADA, or memecoins into ETH; treat that relative-strength transfer as the main engine of the next leg of the bull market.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-02-23: "Full rotation from $SOL, $XRP, and $ADA to $ETH has started."；2024-11-27: "Rotation from $BTC and $SOL to $ETH is going to be brutal."

representative.name: Sentiment Capitulation Bottom
representative.description_zh: 把市场极度不信、KOL 看空或恐慌叙事，当作更大级别底部或积累区正在形成的确认信号。
representative.description: Use extreme public disbelief, influencer bearishness, or panic narratives as confirmation that a larger bottom or accumulation zone is forming.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-02-22: "FUD marks the bottoms."；2024-07-25: "The disbelief in $ETH right now is out of control. This is exactly the sentiment I like to see."

representative.name: OBV Lead-Lag Confirmation
representative.description_zh: 把 OBV 当作领先指标使用：OBV 先突破或先走强，则预期价格随后跟进；若 OBV 走弱或背离，则不追多或分批减仓。
representative.description: Use On-Balance Volume as a leading signal: OBV breakout or trendline break is treated as confirmation that price will likely follow; OBV weakness/divergence is a reason to avoid fresh longs or trim.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-07-31：“Ethereum OBV has broken local resistance already. As a leading indicator this often means that price will follow”；2025-08-31：“$ETH - OBV still giving me no reason to sell.”；图 4 是 OBV 水平阻力突破，图 8 是价格新高但 OBV 走低。

representative.name: Incremental Strength Selling
representative.description_zh: 不是一次性清仓，而是在目标位、突破后拉升段、情绪过热区按固定比例分批止盈。
representative.description: Rather than all-in/all-out, sell fixed portions into strength near target zones, especially after breakouts, euphoric pushes, or when local upside objectives are reached.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-09-30：“$ETH - Selling another 10% to make sure we see $5k in Pumptober.”；图 3、图 7 都在关键目标/突破后标注“Selling 10%”。

representative.name: Breakdown Reclaim Continuation
representative.description_zh: 关键支撑被跌破后快速收回，视为更强的多头重置，因为先清洗了弱手再恢复原趋势。
representative.description: A breakdown that quickly reclaims prior support is treated as a bullish reset, often better than a clean breakout because weak hands are flushed first.
representative.example_evidence: 图 3、图 7 多次直接标注“Fakeout, support reclaimed”“Support reclaimed”；2025-07-31 对股票也说“Looks like nothing more than re-testing a breakout.”

all_proposals.name: Breakdown Reclaim Continuation

all_proposals.description: A breakdown that quickly reclaims prior support is treated as a bullish reset, often better than a clean breakout because weak hands are flushed first.

representative.name: Month-End / Event Window Volatility
representative.description_zh: 在月底、财报密集期、周末和重大宏观事件窗口，预期更高波动与假动作；此时降低确定性，更关注冲洗、回测和反抽而非线性趋势延续。
representative.description: Expect unusual volatility and fake moves around month-end, earnings clusters, weekends, and major macro windows; reduce certainty and look for flushes/retests rather than clean trend continuation.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-09-30：“Last day of September, end of month volatility to finish out the month.”；2024-10-31：“End of month volatility at the end of earnings week.”；2026-01-31 提到周末 ETF 休市导致 BTC 更容易被搅动。

representative.name: CME Gap Fill Magnet
representative.description_zh: 把 BTC CME 期货缺口视为未完成目标位。价格回补缺口后，认为市场‘清障完成’，随后应启动新的趋势推进。
representative.description: Use CME Bitcoin futures gaps as unfinished business. Gap fills are treated as key milestones; once filled, trader expects continuation or a fresh directional expansion.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-10-29：“BITCOIN CME GAP FILLED!!!!!!!! NO EXCUSE FOR THE BULLS TO NOT GO TO ATH RIGHT NOW AND START THE Q4 RALLY!!!!!”

representative.name: Crypto Calendar Seasonality
representative.description_zh: 围绕 Uptober、Q4 rally、新年行情等高频月份叙事建立方向偏见，把日历季节性当作加仓和提高信念的放大器。
representative.description: Trade around repeated month-based seasonal narratives such as Uptober, Q4 rally, and New Year momentum, using calendar effects as a conviction amplifier.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-10-29：“UPTOBER HAS DELIVERED LIKE HEELLL”; 2025-09-27：“OCTOBER IS THE BEST MONTH FOR BITCOIN WE CALL IT ‘PUMPTOBER’”; 2024-12-31：“2025 is gonna be the biggest year for crypto”。

representative.name: 200W MA Mechanical Bid
representative.description_zh: 把 200 周均线当作预先设定的机械化接多区域，不依赖主观盘中判断，属于周期级别的规则化吸筹。
representative.description: Set predefined bids around the 200-week moving average as a non-discretionary long-term accumulation rule.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-01-30：“I WILL BUY BITCOIN AT 200W MA AT $60,000!!!!!! ... i will follow the mechanical rules and the plan we have set out”

representative.name: Stair-Step Resistance Ladder
representative.description_zh: 把牛市理解为一层层水平阻力被依次突破的阶梯结构，每突破一层，就朝下一层目标推进。
representative.description: Map bull markets as a sequence of flat resistance shelves broken one after another, projecting continuation to the next ladder rung.
representative.example_evidence: 图3中连续用粉色水平线标出多个平台阻力，价格逐级突破后直接箭头指向更高目标位，是他非常典型的视觉表达。

representative.name: ETH Supercycle Narrative Concentration
representative.name_zh: ETH 超级周期叙事集中持仓
representative.description_zh: 当“政策转向 + 华尔街入场 + 稳定币扩张 + 金融上链”叙事共振时，不做均匀分散，而是高集中度重仓 ETH 的框架。
representative.description: Uses a high-conviction, narrative-led concentration framework: when policy, Wall Street adoption, stablecoins, and onchain finance align, concentrate heavily in ETH instead of diversifying broadly.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-08-25]“唯有ETH最硬…鸡蛋放在多个篮子里，有时刻并不是一个好策略”；[2025-12-24]“坚定认为现在是最佳eth买入区…ETH未来目标1万➕”。

representative.name: Major-to-Alt Rotation Law
representative.description_zh: 牛市中的轮动顺序模型：BTC 先涨，随后 ETH，再到主流大市值，最后扩散到优质山寨；主要用于选币与节奏，而非单纯K线入场。
representative.description: A sequence model for bull markets: BTC leads, then ETH, then large-cap majors, then quality altcoins. Used for asset selection and timing rather than pure chart entry.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-07-20]“BTC和ETH先冲顶，然后是主流中型币…最后再是各种有实力的山寨币”；[2025-09-14]“轮涨定律已经开始”。

representative.name: Policy/Compliance Repricing
representative.description_zh: 基于美国政策友好度、稳定币立法、合规金融上链基础设施来给加密资产重新定价，而不只依赖传统链上或技术指标。
representative.description: Reprices crypto assets based on US policy friendliness, stablecoin legislation, and compliant financial-onchain infrastructure rather than legacy crypto-native metrics alone.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-01-24]“加密结构法案大概率通过…进入良性发展宏观环境的新阶段”；[2026-01-28]“像USD1这种合规稳定币”；[2025-12-12]“SEC主席最新表态‘金融迁移到链上’”。

representative.name: Transparent Wallet Signaling
representative.description_zh: 用链上可验证的钱包动作作为观点背书与风控纪律，强调“言行一致”，让加减仓可被外部追踪验证。
representative.description: Uses public, onchain-visible portfolio moves as a signaling and accountability device; entries/exits are validated by wallet transparency, not only by posts.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-10-11]“我们明牌清仓…链上透明”；[2025-10-11]“当时明牌清仓和做空，是基于多维度的投研数据”；[2025-10-11]“链上清仓15万个ETH”。

representative.name: Memecoin Cult Strength Filter
representative.name_zh: Meme 币社群信仰强度筛选
representative.description_zh: 按社群凝聚力、口号传播、身份认同和持币者穿越波动的意愿来筛选标的，而不是按基本面筛选。
representative.description: Ranks tokens by cult-like community cohesion, slogan density, identity signaling, and holder willingness to hold through volatility rather than by fundamentals.
representative.example_evidence: “$SPX Is The Only Cult Worth Joining.”、“Believe In Something.”、“Diamond Hands Will Win Big This Cycle”、“$ASTER CODED.”

representative.name: Calendar Month Pump Seasonality
representative.description_zh: 把特定月份或日历窗口直接当作行情催化，先给出方向性看涨判断，图表确认反而是次要的。
representative.description: Uses specific months or calendar windows as directional bullish catalysts for crypto or memecoins without requiring deep chart confirmation.
representative.example_evidence: “June Will Be Bullish For Crypto.”、“Crypto Will Pump In September.”、“PUMPTOBER.”、“Which Memecoin Will Pump In June?!”

representative.name: Bull Run Diamond-Hands Hold
representative.description_zh: 不围绕波动频繁交易，而是集中押注少数高信念 meme 币，穿越主升浪，直到市值极端扩张才考虑兑现。
representative.description: Instead of actively trading around volatility, concentrate into a few high-conviction meme names and hold through the main bull phase until extreme market cap expansion.
representative.example_evidence: “I saw a man turn 50k into 40m+ in 2021... held till the peak... didn't sell a dollar until the project reached a 5 billion+ market cap.” 以及“LEARN TO HODL = LEARN TO WIN.”

representative.name: Global Liquidity Index Composite
representative.description_zh: 构建全球流动性综合指数，汇总央行资产负债表、汇率效应、货币总量与抵押品条件，用其变化率和拐点来映射加密资产 beta，而不是只盯单一宏观序列。
representative.description: Build and trade off a composite liquidity index that aggregates central bank balance sheets, FX effects, monetary aggregates, and collateral conditions, then map crypto beta to changes and inflections in that composite rather than any single macro series.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-04-23: “Global Liquidity hits new ATHs...”；图片7下方面板直接标注“Total Global Liquidity (EMA)”。

representative.name: Liquidity-to-BTC Lag Model
representative.name_zh: 流动性到 BTC 的滞后传导模型
representative.description_zh: 用固定或自适应滞后来建模流动性扩张/收缩对 BTC 的传导，通常把比特币视为全球货币扩张的延迟高 beta 表达。
representative.description: Use a fixed or adaptive lag between liquidity expansion/contraction and BTC response, typically framing Bitcoin as a delayed high-beta expression of global money growth.
representative.example_evidence: seed 里只有 M2 增长代理，但 Jamie 的图表更进一步，图片1与图片8都在做未来 6-12 个月路径外推，而非静态相关。

representative.name: Crypto Breadth Thrust
representative.description_zh: 用等权/市值加权比、365日新低、跨板块参与度来跟踪加密市场内部广度，识别投降、出清和向广谱山寨扩散的阶段。
representative.description: Track internal market breadth using equal-weight vs cap-weight indices, new lows, and cross-sector participation to detect capitulation, washout, or expansion into broad alt participation.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-04-28: “Bullish Trinity: 1. Max Fear 2. Equities Breadth Thrust 3. Bullish Macro Regime”；2024-06-26、2024-09-26、2025-04-24 多次用 Top200 equal-weight、365-day new lows 做广度判断。

representative.description: Use hashrate recovery and short/long moving-average crosses on network compute power as a trend-health signal for Bitcoin.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-07-30: “A simple 30 & 90 day moving avg cross produces; 67% win record...”；图片3展示哈希率与 30/60 均线。

representative.name: Volatility Capitulation Watch
representative.description_zh: 把隐含波动率飙升、恐慌性交易所流动和投降式成交量结合起来，作为综合洗盘检测器，而不是只看单一情绪指标。
representative.description: Treat spikes in implied volatility, panic exchange flows, and capitulation-style volume as a combined washout detector rather than a single sentiment metric.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-02-06: “Capitulation Watch: Three Signs the Washout Is Getting Real” + 图片5 BVIV、成交量、RSI 三联观察。

representative.name: RSI Range Profile
representative.name_zh: RSI 区间画像 / Range Rules
representative.description_zh: 通过 RSI 在不同摆动中的运行区间判断趋势质量：强势上升里 RSI 常在 30-40 一带止跌回升，弱势下跌里 RSI 常在 60-70 一带见顶回落；据此做回踩延续或反弹卖出。
representative.description: Classify trend quality by RSI behavior across swings: bullish profiles hold RSI lows around 30-40 and bearish profiles cap RSI rallies near 60-70; use the profile to buy pullbacks or fade rallies.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-02-12] “Technically, the daily RSI profile for $TLT is bullish.”；[2024-02-26] “as per RSI range rules, the indicator tends to turn up between 30 and 40 during uptrends.”；[2025-07-16] “a + RSI profile”。

representative.name: Futures-Cash Non-Confirmation
representative.description_zh: 当股指期货创新高但现货指数不确认时，视为行情末端衰竭或拐点预警。
representative.description: When futures print a new high but the underlying cash index does not confirm, treat it as a late-stage exhaustion / turning-point warning.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-05-29] “new high in futures but not in cash is something you see at turns $ES_F $SPX”。

all_proposals.name: Futures-Cash Non-Confirmation
all_proposals.description_zh: 当股指期货创新高但现货指数不确认时，视为行情末端衰竭或拐点预警。
all_proposals.description: When futures print a new high but the underlying cash index does not confirm, treat it as a late-stage exhaustion / turning-point warning.
all_proposals.example_evidence: [2025-05-29] “new high in futures but not in cash is something you see at turns $ES_F $SPX”。

representative.name: Gap Fill Magnet
representative.description_zh: 把未回补缺口视为短中期价格磁吸位或阻力/支撑位，并把“回补完成/无法回补”作为行为切换信号。
representative.description: Track unfilled price gaps as tactical magnets or barriers; use gap-fill completion or failure as a behavior-change trigger.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-01-22] “no gap fill for you $SPX”；[2026-03-27] “Gap fill $SPX”；[2024-12-20] “$DJIA election gap fill”。

all_proposals.name: Gap Fill Magnet
all_proposals.description_zh: 把未回补缺口视为短中期价格磁吸位或阻力/支撑位，并把“回补完成/无法回补”作为行为切换信号。
all_proposals.description: Track unfilled price gaps as tactical magnets or barriers; use gap-fill completion or failure as a behavior-change trigger.

representative.name: Relative Ratio Rotation
representative.description_zh: 通过板块/国家资产对基准指数的比价图，先于绝对价格发现资金轮动与领导权切换。
representative.description: Use ratio charts between sectors/countries and benchmark indices to detect rotation earlier than absolute-price charts.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-09-18] “$GDX / $SPY breaking out”；[2025-01-30] “$SPY / $ILF - bigger reversal underway in US / Latin America?”；[2024-11-27] “The $FXI / $SPY ratio chart is interesting too”。

representative.name: Elliott Wave Equality / Wave 5 Thrust
representative.name_zh: 艾略特波浪等长与第 5 浪冲刺
representative.description_zh: 用常见波浪比例关系投射目标，例如第 5 浪约等于前 1-3 浪的 61.8%，并把第 5 浪冲刺视为末端风险或反转计时工具。
representative.description: Project wave targets using common Elliott relationships such as wave 5 equaling 61.8% of waves 1-3, and identify terminal thrusts in wave 5 for risk-off or reversal timing.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-03-26] “in $QQQ wave 5 = 61.8% of waves 1-3...this is a common relationship”；[2026-03-20] “a wave 5 thrust in $DXY should complete 'risk-off'”。

representative.name: Time Window Over Price Target
representative.name_zh: 时间窗口优先于目标价
representative.description_zh: 先判断周期顶部/底部的大致时间窗口，再把价格目标视为次级、低置信度变量；时间对了不代表价格一定打满。
representative.description: Prioritize identifying the likely top/bottom time window first, and treat price targets as secondary and lower-confidence outputs.
representative.example_evidence: “时间预测对了（21年底），价格过于乐观了：）”直接说明他把时间判断和价格判断拆开评估。

representative.name: Cycle Top Sketch Framework
representative.description_zh: 用简化的顶部草图、双顶/圆弧顶、见顶后派发路径去表达宏观结构，而不是依赖大量技术指标面板。
representative.description: Use simplified annotated sketches of blow-off tops, double tops, and post-peak distribution paths to communicate macro market structure rather than relying on dense indicator panels.
representative.example_evidence: 三张附图的核心视觉元素都是大级别顶部轮廓、阶段划分和路径箭头，而不是短线指标。

representative.name: Archive-Driven Postmortem
representative.description_zh: 通过保存原始记录来对抗事后改写，再基于这些存档做复盘与观点强化。
representative.description: Build narratives and postmortems around preserved original records to resist hindsight revisionism, then use that archive to strengthen future theses.
representative.example_evidence: 他直接用了“【拒绝岁月史书】……最全解析+存档记录”这种表达，说明他非常重视保留原始证据。

representative.name: CME Gap Fill Bias
representative.description_zh: 把周末 CME 缺口当成高概率价格磁吸目标，并常叠加周一时间过滤和结构确认后再去做回补。
representative.description: Uses weekend CME gaps as a high-probability directional magnet, often with a Monday timing filter and structure confirmation before targeting the fill.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-06-29] "100% confidence this will get filled next week"；[2025-08-30] "98% of Weekend Gaps get filled"；[2026-01-31] "CME Closed at 84.2K. You already know 98% of these get filled within 2 weeks."

all_proposals.name: CME Gap Fill Bias

representative.name: Calendar Pivot Narrative Inversion
representative.description_zh: 把特定日期或固定天数枢轴视为叙事反转窗口；若价格在枢轴前强烈偏多，常预期先扫流动性再反向，反之亦然。
representative.description: Maps specific dates or recurring day-count pivots as likely narrative reversal windows; if the market is strongly bullish into the pivot, expect a sweep then inversion, and vice versa.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-03-30] "10th April. Pay attention. The narrative into this pivot will likely reverse within 1–2 weeks."；图7用一系列垂直日期线标注 "Aggressive hunt before inverse narrative"。

representative.name: Open/Close Anchor Levels
representative.description_zh: 把日/周/月/季/年开收盘与影线高低点当作核心结构锚点，用于验证、拒绝和反转判断。
representative.description: Treats daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, and yearly opens/closes plus wick highs/lows as premium structural anchors for validation, rejection, and reversal.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-11-29] "I pay particular attention to weekly opens/weekly wick highs and lows"；[2025-08-29] "BTC is testing its previously monthly open right now. This is a crucial level."；[2025-09-30] "daily close strategy"。

all_proposals.name: Open/Close Anchor Levels

representative.name: Cross-Asset Historical Analog Mapping
representative.description_zh: 通过与其他资产或过去周期的历史路径做几何、回撤和时间类比，来推演 BTC 当前结构，而不只依赖同资产 TA。
representative.description: Projects current BTC structure by overlaying it with historical paths from other assets or prior cycles, using geometry, retracements, and timing analogs rather than only same-asset TA.
representative.example_evidence: 图5直接把 "Gold 1972" 与 "BTC 2027" 并列；[2026-03-31] 长文标题就是 "1972 Gold vs $BTC"。

representative.name: Narrative Figure Contrarian Signal
representative.name_zh: 意见领袖叙事反向信号
representative.description_zh: 当市场级 FUD/鸡血叙事与关键结构位重合时，把意见领袖和社媒情绪当作反向信号使用。
representative.description: Uses viral public narratives, influencer posts, and market-wide FUD/hopium as contrarian markers when they cluster near a structural level.
representative.example_evidence: 图3把 CZ 的几条 "buy the dip" 类推文贴在 BTC 图上；[2026-03-31] 还写 "Looks like the FUD this cycle is quantum computing fears... always convenient how this 'news' shows up right when $BTC is..."

representative.name: HTF Level Flip Trigger
representative.name_zh: 高周期关键位翻转触发
representative.description_zh: 等待高周期关键位完成阻力变支撑或支撑变阻力，再执行交易。翻转本身就是触发器；没有翻转就不交易。
representative.description: Wait for a major higher-timeframe level to flip from resistance to support, or support to resistance, before taking the trade. The flip itself is the trigger; without the flip, there is no trade.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-07-31“I am only looking for two triggers from price  Flip $119.5k -> New ATH”; 2025-09-29“My trigger for longs ... would be a flip of $112k”; 2025-08-26“Gameplan remains the same -> Flip & Long.”

representative.name: No Trade Zone Filter
representative.description_zh: 把中段区间或事件扰动期明确划为无交易区，直到价格到达清晰触发位才出手。
representative.description: Explicitly classify broad mid-range or event-heavy conditions as a no-trade zone and stand aside until price reaches a clean trigger area.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-09-29“pretty much a no trade zone”; 2024-12-29“Price currently is in no trade zone”; 2026-03-30“no trigger -> no trade.”

all_proposals.name: No Trade Zone Filter
