representative.name: Weekly Reference Level Map
representative.description_zh: 把前周高低点、前周低点、周一低点/开盘以及前周区间中点作为机械参考位，用于流动性扫单与反应交易。
representative.description: Use prior week high/low, previous week low, Monday low/open, and half of prior week range as mechanical reference levels for liquidity sweeps and reaction trades.
representative.example_evidence: 图 4 标注“Pre week high”“Pre week low”“0.5”；多条推文提 Monday Low、PWL、PYH，如 2025-07-31“Price has reclaimed PWL and is seeking SSL IMO”。

representative.name: Imbalance Fill Then Continue
representative.description_zh: 预判价格会先回补附近失衡区/FVG，然后再恢复原有高周期方向。
representative.description: Project that price first fills a nearby imbalance/FVG box and only then resumes the dominant higher-timeframe direction.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-07-26“I think price fills more of the imbalance (blue box) before heading for new highs.”；图 4 路径先下探蓝/灰不平衡区后再向上冲击前周高点。

representative.name: Scale-Out Profit Ladder
representative.description_zh: 在上涨过程中分批兑现，而不是试图卖在绝对顶部；牛市后段边涨边减仓，同时保留小仓位博取尾段加速。
representative.description: Reduce exposure into strength instead of trying to sell the exact top. Keep a residual moon bag while systematically locking in gains through late bull-market acceleration.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-07-30] “Either way we're moving up and I'm slowly scaling out. Securing profits, securing my future.”；[2025-08-30] “Take profit on the way up. Leave a moon bag...”；[2025-07-31] “people would rather ride crypto down to zero than secure some profits.”

representative.name: Sentiment Extreme Fade
representative.description_zh: 把市场群体情绪极端当作主要触发器：恐慌极致时偏买入，普遍狂热时偏谨慎，不追一致性预期。
representative.description: Use crowd fear/FOMO as a primary trigger: buy when panic is widespread and avoid chasing when euphoria becomes consensus.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-02-27] “Last time there was this much fear was 2022 when bitcoin hit $17,000.”；[2025-02-28] “We’re currently at extreme fear while Bitcoin is trading at $84,000... We’re going much higher.”；[2025-03-29] “There’s so much money to be made in crypto but most of you haven’t got a clue…”

representative.name: Liquidity Cycle Override
representative.name_zh: 流动性周期覆盖减半周期
representative.description_zh: 当流动性条件与传统减半/四年周期相冲突时，优先考虑利率、政策、ETF 需求和宏观流动性，而不是机械套用历史周期。
representative.description: When liquidity conditions conflict with standard halving-cycle expectations, prioritize rates, policy, ETF demand, and macro liquidity over simple four-year analogs.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-11-29] “It’s not necessarily all about the 4 year cycle. But it’s certainly all about liquidity cycles.”；[2025-05-29] “Interest rates will be coming down. Massive injection of liquidity.”

representative.name: 20W/200W Reflip
representative.description_zh: 价格在回调后同时重新站上 20 周均线和 200 周均线，把这种“双均线重夺”视为历史上较优的风险暴露窗口。
representative.description: Price reclaims both the fast 20-week moving average and the slow 200-week moving average, often after a corrective phase; trader treats the reclaim as a historically favorable point to add risk.
representative.example_evidence: 推文 [2025-03-24]：“Pretty strong signal seeing the reflippening of 20/200 and price over both — historically a pretty great place to take risk.”

representative.name: 200-Week Mean Reversion Buy Zone
representative.description_zh: 当主流币触及或略微跌破 200 周均线时，将其视为长期统计意义上的优质吸筹区。
representative.description: When major crypto assets tag or fall slightly below the 200-week moving average, trader treats the zone as a statistically strong long-term accumulation area.
representative.example_evidence: 推文 [2026-01-31]：“Eth and Sol and below 200 week average. Historically good buy zones. Bitcoin would have to go sub $60k...”

representative.name: Post-Markup Box Consolidation
representative.description_zh: 价格在一轮快速上涨后进入持续数月的大箱体整理，交易员将其视为下一波方向选择前的消化阶段，常结合季节性或事件催化判断。
representative.description: After an impulsive markup phase, price spends months in a broad horizontal box; trader reads it as digestion before the next directional move, especially when paired with seasonality or catalysts.
representative.example_evidence: 推文 [2024-09-25]：“Six months in a large range after markup. Going into election, annual seasonality. Interesting.” 图1 也是明显的上涨后大箱体。

representative.name: Alt Relative Strength During BTC Weakness
representative.name_zh: 比特币弱势期的山寨相对强度
representative.description_zh: 识别在 BTC 回撤或熊市阶段与 BTC 脱钩、保持相对强势的币种，作为弱市轮动标的。
representative.description: Identify assets that decouple from BTC and outperform during BTC drawdowns or bear phases; used as rotation candidates when broad crypto beta is weak.

representative.name: Wallet Linkage Forensics
representative.description_zh: 把新建钱包、启动资金地址、中转地址、交易所/OTC 路径串成同一行为体集群，用于识别内幕团队、项目方、黑客或机构。
representative.description: Link newly created wallets, funding wallets, exchange routes, and intermediary addresses into one ownership or actor cluster to infer insider, team, hacker, or institution behavior.
representative.example_evidence: 附图 6 用资金流图把 $LIBRA / $MELANIA / POPE 多个地址连成一条线；附图 7-8 通过 7.5 SOL 启动资金、pump.fun mint、transfer 记录追出 $DAVIDO 的源头。

representative.name: Celebrity Token Insider Pattern
representative.description_zh: 识别名人/网红发币时，部署者关联钱包、早期狙击钱包或带货账号先行建仓，随后借社媒热度向散户出货的模式。
representative.description: Detect celebrity/influencer token launches where deployer-linked wallets, early snipers, or paid promoters accumulate before social promotion and then dump into retail attention.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-10-30] MrBeast pump-and-dump 指控，附图 1 在价格顶部区域叠加大量卖出标记；[2024-05-31] “Be wary of tokens launched by celebrities.🚨”; [2024-05-30] Davido 发币并在 11 小时内获利。

representative.name: Public Trader Liquidation Tracker
representative.description_zh: 持续追踪高知名度杠杆交易员，估算其清算价与翻仓行为，并把这些强平/反手事件作为短线情绪与仓位信号。
representative.description: Track high-profile leveraged traders across sessions, estimate liquidation levels, and treat their forced exits or flips as short-term positioning signals and crowd sentiment markers.
representative.example_evidence: James Wynn、Machi、0x0ddf9、0x69e4 在推文中被长期追踪；[2025-05-30] “The winning strategy lately? Do the opposite of James Wynn.”

representative.name: Compression Breakout
representative.description_zh: 反复识别“盘整收缩/挤压/无聊行情”后接方向性放量突破的 setup，核心不是标准三角或旗形，而是泛化的 box/coil 压缩突破。
representative.description: Repeatedly identifies tight coiling, boring ranges, or multi-candle compression below resistance and trades the expansion once price breaks the box/ceiling.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-01-31] “ETHEREUM IS COILING UP!!!! BIG TIMES!!!!!” [2024-10-29] “Bitcoin is coiling up like it has never been coiling up before!” [2024-08-30] “Calm before the storm” [2024-08-23] “Bitcoin will break within 7 days!”

representative.name_zh: 公开盈亏截图强化信念
representative.description_zh: 通过公开账户截图、未实现/已实现利润和仓位规模，强化自己的方向判断与受众跟随度；这是他的内容化交易框架的一部分。

representative.name: Bart Pattern / Double Bart
representative.description_zh: 价格先垂直拉升或下杀，随后横盘，再以近似对称的方式反向走完，常见于低流动性或合约主导的假突破/假跌破行情。
representative.description: Sharp vertical move, flat range, then symmetrical reversal back through the range; often appears as a low-liquidity perp move or fake breakout/flush sequence.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-12-30: "They double Barted us  Pain"；图 1、图 2 直接用辛普森头像把多个 Bart 路径画在 BTC 5m 图上。

representative.name: Higher Timeframe Candle Close Anchoring
representative.description_zh: 把周线、月线、季度线收盘视为趋势确认核心节点；强收盘提高趋势延续概率，弱收盘则降低信心或等待确认。
representative.description: Emphasizes weekly/monthly/quarterly closes as decisive signal points; strong closes upgrade trend confidence, weak closes reduce conviction.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-03-31: "Bitcoin about to close highest quarterly candle *ever*"；2024-06-30: "That's a mf gorgeous weekly candle"；2025-06-29: "What a weekly candle this is"。

representative.name: Weekend Crypto Move Skepticism
representative.name_zh: 周末行情低可信度过滤
representative.description_zh: 对周末的突破、逼空或急拉保持怀疑，除非工作日开盘后有明确现货跟随确认。
representative.description: Discounts weekend breakouts/squeezes unless followed by clear spot confirmation after the week opens.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-02-28: "never trust a weekend short squeeze  never trust any weekend move for that matter"；2025-11-30: "Question is, do we trust the Sunday pamp"。

representative.name_zh: 现货大单与鲸鱼买盘确认
representative.description_zh: 通过可见的大额现货买单或交易所鲸鱼买盘，确认某个价位被防守，或某次突破具有真实需求支撑。
representative.description: Tracks visible large spot bids or exchange-specific whale buying as evidence that a level is defended or a breakout has real demand behind it.

representative.name: MM Two-Stage Distribution Template
representative.description_zh: 识别做市商常见模板：先借叙事拉升并完成第一波派发，中间横盘回收筹码或换庄，随后借二次情绪再拉一波完成第二次出货。
representative.description: Detects a recurring market-maker sequence: initial narrative-driven markup and distribution, mid-range re-accumulation or handoff, then a second exit wave into renewed retail attention.

output_when_triggered.bias: first long then short, with late-stage short bias

representative.example_evidence: 手绘图1直接标注“第一波庄派发（情绪高点）…庄重新吸回筹码…第二波庄派发（上二级所了）”。

representative.name: High-FDV TGE Listing Short
representative.name_zh: 高 FDV TGE 上市做空
representative.description_zh: 针对高融资额、二级流动性弱、配合营销和做市的 TGE/新币上市，预期其高开、派发并快速回落，优先寻找做空机会。
representative.description: Targets newly listed tokens with large prior raises, weak secondary liquidity, and coordinated marketing/market-making behavior; expects high-open, distribution, and fast mean reversion.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-09-30 列举 Monad、Opensea、Metamask、Nansen、Polymarket、Farcaster 等并说“近期我不会持有任何山寨币，只会找机会做空”；配图3是“TOP 15 POTENTIAL TGE IN Q4 2025 BY TOTAL RAISED FUNDS”。

representative.name: Narrative Quality Filter for Second Leg
representative.name_zh: 二段行情叙事质量过滤
representative.description_zh: 用叙事强弱和散户跟随度判断标的在第一波派发后，是否还具备二段行情，还是只会一波流直接归零。
representative.description: Separates tokens that can produce a second markup from those that only complete one pump-and-dump, based on narrative strength and whether retail follow-through exists after first distribution.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-07-30 他说“第一波没有好叙事没有散户跟，庄就没必要收回来筹码，直接开下一个了。”

representative.name: Cross-Asset Bubble Analog Mapping
representative.description_zh: 把加密市场的末期拥挤、派发与泡沫结构类比到黄金白银等宏观资产，通过超长周期图和相对价值关系识别顶部区域。
representative.description: Maps crypto market structure onto precious metals or other macro assets to identify late-cycle crowd behavior, using long-term charts and relative-value analogies.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-03-31 他说“Jeff对于白银类比山寨的逻辑也是让我去回测白银/黄金汇率对去判断贵金属到顶了的逻辑来源。”

representative.name: Fib Extension Top Mapping
representative.description_zh: 使用 1.272、1.618、4.618、5.618，尤其是 6.618 等激进斐波扩展位，对牛旗后的中继目标和周期顶部进行映射。
representative.description: Projects cycle tops and intermediate targets using aggressive Fibonacci extensions such as 1.272, 1.618, 4.618, 5.618, and especially 6.618 from prior bull flags or impulse legs.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-01-22: "#BTC has moved to the 6.618 Fib Extension after a Bull Flag Correction." 图片 #5 也写着 "TOP = 6.618 Fib Extension from BULL Flag?"

all_proposals.name: Fib Extension Top Mapping

representative.name: Altseason Phase Model
representative.description_zh: 将山寨市场划分为筑底、突破、整理、加速、狂热等连续阶段，通常结合 TOTAL3 与 BTC Dominance 见顶来判定。
representative.description: Classifies alt market evolution into sequential phases such as bottoming, breakout, consolidation, acceleration, and euphoria, often anchored to TOTAL3 and BTC dominance rollover.
representative.example_evidence: 图片 #3 直接分为 "1. Bottoming / 2. BreakOut / 3. Consolidation / 4. Acceleration / 5. Euphoria"；2024-01-16: "The next phase is ACCELERATION!"

representative.name: Historical Rhyme Analog
representative.description_zh: 不是机械复制历史，而是用历史周期在结构、情绪和节奏上的“押韵”来映射当前路径。
representative.description: Uses prior cycle path analogs rather than exact repetition, matching structure, sentiment, and timing between current market and earlier periods.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-01-22: "History does not repeat itself - but it often rhymes"；其多张图把 2017、2021、当前周期并列比较。

representative.name: Fed Cut Endgame Signal
representative.description_zh: 将首次降息视为周期尾声而非牛市起点，认为风险资产往往在降息后不久见顶，随后衰退压力兑现。
representative.description: Treats the beginning of Fed cuts not as the start of a bull market, but as a late-cycle warning that risk assets may peak shortly before recession bites.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-06-13: "When the FED cuts - then the Bull Market is almost at its End and Recession closing in." 图片 #8 也把降息与市场顶部时间窗并列。

representative.name: Sentiment Extreme Overlay
representative.description_zh: 在结构分析上叠加情绪极值，如 sentiment 88/89，作为共识过热后的反向过滤器。
representative.description: Adds sentiment extremes such as 'sentiment 88/89' on top of chart structure to fade consensus when technicals are stretched.
representative.example_evidence: 图片 #6 标注 "Sentiment 89"；2024-04-12: "Everybody is BULLISH #DXY... sentiment is at 88."

representative.name: FOMC Statement Redline Reaction Function
representative.name_zh: FOMC 声明红线差分反应函数
representative.description_zh: 逐字比对连续两次 FOMC 声明，按政策含义给删改语句排序，推断联储反应函数是偏宽松、偏紧还是更数据依赖。
representative.description: Compare consecutive FOMC statements word-by-word, rank added/removed phrases by policy significance, and infer whether the reaction function shifted toward easing, tightening, or data dependence.
representative.example_evidence: 配图 3、4 都是声明 redline；2024-01-31："FOMC statement gets a big rewrite"；2024-07-31："very meaningful changes in the top of the statement"。

representative.name: CPI/PPI-to-PCE Bridge Nowcast
representative.name_zh: CPI/PPI 映射 PCE 预估
representative.description_zh: 用 CPI、PPI、进口价格和分项细节预估核心 PCE，在正式公布前判断 3 个月和 6 个月年化趋势是改善还是停滞。
representative.description: Translate CPI, PPI, import prices, and category details into a high-probability core PCE estimate before the official release, then judge whether annualized 3m/6m trends are improving or stalling.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-06-28："Based on the CPI + PPI + import prices, inflation forecasters anticipate a very mild core PCE reading"；2024-08-29、2024-10-30、2025-02-28 反复使用同一桥接框架。

representative.name: Labor Market Cooling Composite
representative.name_zh: 劳动力市场降温综合框架
representative.description_zh: 综合职位空缺、招聘率、离职率、失业金申请、ECI、工资追踪和基准修正来判断劳动力市场状态，而不是只看非农标题。
representative.description: Use job openings, hiring rate, quits, claims, ECI, wage trackers, and benchmark revisions as a combined labor-state model instead of relying on payroll headlines alone.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-07-30："Job openings and hiring data point to a labor market that keeps loosening"；2024-08-27 关于 benchmark revision；配图 7、8 也是围绕就业修正与移民结构。

representative.name: Tariff Pass-Through Scenario Matrix
representative.description_zh: 把关税方案拆成通胀、增长和联储路径的情景矩阵，区分一次性商品涨价、信心冲击和更长期的就业拖累。
representative.description: Map tariff proposals into inflation, growth, and Fed-path scenarios by separating one-off goods-price effects, confidence shocks, and longer-run labor-market slowdown.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-03-30：Goldman 预计更激进关税将把 core PCE 推到 3.5%；2024-12-27：2018 年关税没造成持续通胀，但压制 sentiment 和 investment。

representative.name: Data Revision Audit
representative.description_zh: 跟踪基准修正、GDI/GDP 缺口、储蓄率修正和统计口径问题，避免围绕首发数据做出之后会被大幅修正的交易判断。
representative.description: Track benchmark revisions, GDI/GDP gaps, savings-rate revisions, and methodology quirks to avoid trading off first prints that will later be materially revised.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-09-26："A puzzle solved? Gross domestic income was revised up"；2024-09-27：储蓄率被上修 2 个百分点；他非常重视 revisions。

representative.name: Exchange Cartel / Venue Manipulation Read
representative.name_zh: 交易所操盘/场馆操纵识别
representative.description_zh: 把交易所宕机时点、盘口异常、强平瀑布、疑似场馆对手盘行为，作为可交易的市场结构输入，而不只是噪音。
representative.description: Treat exchange behavior, outage timing, suspicious order-book action, and forced-liquidation cascades as an explanatory and tradable market structure input.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-10-11: “exchange only goes down so they can close their positions & fill at best prices”；2025-10-15: “Binance really refunded their customers then liquidated them again after 24 hrs”；2025-04-22: “CARTEL.EXE”。

representative.name: Timeline Despair Bottom Filter
representative.name_zh: 时间线绝望情绪底部过滤器
representative.description_zh: 把时间线沉默、绝望、爆仓后麻木、家人面前强装正常等群体情绪，作为偏底部的反向软信号。
representative.description: Use extreme community despair, silence, and forced-seller psychology on the timeline as a soft contrarian bottoming signal.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-02-28: “the timeline is silent but every crypto participant is watching price”；2025-10-11: “watching your bags plummet by the gazzillions while having to act normal around the family”；2025-11-04: “if you are not a forced seller at these prices, you already won”。

representative.name: Asia Session Liquidity Raid
representative.description_zh: 重点盯亚洲时段在薄流动性下的异常扫单/强平动作，再根据关键位是否收回，决定反手还是顺势。
representative.description: Track thin-liquidity Asia-session moves for oversized liquidation raids, then fade or frame the follow-through depending on whether the move reclaims key levels.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-10-14: “infinite BTC seller nuked nearly $1B of open interest... during asia session”；2024-09-02: “market selling 7 figs at the lows during asia session”。

representative.name: Fresh Wallet Accumulation Cluster
representative.description_zh: 识别同一代币在数小时到数天内被多个新钱包反复从交易所提出，并聚合总量、均价、钱包数，作为吸筹信号。
representative.description: Detect repeated withdrawals of the same token from exchanges into fresh wallets over hours to days, then aggregate size, average entry, and wallet count as a bullish accumulation signal.
representative.example_evidence: "Within a week, 2 fresh wallets spent $1.29M for 16.3M $NEIROETH"；"In past 8 hours, 3 fresh wallets withdrew totally 4.66M $ASTER"；图片1里多个 Binance hot wallet 在 2 天内持续向同一 LINK 地址转出。

representative.name: Market Maker Inventory Readthrough
representative.description_zh: 将 Wintermute、GSR、Amber、Cumberland、Jump、Galaxy 等做市商或 OTC 桌相关转账解读为库存建立、派发或场外流动性操作，而不是普通转账。
representative.description: Interpret transfers involving market makers or OTC desks such as Wintermute, GSR, Amber, Cumberland, Jump, and Galaxy as inventory-building, distribution, or off-exchange liquidity operations rather than generic transfers.
representative.example_evidence: "Beside #Wintermute accumulating for $NEIRO_ETH"；"#Wintermute's OTC wallet received 4.655M $SPX (~$4.21M) from a Multi-sig wallet"；图片4显示 Wintermute 持有 54.784M NEIRO，图片8显示 Gnosis Safe Proxy 向 Wintermute OTC 发送大额 SPX。

representative.name: Wallet ROI Archeology
representative.description_zh: 从首笔建仓一路追踪到当前持仓、已实现/未实现收益和持仓均价，以判断该钱包是否属于值得跟踪的聪明钱。
representative.description: Trace a wallet from first entry to current holdings, realized and unrealized PnL, and average entry to infer whether it belongs to smart money worth following.
representative.example_evidence: "2 months ago, this smart money swapped $281k for 4.4M $FWOG & turns his investment into $1.1M (ROI 392%)"；"Yesterday, 'Happytrump.sol' swapped $69.7k for 14.64M $VINE... realized profit ~$2.29M"；图片6和图片7都是顺着 Jupiter authority 资金流去还原早期仓位来源。

representative.name: Perp Trader Shadowing
representative.description_zh: 跟踪公开可见的大型合约交易员，关注杠杆、加仓行为、清算价、已实现/未实现盈亏，以及他们是在开仓还是平仓。
representative.description: Track large public perpetual traders by leverage, DCA behavior, liquidation price, realized/unrealized PnL, and whether they are opening or closing positions.
representative.example_evidence: "this short-er did dca his short position on $LIT"；"this Long-er did dca on his $ETH Long position"；"A +$10M trader PNL just opened 3x Long position ~$84.19M with $BTC on #Hyperliquid"；"#pension_usdt_eth opened another 3X Short on $ETH ~$41M"。

representative.name: Launch Allocation Funnel Tracking
representative.name_zh: 代币启动分发漏斗追踪
representative.description_zh: 追踪 authority、deployer、treasury、多签或 LP 相关地址向终端钱包的转账，以识别早期受益地址、隐性分发路径和代币启动漏斗。
representative.description: Follow transfers from authority, deployer, treasury, multisig, or LP-related addresses into end wallets to identify early recipients, stealth distribution, or launch funnels.
representative.example_evidence: 图片6和图片7都在追踪 Solana 上 Jupiter Aggregator Authority 到 FWOG/MUMU 接收钱包的转移；这类分析不属于 seed 里的通用入所/出所，更像 launch provenance tracing。

representative.name: Narrative Hype Filter
representative.description_zh: 对热门叙事先做反证，先问底层优势、分发能力、真实客户关系是否支持故事，再决定是否跟随市场共识。
representative.description: Challenge popular narratives by asking whether the underlying edge, distribution, or customer reality actually supports the story.
representative.example_evidence: “Anthropic is great, but it is also currently blacklisted by the pentagon... How exactly does it plan to eat $PLTR lunch?”

representative.name: One-word Invalidation Exit
representative.description_zh: 当 thesis 失效时，用极简标签直接判定退出，不补仓、不长篇解释、不试图体面化错误。
representative.description: Use extremely compressed language to mark a thesis as broken and move on without averaging or over-explaining.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-04-11: “uninstall”

representative.name: Visual Theme Regime Mapping
representative.description_zh: 不用传统指标，而是用审美/文化标签给环境做状态分类，把复杂情绪压缩成可识别的世界观类别。
representative.description: Classify environments by aesthetic/narrative mood rather than formal indicators, using cultural references as compressed state labels.
representative.example_evidence: 附件 2-5 不是 K 线，而是“シンセウェイヴ / サイケデリック / サイバーパンク / ヴェイパーウェイヴ / ダーク・アカデミア / コテージコア”等世界观分类板，说明其更常用审美叙事框架而非标准 TA 标注。

representative.name: Edge Before Automation
representative.description_zh: 如果底层策略/内容本身没有优势，就不因自动化工具而高估产出；先验证 edge，再做放大。
representative.description: Reject tooling enthusiasm unless the underlying process has a real edge worth scaling.
representative.example_evidence: “Claude Code自動化ふぉぉぉ！！！って騒いでる人に冷や水かけます。自動化する中身がなかったら意味ないですよ。”

representative.name: Institutional Zone Entry
representative.description_zh: 识别机构资金大概率集中建仓/派发的成交区，等待价格回到该区域后再入场；该区域的重要性高于普通支撑阻力线。
representative.description: Identify price zones where large players likely accumulated or distributed inventory, then wait for price to return to that zone before initiating a trade. The zone matters more than generic support/resistance lines.
representative.example_evidence: 推文原话：“The first step to profitable trading is entering at an institutional zone. This is exactly where institutional money placed large buy or sell orders.”

representative.name: Volume Profile Node Map
representative.description_zh: 使用可见区间成交量分布识别高成交接受区与低成交拒绝区，并围绕这些节点制定回归或延续目标。
representative.description: Use visible-range volume profile to locate high-volume acceptance nodes and low-volume rejection gaps, then frame mean reversion or continuation targets around those nodes.
representative.example_evidence: 图6右侧明显叠加 VRVP/Volume Profile，用成交密集区和空白区来定义 C 浪回撤区与潜在支撑。

representative.name: TD Sequential Exhaustion
representative.description_zh: 利用 DeMark/TD Sequential 的 setup/countdown 递减、重置或衰竭来判断趋势何时失去动能，以及反转/停顿概率何时上升。
representative.description: Use DeMark/TD setup countdown deterioration or reset behavior to judge when a trend is losing force and when a reversal or pause is becoming more probable.
representative.example_evidence: 推文“ The TD has decreased significantly in recent weeks which signals ...”；图4、图6底部也都显示 TD 指标栏。

representative.name: Diagonal Trendline Break and Retest
representative.description_zh: 使用长周期斜向趋势线，等待价格突破后，再观察是否回踩确认，随后推演下一段趋势性推动。
representative.description: Use a simple long-duration descending or ascending trendline, wait for break, then validate with an immediate retest before projecting the next impulsive move.
representative.example_evidence: 图片2 的 XRP 周线、图片5 的 TOTAL3 日线、图片8 的 BTC.D 周线，都是非常典型的斜趋势线破位/回踩框架。

representative.name: Stoch RSI Reset Bounce
representative.description_zh: 强趋势中的调整阶段，Stoch RSI 回到低位后重新拐头向上，被视为动能重置而非趋势结束。
representative.description: After strong trend cooling, Stoch RSI resets into the lower band and turns up; trader interprets it as energy reset rather than trend failure.
representative.example_evidence: 图片4 明确画出了 Total Market Cap ex BTC/ETH 的 Stoch RSI 低位区域，并把历史几次同类低位与后续上涨对应起来。

representative.name: Altseason Rotation Stack
representative.description_zh: 把 BTC 企稳、BTC.D 走弱、TOTAL3 突破结合起来判断山寨季启动，而不是只看单币图。
representative.description: Combine BTC stabilization, BTC dominance rollover, and TOTAL3 breakout to time altcoin expansion rather than looking at single-coin charts in isolation.
representative.example_evidence: “$BTC dominance weakining . Alts is the play”(2025-02-28)；“Release the alts”(2025-05-22)；图片6 看 TOTAL3 楔形上破，图片8 看 BTC.D 破趋势线。

representative.name: Flush Then Pump Playbook
representative.description_zh: 把剧烈回撤和情绪性恐慌视为主升前的清洗动作，在恐慌区/买区被触发后转向看多。
representative.description: Interpret violent selloffs and emotional shakeouts as engineered clearing events before the real move higher, then buy after the panic zone is tagged.
representative.example_evidence: “First they flush then they pump”(2025-02-17)；“Do NOT get shaken out”(2025-02-19)；“The bounce is going to be epic”(2025-02-28)。

representative.name: CME Gap Fill Magnet
representative.description_zh: 跟踪 CME 比特币期货周初/日内缺口，把未回补缺口当作短线磁吸位、均值回归目标或方向参考。
representative.description: Track weekly or daily CME Bitcoin futures gaps and treat the open gap as a likely magnet or reference level for short-term mean reversion and directional bias.
representative.example_evidence: 推文："CME $BTC futures gapped up to start the week. For this gap to be fully filled, bitcoin would need to return to $109.9k."；附图 6 直接标注周初跳空。

representative.name: Calendar Seasonality Stats
representative.description_zh: 使用月末、季末以及历史同月收益统计作为概率型方向过滤器。
representative.description: Use month-end, quarter-end, and historical same-month return tendencies as a probabilistic directional filter.
representative.example_evidence: 推文："Historically, when $BTC is green for September, October, and November, it is also green in December..."、"Since 2013, all five times that #Bitcoin was red in June it saw strong positive price performance in July"、"In the 8 years that $ETH has been live, it has only had a single red February."

representative.name: Corporate Treasury Adoption Bid
representative.description_zh: 把企业或国家层面的比特币储备/金库增持公告视为结构性需求冲击，强化供给收缩与价格反身性。
representative.description: Treat announcements of corporate or sovereign Bitcoin treasury accumulation as structural demand shocks that tighten supply and support bullish reflexivity.
representative.example_evidence: 推文："GameStop has acquired 4,170 $BTC to establish their bitcoin treasury."、"Saylor is still buying."、"Bitcoin supply shock is coming."、"Switzerland is reviewing a proposal to add Bitcoin to their constitution and for the central bank to buy $BTC."

representative.name: Anchor Line Reclaim
representative.description_zh: 使用交易员手动画出的关键水平线/斜线作为核心决策边界；收复偏延续，受阻偏走弱。
representative.description: Use a hand-drawn, repeatedly referenced horizontal or diagonal chart line as the main tactical decision boundary; reclaim implies continuation, rejection implies weakness.
representative.example_evidence: 推文："Hold this orange line and we explode upwards."、"This level is very important to hold."、"People have been fading Ethereum for way too long. $ETH is looking to break 3 key levels: 1. My orange resistance line..."

representative.name: Multi-Year Compression Breakout
representative.description_zh: 识别周线/月线持续数年收敛压缩结构，一旦脱离压缩区，就按结构高度投射远距离目标。
representative.description: Identify long-duration triangle or compression structures on weekly/monthly charts and project outsized targets once price escapes the range.
representative.example_evidence: 附图 #3 画出 2018-2025 的大型收敛结构并把目标直接投射到 33.21925；[2024-11-30] “#Xrp has broken out of its compression zone, signaling the start of a potentially parabolic rally.”

representative.name: Regulatory Catalyst Breakout
representative.description_zh: 把诉讼进展、SEC 动作、银行接入、ETF、市场结构法案等监管/制度事件视为代币重定价触发器。
representative.description: Use pending legal, SEC, banking, ETF, or market-structure decisions as directional catalysts that can unlock repricing in specific tokens.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-03-31] “SEC’S APRIL 3 CLOSED SESSION COULD DELIVER MAJOR #XRP DECISIONS.”；[2025-03-31] “THE CASE IS OVER. #XRP IS FREE TO SCALE IN THE U.S.”；[2026-04-08] “CLARITY Act is a ‘done deal’...”

representative.name: Elliott Wave 5 Extension Targeting
representative.name_zh: 艾略特第 5 浪延伸投射
representative.description_zh: 在清晰 1-2-3-4 结构后，预判终段或加速型第 5 浪，并据此做高弹性上方目标投射。
representative.description: After a visible 1-2-3-4 sequence, anticipate a terminal or explosive wave-5 expansion and use it for high-upside projections.
representative.example_evidence: 附图 #6 直接标注 1-2-3-4-5，并把当前横盘解释为通往第 5 浪前的整理；[2025-08-31] “The final wave for #XRP 👇”

representative.name: Fractal Cycle Analogy
representative.description_zh: 将当前价格结构与历史周期的几何形态、时间位置和波段顺序做类比，用视觉分形相似性而非严格指标规则去推演下一段走势。
representative.description: Map the current price structure to a prior cycle's geometry, timing, and swing sequence, then project the next leg based on visual similarity rather than strict indicator rules.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-03-27] "$Doge to the MOON ... this is the trend"；图 3、图 6、图 7、图 8 都在比较 2014/2017/2021/2024 的重复结构；[2025-01-29] "Cycle 3"。

representative.name: Curved Arc / Chord Projection
representative.description_zh: 使用弧线、弦段和几何交点作为动态支撑/阻力与加速时点判断，推演大级别趋势爆发。
representative.description: Use curved arcs, chord segments, and geometric intersections as dynamic support/resistance and timing guides for large trend acceleration.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-08-30] "DOGECOIN developed solid bases in Chord Segments. When it retests to the intersection to the curve, $DOGE will surge"；图 3、图 8 也用大弧线做趋势轨迹。

representative.name: OBV Trendline Breakout Confirmation
representative.description_zh: 将 OBV 自身跌势线突破或结构收复视为价格上行前的确认，认为量能累积领先价格启动。
representative.description: Treat OBV breaking its own descending trendline or reclaiming structure before price expansion as confirmation that accumulation is leading price.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-07-30] "Bitcoin (on balance volume) OBV has broken out a descending trendline and retested it"；图 2 标题就是 "Bitcoin - <EMA+OBV>"。

representative.name: Gaussian Channel Regime Shift
representative.description_zh: 用高斯通道颜色翻转、中轨收复和通道支撑反应来定义牛市 regime 的开启与延续概率。
representative.description: Use Gaussian Channel color flips, mid-band recapture, and support reactions to define the start of a bull regime and continuation odds.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-07-30] "ETH Gaussian Channel has turned GREEN"；[2024-08-30] "Bitcoin has been supported by Gaussian Channel"；[2025-04-29] "Dogecoin Weekly Chart with the Gaussian Channel"。

representative.name: Nested Bullish Structure Stack
representative.name_zh: 多层嵌套看涨结构共振
representative.description_zh: 识别多时间尺度上的嵌套看涨延续结构，例如旗形之上再叠加三角整理，并把这种共振视为更强的突破概率。
representative.description: Identify stacked bullish continuation structures on multiple scales, such as a pennant on top of a bull flag, and treat overlap as amplified breakout odds.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-05-30] "Bitcoin has formed a Bull Pennant on the top of a Bull Flag"；图 1 也是 DOGE post-pole pennant measured move。

representative.name: Business Cycle Inflection Engine
representative.description_zh: 用全球商业周期而不是减半日历来定义 BTC/山寨的大级别阶段。商业周期见底回升时进入爬坡/扩张，商业周期见顶时加密周期见顶。
representative.description: Model Bitcoin and altcoin major phases from the global business cycle rather than the halving calendar. When the business cycle bottoms and turns up, crypto enters ramp/expansion; when it tops, crypto tops.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-10-10: “Always been the business cycle…”；2025-07-25: “Bitcoin tops when it tops. Bitcoin goes parabolic when it inflects.”

representative.name: Global Liquidity Breakout-Retest Lead
representative.name_zh: 全球流动性突破回踩领先信号
representative.description_zh: 一种特定宏观触发器：全球流动性先突破、再回踩确认、随后继续上冲；BTC 与山寨通常滞后跟随，并进入最强扩张段。
representative.description: A specific macro trigger where global liquidity breaks out, retests the breakout, then surges higher; Bitcoin and altcoins typically follow with a lag and enter their strongest expansion phase.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-03-22: “liquidity retested its breakout and is surging higher… Right as the business cycle bottomed and reversed.” 2025-04-08/04-11 也连续强调 liquidity breakout after retest。

representative.name: RSI Channel Macro Extremes
representative.description_zh: 在高时间框架上用 RSI 的长期通道/带状结构来标记宏观顶部、底部和中段拐点，而不是简单依赖超买超卖阈值。
representative.description: Use a persistent RSI channel or band structure on higher timeframes to mark macro tops, bottoms, and mid-cycle inflections instead of simple overbought/oversold thresholds.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-06-24: “A single RSI channel has called every macro $BTC top and bottom.” 图1也展示了一个沿历史周期重复工作的上方白线/下方震荡结构。

representative.name: Multi-Year Altcoin Compression Release
representative.description_zh: 识别山寨整体市值在多年压缩后的结构性突破/扩张信号，作为广义 altseason 的前驱，而不是单个币的形态交易。
representative.description: Detect extreme multi-year compression in the total altcoin market, followed by structural breakout or expansion signal. Used as a precursor to a broad altseason rather than a single-token setup.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-05-23: “never seen altcoin compression like this”; 2025-07-20: “Four years of altcoin compression is releasing.” 图6直接标注“4 years of compression”。

representative.name: Cycle Histogram Phase State Machine
representative.description_zh: 将自定义柱状图的颜色与斜率变化解释为离散市场状态：熊市下跌、筑底、爬坡、准抛物线、顶部。红柱峰值标顶，转绿标底/起涨。
representative.description: Interpret custom histogram color and slope changes as discrete market states: bear decline, bottoming, ramp, pre-parabolic, and top. Tops are marked by red-bar peaks; bottoms by green-turn transitions.
representative.example_evidence: 图3、图5、图8都在用同一类红绿柱状 business cycle / impulse 信号；2025-08-21: “Every Bitcoin top was marked exactly by a red bar top. We're not even out of green.”

representative.name: BTC Power Law Support Framework
representative.description_zh: 使用比特币长期幂律趋势线与支撑带，判断价格是在长期牛市中的筑底、过热还是均值回归重置。
representative.description: Uses a long-term power-law trendline and support band to judge whether Bitcoin is basing, extended, or resetting within a secular uptrend.
representative.example_evidence: 图1/2/3都直接画出 “BTC price power law support line / trendline”，并标注 $60k 附近 support line、support zone；[2026-04-03] 也说 BTC 在 $65-$70k forming a base。

representative.name: Metcalfe Adoption Curve Valuation
representative.name_zh: 梅特卡夫采用曲线估值
representative.description_zh: 把比特币视作网络资产，通过非零地址数、钱包数和S曲线增长路径，将价格与采用率代理变量进行比较估值。
representative.description: Values Bitcoin as a network asset by comparing price to adoption proxies such as non-zero addresses, wallet counts, and S-curve growth paths.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-03-26] 明说 “Bitcoin is a network asset... per Metcalfe’s law”；图6《Bitcoin's Adoption Curve》与图5余额≥$1地址数都在重复这个框架。

representative.name: Breadth Divergence Regime Check
representative.name_zh: 市场宽度背离状态检查
representative.description_zh: 使用市场宽度指标，如站上50/200日均线的股票比例、等权/市值加权相对表现、宽度冲刺是否跟随，来确认或质疑上涨趋势的持续性。
representative.description: Uses breadth measures such as percent above 50d/200d MA, equal-weight vs cap-weight, and breadth thrust failure to confirm or question the durability of an uptrend.
representative.example_evidence: 图8是典型宽度仪表板；[2025-06-24] “negative divergence between price and breadth”；[2026-02-24] 等权SPX跑赢Mag7 12%。

representative.name: Fiscal Dominance Macro Regime
representative.description_zh: 围绕赤字、债务利息负担、期限溢价以及财政扩张与货币政策的互动，来框定资产表现的宏观状态。
representative.description: Frames asset performance around deficits, debt-service burdens, term premia, and the interaction between fiscal expansion and monetary policy.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-06-27] “We are now in an era of fiscal dominance”；图7《US Government Debt Service》是他常用背景板之一。

representative.name: Hard Money Relative Rotation
representative.description_zh: 将比特币和黄金放在同一个硬通货资产组里比较，通常把黄金视为领导者，把比特币视为更高beta的次级参与者。
representative.description: Compares Bitcoin and gold as members of the hard-money complex, often preferring gold leadership and treating Bitcoin as a higher-beta junior participant.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-02-27] “Bitcoin is an aspirational junior player on the hard money team (led by gold)”；图1/2用 gold/BTC ratio 的z-score。

representative.name: MRI Sequential Exhaustion
representative.name_zh: MRI 连续计数衰竭信号
representative.description_zh: 一种连续 K 线计数的趋势衰竭框架；先用连续收盘/连续 bar 统计识别趋势耗尽，再等待确认生成买入或卖出信号。
representative.description: A proprietary-style bar-count exhaustion framework that flags trend fatigue after a sequence of consecutive closes/bars, then waits for confirmation to mark a buy or sell setup.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-01-25：“Is the MRI Buy Finally Going to Show #Bitcoin Signs of Life!”；2024-06-17：“#Bitcoin Rallies OFF the MRI BUY”。MRI 是他反复点名的个人框架，但 seed 里没有。

representative.name: Bitcoin Maxi Relative-Value Filter
representative.name_zh: 比特币本位相对价值过滤器
representative.description_zh: 一种强烈的比特币本位过滤器：除非山寨币能在长期相对强弱图上证明自己并通过可信度筛选，否则默认视为长期劣质资产、结构性回避或做空对象。
representative.description: A structural filter that heavily discounts altcoin rallies unless they outperform on long-term relative charts and pass a credibility test; weak alts are treated as secular shorts or permanent avoids.
representative.example_evidence: 2019 年的 XRP 图文在嘲讽“Ripple's Success Plan”；2025-08-12 说 XMR“down 94% with significant downside to go”；他对多数山寨币是先做结构性否定，再谈交易。

representative.name: Yearly/Quarterly Open Reclaim
representative.name_zh: 年开盘价/季开盘价收复
representative.description_zh: 把年开盘价、季开盘价、月开盘价作为高时间框架枢轴位；价格在扫流动性或回调后重新收复这些开盘位，被视为趋势延续确认。
representative.description: Uses yearly open, quarterly open, or monthly open as high-timeframe pivot levels. A reclaim after a sweep or pullback is treated as a confirmation trigger for continuation higher.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-01-31：“reclaim the yearly open and I think we push higher”; 2024-09-30：“reclaim the quarterly open”。

representative.name: Historical Fractal Analog Projection
representative.name_zh: 历史分形类比路径投射
representative.description_zh: 把当前市场结构映射到上一轮某个历史阶段，利用相似走势进行路径投射，通常会在图上直接叠加未来预期路线。
representative.description: Maps the current market structure onto a prior cycle segment and projects a likely path forward, usually visually with an overlaid blue path.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-04-30：“wyd if the jan 2021 fractal plays out?”；图1用蓝色路径把 2024 结构类比到 2021 年 1 月后的延续上冲。

representative.name: Sweep Then Reclaim Trigger
representative.description_zh: 先等价格扫掉明显等高/等低、上周高低点或会话高低点，再等待收回关键参考位后反向入场。
representative.description: Wait for price to run obvious equal highs/lows or prior session/week levels, then reclaim a key reference level before entering in the opposite direction.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-09-30：“Sweep of last week's low and all those equal lows and then reclaim the quarterly open”; 2025-01-31：“sweep of the local lows into monthly demand”。

representative.name: Monthly SR Mapping
representative.description_zh: 围绕月线级别支撑阻力带建立交易偏向，并据此推演未来数周到数月的震荡或突破路径。
representative.description: Derives trade bias from monthly support/resistance bands and maps likely summer or multi-month paths around those zones.
representative.example_evidence: 图1在 61.3k 与 58.8k 一带明确标注“Monthly S/R”，并给出更深回调或夏季横盘的路径；2024-04-30 文字也说“Deeper pullback scenario would be 52k... chop for most of the summer”。

representative.name: London Sweep FVG Setup
representative.name_zh: 伦敦高低点扫单 + 5分钟 FVG
representative.description_zh: 会话制日内策略：等待伦敦时段高点或低点被扫，再等待相反方向的 5 分钟 FVG 形成，在 FVG 入场，目标看向另一侧伦敦高低点。
representative.description: A session-based intraday setup: wait for London high/low to be swept, wait for an opposing 5-minute fair value gap, enter at the FVG, and target the other side of the session range.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-04-11 逐条写出完整流程：“1) Wait for a sweep of London's high/low. 2) Wait for a 5 min FVG... 3) Enter on that FVG...”

representative.name: Multi-Layer Reclaim Sequence
representative.description_zh: 一种偏多转换框架：先出现市场结构转变，再收回关键水平位，随后再收回主要趋势线或均线。只有这些条件按顺序共振时，才视为高质量做多触发。
representative.description: A bullish transition framework requiring a sequence of conditions: market structure shift first, then reclaim of a key horizontal level, then reclaim of a major trendline or moving average. Entries are favored only after these layers align.
representative.example_evidence: 图 5 明确写出“1. Market Structure Shift 2. Reclaim of Key Level 3. Reclaim of Key Trend”；2024-12-30 直接说“Master buying reclaims.”

representative.name: Consolidation As Fuel
representative.description_zh: 在更大级别牛市背景下，长时间横盘或震荡更可能被视为下一段上涨前的蓄力，而不是派发；除非关键结构被破坏。
representative.description: In a broader bullish environment, prolonged chop or range action is interpreted less as distribution and more as energy build-up for the next leg higher, unless major structure is lost.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-04-30 “same playbook on repeat chop, then higher.”；2025-07-31 “large consolidations have more frequently served as fuel for the next rally higher.”

representative.name: Relative Strength During Weak Tape
representative.name_zh: 弱市中的相对强度筛选
representative.description_zh: 当市场整体偏弱、震荡或下行时，优先筛选那些不破结构、率先反弹、或比龙头更抗跌的资产；一旦大盘环境改善，这些标的会成为优先做多对象。
representative.description: When the market backdrop is choppy or bearish, identify assets that refuse to break structure, bounce first, or hold trend better than leaders; those become preferred longs when the tape improves.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-09-30 讨论某些 alt 在 -3% pullback 中更抗跌；2025-08-31 “Ethereum is bouncing but Bitcoin isn’t?”；2025-10-26 把 ETHBTC 视为整个山寨强弱的最佳代理。

representative.name: Market Structure Break Level
representative.description_zh: 标出确认结构切换的关键摆动位；一旦跌破或升破，该位就成为之后回抽确认或拒绝的核心枢轴。
representative.description: Mark the exact swing level whose break confirms a regime shift, then use that level as the key reclaim/rejection pivot for the next trade.
representative.example_evidence: 图2、图3多次直接用红线标注“MSB”，这是他图表语言里最鲜明的专属标签之一。

representative.name: Level-Based Scenario Tree
representative.description_zh: 围绕一个或两个关键位预先写好多套分叉剧本：守住/收回走一种路径，跌破/扫流动性走另一种路径，并给每条路径配套入场与失效条件。
representative.description: Predefine multiple scenarios around one or two major levels: hold/reclaim means one path, lose/sweep means another, with entries and invalidations attached to each branch.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-01-30]“higher low and longs to range high... or we are going down to range low and can try again there.”；[2025-10-30]“My invalidation is clear...” 都是条件分叉而不是单点预测。

representative.name: Alt Relative Strength Scan
representative.description_zh: 把山寨币分别对 BTC、ETH、SOL 做相对强弱与结构比较，用来提前发现领涨品种，而不是只看美元计价图。
representative.description: Rank altcoins by performance and structure versus BTC, ETH, and SOL to identify leadership before broad market recognition.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-11-30]“go through Altcoins and checking them vs $BTC, $ETH and $SOL. If you want to spot outperformance, that is how you do it.”

representative.name: Cycle Euphoria Filter
representative.description_zh: 当价格进入发现区、社媒开始充斥极端目标价时，降低对继续线性外推上涨的信任度，把重心转向保护利润。
representative.description: When price enters discovery and social timelines explode with extreme targets, reduce trust in upside extrapolation and focus on protecting gains.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-10-31]“You are going to see some insane price targets... Most of this is just bullish hopium and euphoria—be careful.”

representative.name: Narrative Newsflow Arbitrage
representative.description_zh: 围绕头条、生态更新、创始人行为和情绪切换做快速定价偏差交易，在市场完全消化前完成布局或减仓。
representative.description: Trade around fast-moving headlines, ecosystem updates, founder behavior, and sentiment shifts before they are fully priced by the market.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-04-10 连续讨论 Bittensor/$TAO 事件："Bittensor is a quite a LOT more than Subnet 3"、"Templar founder extracted 37,000 $TAO worth of alpha tokens"、"Here is how I think the Bittensor $TAO situation will play out from here"。

representative.name: Insider Listing Fade
representative.name_zh: 内幕上所高估值反手做空
representative.description_zh: 当交易所、投资人、种子轮分配与内部人激励共同指向抛压时，反手做空新上所代币或被过度营销的资产。
representative.description: Fade newly listed tokens or promoted assets when exchange/investor alignment, seed allocations, or insider incentives imply asymmetric sell pressure.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-08-25: "it's an insider's game you can't win, so short garbage when it lists at nonsense valuations"。这是非常明确、可执行的结构性交易规则。

representative.name: Sentiment Not There Yet
representative.description_zh: 在群体情绪和叙事参与度尚未明显转强前，不提前重仓做多；把情绪确认当作加仓门槛。
representative.description: Avoid forcing longs before crowd sentiment or narrative participation has meaningfully turned; use sentiment confirmation as a gate before size-up.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-04-11: "Ok doesn’t seem sentiment there yet"。这句话非常像他的实时过滤条件，而不是事后评论。

representative.name: Founder Sell-Pressure Overhang
representative.description_zh: 当创始人、团队或生态拥有者获得可提取代币并存在明显套现激励时，识别其对价格形成的持续抛压风险。
representative.description: Identify protocol or token downside risk when founders, teams, or subnet owners receive extractive token flows likely to be sold into market strength.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-04-10: "Templar founder extracted 37,000 $TAO worth of alpha tokens... So it is only logical those 37k $TAO will be dumped on the market for max extraction"。

representative.name: ATH/Range High Weekly Close Confirmation
representative.name_zh: 前高/区间上沿周线收盘确认
representative.description_zh: 等待关键区间上沿或前高被多根日线、最好周线有效收于上方，再将其视为高胜率主升浪启动，而不是仅凭瞬时刺破追单。
representative.description: Wait for multiple daily closes and preferably a weekly close above a major range high or prior ATH before treating the breakout as a high-conviction expansion leg.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-09-26: "Once we get a few daily closes, a weekly above $65k BTC, it’s over."

representative.name: Sentiment Despair Contrarian Bottom
representative.name_zh: 情绪绝望反向底部信号
representative.description_zh: 把社媒上的恐慌、绝望、看空刷屏作为反向指标，认为洗盘接近尾声、底部正在形成。
representative.description: Use extreme doom, panic posting, and broad retail despair on the timeline as a contrarian input that the local low or shakeout is near completion.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-12-20: "The sentiment over the last few days because of this Bitcoin and Crypto dip is honestly pretty telling..."；2025-02-25 多条推文嘲讽 "top is in, it’s over" 言论。

representative.name: Memetic Momentum Amplification
representative.description_zh: 把简单的突破/周期判断与高强度口号、梗图、夸张措辞结合，在趋势上行阶段持续强化看多共识与持仓信心。
representative.description: Blend simple breakout or cycle observations with emotionally loaded, repeated bullish slogans to reinforce high-conviction positioning and audience alignment during trend expansion.
representative.example_evidence: 反复出现 "something BIG is coming"、"Higher"、"Banana Zone"、"However big you think it's gonna be - It will be bigger."

representative.name: Low-Float High-FDV Reflexivity
representative.name_zh: 低流通高 FDV 反身性博弈
representative.description_zh: 根据流通盘、FDV、解锁结构与叙事热度，判断新币是结构性脆弱还是能靠情绪/流动性反身性继续涨。
representative.description: Tracks whether a token launch is structurally fragile or reflexively strong based on float, FDV, unlock profile, and market willingness to ignore valuation during narrative booms.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-05-20 多次讨论“low-float high-FDV launches”，还发了图 3 专门比较 2022-2024 新币 MC/FDV 差距，并写“if everyone is bearish on low-float high-FDV launches...”与“FDV do not matter”式例外判断。

representative.name: Crypto Political Beta
representative.description_zh: 把选举胜率、候选人对加密的表态和监管立场，当作加密市场情绪和估值重估的事件驱动因子。
representative.description: Uses election odds, candidate rhetoric, and regulatory posture as a directional input for crypto sentiment and sector repricing.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-06-28 说“The next president... may be decided by how much they support our coins”；图 2 也是特朗普/拜登加密立场对照；2024-11-06 转发“THE UNITED STATES WILL BE THE CRYPTO CAPITAL OF THE PLANET...”。

representative.name: Apathy Extreme Opportunity
representative.description_zh: 在大周期仍健康的前提下，把社媒冷淡、市场无聊和叙事疲劳视为反向布局信号。
representative.description: Treats social disengagement, boredom, and narrative exhaustion as a contrarian accumulation signal when broader cycle conditions remain constructive.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-09-17 明说“peak apathy = max opportunity”；2024-06-26 也问“Is everyone really full blown doomer at this point?”，这不是传统 TA 指标，而是明显的情绪极值框架。

representative.name: ETP Absorption Elasticity
representative.description_zh: 通过跟踪现货 ETF/ETP 的净流入、AUM 里程碑和滚动窗口内“吸筹量 vs 现货收益”的关系来判断 BTC 方向；当持续净流入/净流出显著改变流通供给时触发。
representative.description: Model BTC direction by tracking spot ETF/ETP net flows, AUM milestones, and the rolling relationship between vehicle absorption and spot returns. Trigger when persistent net inflows/outflows materially change floating supply.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-06-10：“30d ETF inflows and 30d BTC returns ... R^2 of 0.8368”；2024-10-31：“U.S. Spot BTC ETF exposure surpassed 1 million BTC under management.”

all_proposals.description: Model BTC direction by tracking spot ETF/ETP net flows, AUM milestones, and the rolling relationship between vehicle absorption and spot returns. Trigger when persistent net inflows/outflows materially change floating supply.
all_proposals.example_evidence: 2024-06-10：“30d ETF inflows and 30d BTC returns ... R^2 of 0.8368”；2024-10-31：“U.S. Spot BTC ETF exposure surpassed 1 million BTC under management.”

representative.name: CME Participant Position Decomposition
representative.description_zh: 把 CME OI 拆成主动市场参与者、杠杆 ETF、被动持有者等分层，再结合 basis 和 OI 变化，判断是谁在推动风险暴露，以及上涨/下跌是否健康。
representative.description: Separate CME OI into active market participants, leveraged ETFs, and passive holders, then combine with basis and OI change to infer who is driving risk and whether the move is healthy.

all_proposals.name: CME Participant Position Decomposition

representative.name: Adjusted Liquidation Estimation
representative.description_zh: 不直接相信交易所上报的清算数据，而是结合 OI 变化、交易所 API 口径变更和全市场永续合约暴露重建，估算真实清算强度。
representative.description: Estimate true liquidation intensity using open-interest change, exchange methodology changes, and reconstructed market-wide perp exposure instead of trusting exchange-reported liquidation feeds.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-08-29 说“Liquidation data from exchanges are bogus”；图片 2、3、4、5 全都围绕 liquidation 数据失真、API 变更、估算方法展开。

representative.name: Institutional Supply Sink Tracking
representative.description_zh: 跟踪会持续吸收 BTC 流通供给的实体，例如 ETF、上市公司、主权基金、杠杆产品；当这些吸收池的增速提升时，将其视为中期看多力量。
representative.description: Track entities that structurally absorb BTC supply over time, such as ETFs, public companies, sovereign funds, and leveraged products, and treat acceleration in these sinks as a medium-term bullish force.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-11-18：“MicroStrategy added 51,780 BTC last week”；2024-08-14、2025-01-29 跟踪 NBIM 间接 BTC 持仓；2024-12-19 统计“859,454 BTC has been bought by ETFs and public companies alone in 2024.”

representative.name: Spot ETF Reflexive Demand Loop
representative.name_zh: 现货 ETF 反身性需求循环
representative.description_zh: 把持续的现货 ETF 净流入同时视为真实买盘和叙事放大器；一旦流入创纪录，会吸引下一波机构配置，形成反身性正反馈。
representative.description: Sustained spot ETF inflows are treated as both direct demand and a narrative amplifier that brings in the next wave of institutional allocators.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-10-31] “Largest single day Bitcoin ETF inflows since launch” + [2024-10-30] “All of the suits who aped the ETF are now in profit and can start shilling IBIT to their other suit friends”

representative.name: Open Interest Flush Reset
representative.description_zh: 如果未破坏高时间框架结构，但未平仓量被快速大幅冲洗，他会把它视为仓位出清、后续更利于上涨的重置事件。
representative.description: A sharp open-interest wipeout without structural price damage is interpreted as a cleansing event that improves forward upside odds.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-07-30] “open interest is down ~$1.3 billion in 12 hours Looking better now” 和 [2025-10-23] “buying BTC after 30%+ open interest rinses is 75% over 90 days”

representative.name: BTC vs Gold Relative Strength Rotation
representative.name_zh: BTC 对黄金相对强弱轮动
representative.description_zh: 把 BTC/Gold 比率当作宏观轮动信号；当黄金过度拥挤或过度延伸时，往往对应比特币的补涨或领导权切换。
representative.description: Track the BTC/Gold ratio as a regime signal: gold overextension or crowding often precedes a Bitcoin catch-up or leadership reversal.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-10-21] “People lining up in the streets actually marked the week of the gold top” + [2025-10-25] “I am expecting Bitcoin to run to new highs against Gold from here”

representative.name: Policy Regime Shift to BTC Bid
representative.name_zh: 政策体制转向带来的 BTC 买盘
representative.description_zh: 把亲加密政策转向、银行托管开放、主权储备叙事升级等视为结构性重估催化，而非一次性新闻。
representative.description: A pro-crypto policy pivot, banking access expansion, or sovereign reserve framing is treated as a structural repricing catalyst, not just a headline.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-01-27] “Banks can now custody Bitcoin” 以及 [2024-07-27] 关于 Trump strategic Bitcoin reserve 的总结推文

representative.name: ETF Flow / Price Divergence
representative.name_zh: ETF 资金流与价格背离
representative.description_zh: 当现货 ETF 连续多日净流入很强，但 BTC 不涨反跌时，将其视为合成供给、场外对冲吸收或结构性压价的证据。
representative.description: When spot ETF inflows remain strongly positive for multiple sessions but BTC fails to advance or sells off, treat it as evidence of synthetic supply, off-exchange absorption, or structural price suppression.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-06-26] “Bitcoin: not even close and that despite all those treasury companies and ETFs buying up $1.5 billion...” [2025-06-30] “$2 billion in ETFS and the price still isnt moving.”

representative.name: US Session Dump Seasonality
representative.description_zh: 当 BTC 在亚洲或欧盘走强但未获延续确认时，于美股现金市场开盘前后倾向反手，假设华尔街时段存在系统性卖压。
representative.description: Repeatedly fade BTC strength around US cash market open when prior gains are not being confirmed; assumes systematic selling pressure tied to Wall Street hours.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-07-31] “Why does Bitcoin always look great until US wakes up?” [2025-02-28] “2 hours until US market open, so dumping should start soon.” [2025-11-26] “Guess US is waking up again and immediately starts dumping Bitcoin as always.”

representative.name: Bitfinex Whale Smart-Money Tracker
representative.description_zh: 追踪特定 Bitfinex 大户的多头仓位变化，作为领先方向信号；在价格走弱或横盘时增仓被视为高信息量行为。
representative.description: Track a specific large Bitfinex participant's long exposure changes as a leading directional signal; accumulation into weakness is treated as high-information positioning.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-12-30] “the Bitfinex whale has started building his long position again... he's never wrong.” 图7 直接展示 longs 与利率的监控图。

representative.name: Paper BTC Suppression Thesis
representative.description_zh: 当连续利多催化都无法推动价格时，推断现货需求被合成纸面供给中和，因此即使名义资金流入强，也维持结构性怀疑态度。
representative.description: Infer that spot demand is being neutralized by synthetic paper supply when repeated bullish catalysts fail to move price, leading to a structurally skeptical stance despite nominal inflows.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-01-20] “Paper Bitcoin, unlimited supply.” [2026-01-06] “Too much paper Bitcoin in the space, there's an unlimited supply of Bitcoin.” [2025-12-31] “Wallstreet and the ETFs destroyed Bitcoin.”

all_proposals.name: Paper BTC Suppression Thesis

representative.name: Bitcoin Network Capital Flows
representative.description_zh: 跟踪进入或流出比特币网络的总资本、投机资本及 1d/7d/30d 期限资本流，通常基于 realized cap 类模型。底部后的流入回升代表吸筹与结构改善；价格走强但流量走弱则代表内在动能转差。
representative.description: Track total, speculative, and short/medium-horizon capital entering or leaving the Bitcoin network, usually derived from realized-cap style flow models. Rising flows after a bottom imply accumulation and improving structure; declining flows during price strength imply weakening internals.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-01-25] "Capital inflows into the Bitcoin network starting to climb again, while BTC chops around sideways quietly hiding coins being accumulated"；附图 #1/#6/#8 都是这一套图。

all_proposals.name: Bitcoin Network Capital Flows

representative.name: Onchain VWAP Z-Score Extension
representative.name_zh: 链上 VWAP 标准差扩张
representative.description_zh: 衡量现价相对链上 VWAP 偏离了多少个标准差。正向极值说明即便基本面偏多，价格也处于过度延伸状态，更适合等待横盘消化或浅回撤，而不是追高。
representative.description: Measure how far spot price is stretched from onchain VWAP in standard deviations. Extreme positive readings indicate momentum overextension even if fundamentals remain bullish; prefer sideways reset or shallow pullback rather than chase.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-04-27] "onchain VWAP is at +3 standard deviations, meaning it'll be hard to move upwards with decent momentum due to over extension."

representative.name: Macro Cycle Risk Compression
representative.name_zh: 宏观周期风险压缩模型
representative.description_zh: 用宏观与流动性合成风险模型判断投资者风险是见顶、压缩还是回落。宏观周期风险下降，通常意味着流动性重新回到网络中，下行回撤会被削弱。
representative.description: Use a composite macro/liquidity risk model to detect when investor risk is peaking, compressing, or rolling over. Falling macro-cycle risk implies liquidity returning to the network and downside becoming muted.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-08-30] "Macro Cycle Risk printed a lower high and has started a drop in risk"；[2025-04-27] "Our Risk Model has started its trend back down. This means liquidity has returned to the market."

representative.name: TradFi Treasury Reflexive Bid
representative.description_zh: 把 ETF、上市公司金库买入等视为第二层需求引擎：它们把传统资本市场通道转化为反身性的 BTC 买盘，放大原生链上资金流的上涨效果。
representative.description: Model treasury-style buyers such as ETFs or listed companies as secondary demand engines that translate traditional capital markets access into reflexive BTC demand, amplifying upside beyond native crypto flows.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-11-28] "The merger of #Bitcoin and TradFi is not going to make sense"；[2025-04-27] 他明确说数据里包含 treasury buying activities，它们是新的 TradFi onramp。

representative.name: Multi-Month Box Range Extremes
representative.description_zh: 先定义一个持续数周到数月的大箱体，重点交易上下沿附近的扫流动性、假突破和均值回归，而不是中间位置追单。
representative.description: Define a broad multi-week or multi-month box, fade the boundaries, and wait for sweep/failure behavior at the edges before positioning for mean reversion or final breakout.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-04-08 "Main scenario for me is still a $76k - $50k range until early Q4"；2026-03-26 "6 months range between 78-80k ... and around 48-53k"。

all_proposals.name: Multi-Month Box Range Extremes

representative.name: Weekly Close Threshold Validation
representative.description_zh: 不因盘中刺破立刻改变方向，而是要求日线或周线收盘站上/跌破关键均线或水平位后，才确认趋势切换或区间失效。
representative.description: Instead of reacting to intraperiod moves, require the daily or weekly close relative to a key moving average or horizontal level to validate breakout/breakdown scenarios.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-01-30 "If we close below the 100W ema+sma at 86k..."；同日又说 "Close below 86k on the weekly would confirm the breakdown"；2025-11-21 "Weekly close above 100-week ema..."。

all_proposals.name: Weekly Close Threshold Validation
all_proposals.description_zh: 不因盘中刺破立刻改变方向，而是要求日线或周线收盘站上/跌破关键均线或水平位后，才确认趋势切换或区间失效。

representative.name: Cross-Exchange SFP Disagreement
representative.name_zh: 跨交易所 SFP 分歧校验
representative.description_zh: 比较不同交易所是否都扫掉同一摆动高低点；如果只有部分交易所完成 SFP，说明流动性清扫可能未结束，单一交易所信号不够可靠。
representative.description: Compare whether swing highs/lows were swept across different exchanges before accepting an SFP as valid; partial sweeps imply unfinished liquidity business.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-04-25 "Obviously, half the exchanges got Sfp'd, the other half not yet"。

all_proposals.name: Cross-Exchange SFP Disagreement
all_proposals.name_zh: 跨交易所 SFP 分歧校验

representative.name: Astro Cycle Overlay
representative.description_zh: 把非常规的天体/历法周期当作辅助择时工具，用来给潜在顶部和底部窗口加时间权重。
representative.description: Use non-traditional planetary or calendar cycle overlays as a supplemental timing model for possible tops and bottoms.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-05-26 "Mars-Vesta cycles  Oct 6th $btc top is coded by the crypto gods"；2024-10-31 也提到 "3.9 years mars Vesta cycle"。

representative.name: Session-Based Flow Attribution
representative.description_zh: 把价格主导权按亚盘、欧盘、美盘拆开，若卖压主要集中在美盘，则推断 ETF 或传统机构资金在主导行情。
representative.description: Attribute directional pressure to specific market sessions, especially U.S. hours, to infer ETF or institutional flow dominance.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-11-21 "SELLING is happening mainly during U.S. Session"，并进一步归因给 ETF massive outflows 的可能性。

representative.name: Whale Wallet Tracking
representative.description_zh: 持续跟踪巨鲸、机构、项目方、老钱包等地址的提币、充币、转移和地址聚类关系，据此推断其仓位变化与潜在市场影响。
representative.description: Track known whale, fund, insider, treasury, and old-wallet addresses across deposits, withdrawals, transfers, and wallet clustering to infer likely positioning changes before or after price moves.
representative.example_evidence: 几乎整组推文都在做这件事，如 [2025-11-30] ETH ICO 巨鲸抛售、[2025-11-29] WBTC 巨鲸转而卖 ETH、[2026-04-02] 2016 年 ETH 远古巨鲸近乎清仓。

representative.name: Public Position Leaderboard Tracking
representative.description_zh: 跟踪 Hyperliquid、Deribit 等可见仓位地址的净值、强平价、杠杆、加减仓行为，以及市场跟单与围猎反应。
representative.description: Monitor public perpetual leaderboards or visible addresses on venues like Hyperliquid/Deribit to track PnL, liquidation price, leverage, add/reduce behavior, and crowd copytrading reactions.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-04-06]、[2026-04-10] 连续更新“先定 10 个大目标”老哥仓位；图 3 也是典型的公开账户净值曲线截图。

representative.name: TGE and Listing Tokenomics Event Playbook
representative.name_zh: TGE/上所/代币经济事件手册
representative.description_zh: 围绕 TGE、解锁、做市商、跨链测试、交易所上线与流通盘结构，评估初始 FDV、抛压和事件驱动资金流。
representative.description: Analyze token launch, unlock, market maker, cross-chain testing, venue listing, and circulation structure to estimate initial FDV pressure and event-driven flows.

representative.name: Source Verification Forensics
representative.description_zh: 在接受钱包、交易所或名人地址传言前，先核验时间、地址、资金来源和图片真伪，过滤 P 图和错误归因。
representative.description: Before accepting wallet or exchange rumors, verify timestamps, addresses, provenance, and image integrity to filter fabricated screenshots and misleading attribution.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-10-31]“一眼假… Don't trust. Verify.”，并逐条指出时间和地址都被 P 过。

representative.name: Ecosystem Adoption Scorecard
representative.description_zh: 通过整合接入数、真实用户数、链上交易量、支付通道、交易所支持和企业合作来建立方向性看多框架，而不是依赖 K 线形态。
representative.description: Builds a directional thesis by tallying integrations, real-world users, transaction counts, payment rails, exchange support, and enterprise partnerships rather than relying on chart structure.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-03-31] “3.5B transactions... 100% uptime... Zero failed transactions”；[2025-03-24] “over $965M in assets on-chain”；图5展示 Pera Card 的支付落地。

representative.name: Infrastructure Quality Benchmarking
representative.description_zh: 按 uptime、终局性、验证者分布、费用、扩展性、抗量子能力对公链做横向质量评分，并把“质量高但估值低”当成交易逻辑。
representative.description: Ranks chains by uptime, finality, validator distribution, fees, scalability, and post-quantum readiness, then uses that benchmark as a valuation gap thesis.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-08-25] “100% uptime... 15,000 TPS with instant finality... Decentralized”; [2026-04-06] “Whatever you look at tech, UX, decentralization... Algorand is SO underrated.”

representative.name: Narrative Catalyst Calendar
representative.description_zh: 围绕即将到来的发布、合作、上所、路线图和产品上线做前置布局，预期事件前后产生重新定价。
representative.description: Trades around a rolling calendar of upcoming launches, partnerships, listings, roadmap reveals, and product releases, expecting repricing before and after the event.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-10-29] “still planned before EOY!”；[2025-06-27] “Just 4 days to go before the announcement of a major new interoperability partnership”；[2025-07-29] “D-2 before the Algorand roadmap!”

representative.name: Theme Basket Relative Strength
representative.description_zh: 把老牌 L1、ISO 20022 或“dino coins”组成主题篮子，观察其相对 BTC 或全市场的强弱变化来做轮动判断。
representative.description: Creates a thematic basket such as legacy L1s, ISO 20022 tokens, or 'dino coins' and compares its relative momentum against BTC or the wider market.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-11-29] “Never fade Dino coins. Never! 🦖” 配图4展示 ADA/ALGO/HBAR/XRP 90 日涨幅大幅跑赢 BTC。

representative.name: Historical Fractal Analog
representative.description_zh: 把当前周期映射到历史年份/历史牛市结构，基于相似路径做目标位和时间窗口推演，而不是只看单一形态。
representative.description: Maps the current cycle to a prior regime or year and projects a path using structural similarity rather than strict pattern rules.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-01-17：“I applied a fractal from 2017 and that’s how I predicted the Jan bottom”；同日还说预期两个 blow-off tops。

representative.name: Election / Inauguration Seasonal Playbook
representative.description_zh: 把美国大选、总统就职、选后月份窗口当作加密市场的重复性时间锚来部署仓位。
representative.description: Uses U.S. election timing, inauguration week, and post-election month counts as repeatable timing windows for crypto positioning.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-02-28：“Markets peaks 6 months post election”；2025-01-20 多条围绕 inauguration day 做 BTC/ETH 部署；2024-01-26 也强调 election year volatility。

representative.name: Monthly / Quarterly Close Magnet
representative.name_zh: 月线/季线收盘磁吸玩法
representative.description_zh: 把月末和季末收盘视为流动性事件，认为价格常在这些节点被牵引、制造假动作，并决定接下来一周方向。
representative.description: Treats month-end and quarter-end closes as liquidity events that often pin price, create fake moves, or define the next week's direction.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-06-30：“Monthly , quarterly close in 10 mins ! If it’s bullish , it retraces on first week of July before rally”；2025-07-31：“Monthly close today ! Anticipate volatility”。

representative.name: Fixed Calendar Accumulation Window
representative.description_zh: 使用每年固定日期附近作为统计意义上的建仓窗口，不被短线噪音干扰。
representative.description: Uses specific recurring calendar dates as statistical accumulation windows, independent of short-term noise.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-09-17：“Personally , I’m buying next week . Sep 20-23 . I’ve been buying for over a decade on this date”；2024-07-31 还引用 W.D. Gann 的 Sep 23 季节性。

representative.name: Whale Manipulation / Orderbook Intent Read
representative.name_zh: 鲸鱼操盘与订单簿意图解读
representative.description_zh: 把市场走势解读为鲸鱼通过订单簿、清算位和时间节点主动设计的流动性猎杀。
representative.description: Reads market moves as deliberate whale-engineered liquidity hunts using orderbook placement, liquidation pockets, and timing traps.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-06-30：“market is heavily manipulated , run by algorithms... see what they are doing on the orderbook”；2024-07-31：“your liquidations were planned by whales”。

representative.name: Spot-Perp Orderflow Divergence
representative.description_zh: 识别现货交易所流向与永续合约仓位/基差不一致的情形，例如现货在卖而永续溢价上升，或现货在买而杠杆并未同步扩张。用于判断上涨是否真实需求、是否存在被动派发，或是否处于挤仓前夜。
representative.description: Detect when spot exchange flow and perpetual futures positioning disagree, such as spot selling into rising perp premium or spot buying while perp leverage stays muted. Used to infer whether a move is real demand, passive distribution, or a squeeze setup.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-04-30]“spot dumping... perps basis is closer to neutral now”; [2024-10-31]“The perps basis is rising because spot has been selling off today. Especially Coinbase has been quite bearish.” 图8同时看现货 CVD、perps basis 与价格。

representative.name: Venue-Specific Passive Buyer/Seller Detection
representative.name_zh: 分交易所被动买卖盘识别
representative.description_zh: 跟踪 Coinbase、Bitstamp、OKX、Bitfinex 等单一交易所的现货行为，识别持续性的被动卖家/买家、TWAP 执行，以及由特定场馆主导的方向压力。
representative.description: Track exchange-specific spot behavior such as Coinbase, Bitstamp, OKX, or Bitfinex to identify persistent passive sellers/buyers, TWAP execution, and venue-led directional pressure.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-01-30]“Someone on OKX has been offloading a bunch of spot with limit orders all day”; [2024-07-30]“Coinbase $BTC spot CVD skyrocketed today, but it seems like it was mostly limit selling”; [2024-08-31]“Bitfinex started twapping $BTC.”

representative.name: OI Reset After Flush
representative.description_zh: 在一次剧烈但未破坏结构的价格波动后，未平仓合约显著回落，而价格仍守住关键支撑/阻力。该重置被视为杠杆洗净，提升原趋势延续概率。
representative.description: After a sharp but not structurally damaging move, open interest collapses while price holds key support/resistance. The reset is interpreted as leverage cleansing that improves trend continuation odds.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-11-29]“Open interest reset, support held up. Looks to me like we're gonna take out the local highs”; [2025-05-30]“about $2b in OI closed on that small move down. $BTC”

representative.name: No Man's Land Trade Filter
representative.description_zh: 当价格位于关键局部高低点之间、缺乏催化剂、缺乏明确水平位反应且杠杆不对称不明显时，选择不交易。等待边界被扫或催化剂带来扩张后再出手。
representative.description: Avoid trading when price is trapped between meaningful local extremes without a catalyst, clean level interaction, or leverage asymmetry. Wait for either boundary sweep or catalyst expansion.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-07-31]“For me this is in no man's land”; [2025-03-29]“we're just chopping, waiting for a catalyst”; [2024-11-30]“Volume is dead, just come back Monday.”

all_proposals.example_evidence: [2025-07-31]“For me this is in no man's land”; [2025-03-29]“we're just chopping, waiting for a catalyst”; [2024-11-30]“Volume is dead, just come back Monday.”

representative.name: Narrative-Catalyst Rotation
representative.description_zh: 按催化剂强弱做轮动，重点看 ETF 申请、生态发布、代币上线、合作新闻和赛道关注度，而不是只看 K 线。
representative.description: Ranks trades by upcoming catalysts, headline momentum, ETF filings, token launches, ecosystem announcements, and sector attention rather than price action alone.
representative.example_evidence: 他高频转发并跟进 Polkadot ETF、Algorand 真实采用、RocketLab 合同、USDT mint、Top Trending Coins 等信息，并把这些直接转化为交易偏好。

representative.name: Microcap Asymmetric Re-rate
representative.description_zh: 专找低市值币种，在简单底部结构配合强叙事时下注，并用 2x、5x、创新高等重估目标表达交易逻辑。
representative.description: Targets low-market-cap tokens with a simple chart base plus a strong narrative, then frames them with high-upside re-rating targets such as 2x, 5x, or new ATH.
representative.example_evidence: NAI、MIL、SPEC、METIS、LARRY 等推文里反复出现 "easy 4-5x", "5x from here", "towards $100M MCAP", "Ready for new ATH" 这类非对称收益表达。

representative.name: Altcoin Conditional Long on BTC Stability
representative.name_zh: BTC 稳住前提下的山寨条件做多
representative.description_zh: 只有在 BTC 守住支撑或稳定横盘时才做山寨多单，避免逆着弱 BTC 环境单独做多山寨。
representative.description: Only takes altcoin longs when BTC is holding support or moving sideways constructively; avoids isolated alt trades against a weak BTC tape.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-05-31："If $BTC holds here, we could see a 30–50% move." 这几乎是他做山寨 setup 的条件句模板。

representative.name: Simple Horizontal Target Projection
representative.description_zh: 偏好用长期趋势线压缩、显眼水平阻力和手绘路径做目标投射，而不是堆叠大量指标。
representative.description: Uses long trendline compression, visible horizontal resistances, and a straightforward upside path sketch instead of indicator-heavy forecasting.
representative.example_evidence: 图片 7 的 NAI 日线直接用下降趋势线、横向支撑和手绘上行路径给出 611% 空间，风格非常鲜明。

representative.name: VC Unlock Overhang Fade
representative.name_zh: VC 解锁抛压做空/回避
representative.description_zh: 对高 FDV、低流通、悬崖解锁明显、投资人浮盈倍数极高的代币保持回避或逢高做空，因为后续解锁会形成持续抛压。
representative.description: Avoid or fade tokens with high FDV, low float, aggressive cliffs, and large investor unrealized multiples because unlock schedules create persistent sell pressure.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-08-26: "VCs don't actually lose even when they are locked up with vesting cliffs. Many of them short their own investments..."；2025-04-28 做空 $TRUMP 的核心论据也是大额线性解锁；配图中还有专门的 vesting / investor supply / unrealized profit 表。

representative.name: Mindshare Momentum
representative.description_zh: 用社交关注度、Kaito 排名和叙事声量作为板块轮动与 meme/AI 标的筛选的领先指标。
representative.description: Track social attention, Kaito rankings, and narrative share-of-voice as leading indicators for token rotation and meme/AI beta selection.

representative.name: PMF and Revenue Repricing
representative.description_zh: 对拥有真实产品市场契合、持续收入、用户增长或回购机制的代币进行重估，即使市场噪音很大。
representative.description: Re-rate tokens that show real product-market fit, durable revenue, user growth, or buyback engines even if the broader market narrative is noisy.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-09-29: "This bull cycle we have 3 products so far that have achieved product market fit"；2025-05-27 论证 $SYRUP 时列 TVL、年化收入、stablecoin mc 增长；2025-09-28 强调 $APEX 的 buyback pressure。

representative.name: Ecosystem Rotation Betas
representative.name_zh: 生态轮动 Beta 下注
representative.description_zh: 当某条链或某个叙事重新获得关注时，从龙头扩散到流动性更好的 beta 标的和二级生态标的。
representative.description: When a chain or narrative regains attention, rotate from the obvious leaders into liquid beta names and second-order ecosystem plays.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-06-29 看多 "$SOL alts"；2024-07-28 明说 "rotation from $SOL memes -> $SOL's ecosystem is inevitable"；2025 年又多次把 Base 叙事集中到 $ZORA。

representative.name: HTF Horizontal Zone Mapping
representative.name_zh: 高时间框架水平供需区标定
representative.description_zh: 在 1D/1W 图上先标出多月级别水平支撑阻力箱体，再等待价格在箱体附近出现反应、收回或拒绝后才承担方向性风险。
representative.description: Mark multi-month support and resistance boxes on 1D/1W charts, then wait for reaction or reclaim/rejection before taking directional risk.
representative.example_evidence: ETH 周线图把 1.9k 与 3.9k 一带画成宽黄区；[2024-08-24] 直接说 $CORE main support holding，且需要 $1.5 region flip。

representative.name: Invalidation-First Trade Framing
representative.description_zh: 先定义哪一个价位会让交易逻辑失效，再围绕这个失效位去做仓位和执行，而不是先讲目标位故事。
representative.description: Frame setups by the exact level that invalidates the thesis, and size/execute around that level rather than around a target-first narrative.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-04-10] 直接写 “Trading the invalidation.”，这是他少数明确暴露方法论的原话。

representative.name: Headline Shock Repricing
representative.description_zh: 当市场本就偏弱或压在关键支撑上时，把突发地缘政治或政策头条视作加密资产再定价催化剂。
representative.description: Use sudden geopolitical or policy headlines as the catalyst for crypto repricing, especially when market structure is already weak or sitting on support.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-01-31] “Dude woke up and just decided he is going to nuke all our bags..”、[2025-02-28] “Did Trump announce another tariff while I was asleep or what? $BTC”。

representative.name: Crypto Twitter Sentiment Extremes
representative.name_zh: CT 情绪极端反向参考
representative.description_zh: 把时间线上极端绝望或亢奋的情绪当作软性的反向指标，尤其是在明显支撑位或连续 bagholder 绝望段子之后。
representative.description: Treat extreme despair/euphoria in the feed as a soft contrarian input, especially around obvious support or after repeated bagholder capitulation memes.
representative.example_evidence: 他大量使用 bagholder/poverty/ramen 叙事，如 [2025-10-29] “Back to Poverty Island $BTC”、[2025-09-23] “those juicy support levels across many altcoins”。

representative.name: STH Cost Basis Support Stack
representative.name_zh: 短期持有者成本带支撑堆栈
representative.description_zh: 把 200 日均线、短期持有者成本线、链上均值/成本基准叠加成一个支撑阻力带。价格重新站上该带视为结构确认，跌回其下视为弱势。
representative.description: Use a stacked support/resistance framework combining 200-day moving average, short-term-holder cost basis, and on-chain mean/cost basis. A reclaim above the cluster is treated as structural confirmation; rejection below it is treated as weakness.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-01-09]“Price closed above important support: its 200d MA ($31.9k), its short-term-holder cost basis ($35.8k), and its on-chain mean ($32.2k)”

representative.name: SOPR Reset Bottoming
representative.name_zh: SOPR 回归盈亏平衡底部识别
representative.description_zh: 把全市场已实现盈亏指标回归到盈亏平衡附近视为牛市中的局部底部重置信号。
representative.description: Treat aggregate realized profit/loss resetting to breakeven as evidence of local bottom formation inside a broader bull trend.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-05-15]“SOPR... has reset to breakeven, which historically correlates with local bottoms within primary bull markets.”

representative.name: Elliott Wave 5 Projection
representative.name_zh: 艾略特浪 5 目标投射
representative.description_zh: 在确认推动浪结构和突破回踩后，给出第 5 浪终点目标，用于顺势上行的空间评估。
representative.description: After confirming impulsive structure and a breakout/retest, project a fifth-wave terminal target for upside continuation.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-04-09]“$CIFR what a breakout... A breakout and retest or a retest of the 50 DMA is a solid opportunity to buy  Wave 5 target: +122%”

representative.name: Nasdaq-Implied Fair Value Model
representative.name_zh: 纳指隐含公允价值模型
representative.description_zh: 基于 BTC 与纳斯达克100长期对数线性关系估算公允价值，把现价相对模型价的折价/溢价当作交易与择时框架。
representative.description: Model Bitcoin fair value from its historical log-linear relationship with the Nasdaq 100, then trade deviations as discount/premium regimes.
representative.example_evidence: 图 2 标题直接是 “Bitcoin’s Nasdaq-Implied Fair Value: $156,000”，并标注 “BTC at a 31% discount”；2025-03-26 推文也说 “There is a statistically significant link between Bitcoin's log-price and the NASDAQ 100.”

representative.name: Drawdown Depth-to-Duration Model
representative.name_zh: 回撤深度-修复时长模型
representative.description_zh: 依据历史样本中 BTC 回撤幅度与修复耗时的关系，估计当前回撤大概还要持续多久。
representative.description: Estimate expected recovery duration from the percentage depth of a Bitcoin drawdown using historical scatter/regression.
representative.example_evidence: 图 8 直接写 “The deeper Bitcoin’s drawdowns The longer it takes to resolve”；2026-03-26 推文也说 “every additional 10% of drawdown adds about 80 days to the total duration.”

representative.name: Corporate Treasury Accumulation Acceleration
representative.name_zh: 企业比特币金库加速吸筹
representative.description_zh: 跟踪上市公司尤其是 MicroStrategy 一类主体的 BTC 金库扩张速度，把其视为结构性需求和叙事放大器。
representative.description: Track public companies accumulating BTC, especially acceleration in treasury purchases, as a structural demand and narrative multiplier.
representative.example_evidence: 图 3、图 6 都是 MicroStrategy 持仓垂直上升；2025-03-24 推文 “MicroStrategy just added another 7,000 Bitcoin to their treasury.”；2024-11-25 “Bitcoin's price isn't the only thing going vertical these days. MicroStrategy's Bitcoin holdings are rising at a blazing pace.”

representative.name: Fed Communication Tone Index
representative.description_zh: 不只看是否降息，而是量化 FOMC 纪要、发布会和联储表述的鹰鸽语气来判断风险偏好与 BTC 顺风/逆风。
representative.description: Infer market risk regime from the hawkish/dovish tone of FOMC minutes, press conferences, and Fed communication rather than rates alone.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-08-23 “The Federal Reserve is the least hawkish they've been...”；2024-11-27 “The Federal Reserve is almost dovish.”；2025-01-09 “The Federal Reserve shifted from a nearly dovish stance in November back to moderately hawkish...”

representative.name: Elliott ABC Correction Mapping
representative.name_zh: 艾略特 ABC 修正结构映射
representative.description_zh: 识别之字形、平台形、复杂修正等 ABC 结构，判断当前处于 A、B、C 哪一段，以及修正完成后趋势恢复或延续的概率。
representative.description: Identify zigzag/flat/complex ABC corrections and project whether price is finishing wave A, B, or C before trend resumption or continuation.
representative.example_evidence: 推文里高频出现“after an ABC correction”“intraday ABC pullback in wave iv”“corrective rebound suggests more consolidation before bearish continuation”。seed 里只有 wave 3，没有系统覆盖他的 ABC 修正框架。
