representative.name: Wave Triangle Breakout
representative.description_zh: 识别收敛/运行三角形，尤其是出现在 wave B 或 wave IV 时，交易其突破后进入终端推动浪的那一段。
representative.description: Detect contracting/running triangles, especially in wave B or wave IV, and trade the post-triangle thrust into the terminal wave.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-02-20 黄金“final wave (e) of a bullish running triangle in wave 'b'”；2026-04-10 Brent “Wave triangle theory in progress”；2026-01-26 EURUSD “Breaks Out of a Wave IV Triangle Into Wave V”。这比 seed 里的普通三角形更明确地绑定 Elliott 上下文。

representative.name: Leading/Ending Diagonal Recognition
representative.name_zh: 引导楔形/终结楔形识别
representative.description_zh: 识别艾略特波浪中的引导楔形或终结楔形，并以对角线边界的突破/跌破作为方向确认。
representative.description: Recognize leading or ending diagonal structures inside Elliott waves and use the break of the diagonal boundary as a directional confirmation.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-01-29 DXY: “After a broken wedge with a leading diagonal pattern...” 2025-10-28 LTC 也提到“leading diagonal into wave A/1”。这不是 seed 里普通 wedge 能完整表达的。

representative.name: Cross-Asset Ratio Rotation
representative.description_zh: 通过 BTC/NDQ、BTC/GOLD、主导率等比值图判断相对强弱切换与资金轮动方向。
representative.description: Use ratio charts such as BTC/NDQ, BTC/GOLD, or dominance ratios to infer relative strength rotation and capital flow direction.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-10-29 “$BTC / $NDQ ratio chart is breaking out... Bitcoin could outperform”; 2024-11-07 “$BTC / $GOLD ratio chart is now progressing 5th wave”; 2024-11-27 与 2025-10-22 频繁用 BTC dominance/ALT dominance 做轮动判断。

representative.name: Bad News Fully Priced Bottom
representative.name_zh: 坏消息计价后的底部识别
representative.description_zh: 当市场在客观利空的宏观或地缘新闻下不再下跌、甚至上涨时，将其视为低点临近或已经出现的证据。
representative.description: When markets stop falling or even rise on objectively bad macro/geopolitical news, treat that as evidence the low is near or already in place.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-02-24] “stocks and crypto bottom on ‘bad’ news - not good”; [2026-04-08] “stocks higher on bad news”.

all_proposals.name: Bad News Fully Priced Bottom

representative.name: Relative Leadership Rotation
representative.description_zh: 在宏观冲击阶段按相对 S&P 500 的表现给资产和板块排序，并在市场仍怀疑时优先买入领涨者，假设强者恒强延续到下一阶段。
representative.description: Rank sectors/assets by performance versus S&P 500 during a macro shock and buy the leaders on skepticism, assuming leadership persists into the next leg.
representative.example_evidence: 图4/图5直接做“Relative Performance to S&P 500 since start of Iran Conflict”；[2026-04-10] “consider buying what has led since the Iran war started Ethereum ... top of list Bitcoin ...”.

representative.name: Institutional Adoption as Price Catalyst
representative.name_zh: 机构采用叙事作为价格催化剂
representative.description_zh: 将机构采用、代币化产品上线、ETF 认可、企业金库配置、交易所升级上市等事件视为提升叙事可信度并扩张估值倍数的催化剂。
representative.description: Treat visible institutional adoption, tokenization launches, ETF validation, treasury strategy announcements, or uplistings as catalysts that tighten narrative credibility and expand valuation multiples.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-01-28] “Major financial institutions are launching their financial tokenized products on ethereum”; [2024-05-28] SMLR 因 BTC ETF 获批而采用比特币金库策略；[2026-04-09] 对 BMNR uplist to NYSE 表示看多。

representative.name: Consensus Bear Crowding Reversal
representative.description_zh: 当看空成为一致预期且仓位拥挤时，即使只是一般消息也可能触发上涨，因为坏预期已经被充分持有和交易。
representative.description: When bearishness becomes consensus and positioning is crowded, expect upside on even mediocre news because the bad thesis is already owned.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-02-24] “As bearish as it feels out there...” ; [2026-02-24] “When a stock becomes a ‘consensus’ short, it is also a crowded trade”.

representative.name: Grannyshot Asymmetric Quality
representative.name_zh: Grannyshot 非对称高胜率主题
representative.description_zh: 识别那些下行风险被过度讨论、但长期结构性上行被低估的主题或个股，将其定义为类似罚球“奶奶投篮”那样的高胜率非对称机会。
representative.description: Identify themes or stocks where downside is overly debated but long-duration upside from structural change is underappreciated; frame them as easy high-percentage shots.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-12-25] “Why $NVDA remains a granny shot”; [2025-05-28] “Tesla is a grannyshot $GRNY”.

all_proposals.name: Grannyshot Asymmetric Quality

representative.name: Headline Impulse Trading
representative.description_zh: 围绕政治、法律、宏观、财报、公司公告等最新头条做方向性交易，在市场完全重定价前抢先表达观点。
representative.description: Trade directional moves off fresh political, legal, macro, earnings, or corporate headlines before the broader market fully reprices them.
representative.example_evidence: 大量推文以 "BREAKING" / "JUST IN" 开头，如 "US JUSTICE DEPARTMENT TO CHARGE BOEING WITH FRAUD"、"TRUMP SAYS IF CANADA IMPOSES RETALIATORY TARIFFS..."、"NVIDIA JUST REPORTED EARNINGS"。

representative.name: Sentiment Anecdote Extremes
representative.description_zh: 把离谱轶事、病毒式截图、车牌梗、社媒散户行为当作拥挤交易的软性顶部/底部信号。
representative.description: Use absurd anecdotes, viral screenshots, vanity plates, or retail/social-media behavior as a soft top/bottom signal for crowded trades.
representative.example_evidence: 附图中的保时捷车牌 "THX NVDA"；推文 "IS THIS A TOP SIGNAL ?  $NVDA"；"EVERYONE ON FINTWIT NOW"；中国券商 24/7 开户、成交额纪录等散户狂热叙事。

representative.name: Concentrated Rerating Book
representative.description_zh: 在少数被嫌弃但估值低、叙事与情绪改善的标的上重仓，博取估值重估与基本面企稳的双击。
representative.description: Build oversized positions in a few disliked names when valuation is low and narrative/sentiment is improving, aiming for multiple expansion plus earnings stabilization.
representative.example_evidence: "ALIBABA AND PAYPAL COMBINED ARE NOW OVER 50% OF MY PORTFOLIO"；"ITS STILL AT JUST 11 TIMES NEXT YEARS EARNINGS   NO REASON IT CANT RERATE TO 15 TIMES"。

representative.name: Bid-Ask Ratio Positive Flip Bottom Finder
representative.description_zh: 跟踪现货订单簿固定深度的买卖盘失衡；当失衡从卖盘主导翻转为买盘主导时，视为局部底部信号，若此前刚完成一次流动性扫单则置信度更高。
representative.description: Use spot orderbook depth imbalance across fixed depth bands (0-1%, 0-5%, 0-10%) and treat a flip from ask-heavy to bid-heavy as a local-bottom signal, especially after a liquidity sweep.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-08-19“We are finally seeing the bid ask ratio (spot, 10% depth) flip positive. The last 3 occurrences have marked a significant local bottom.”；2024-01-26“The global bid ask ratio recently flipped positive...”

all_proposals.name: Bid-Ask Ratio Positive Flip Bottom Finder
all_proposals.description_zh: 跟踪现货订单簿固定深度的买卖盘失衡；当失衡从卖盘主导翻转为买盘主导时，视为局部底部信号，若此前刚完成一次流动性扫单则置信度更高。
all_proposals.description: Use spot orderbook depth imbalance across fixed depth bands (0-1%, 0-5%, 0-10%) and treat a flip from ask-heavy to bid-heavy as a local-bottom signal, especially after a liquidity sweep.
all_proposals.example_evidence: 2025-08-19“We are finally seeing the bid ask ratio (spot, 10% depth) flip positive. The last 3 occurrences have marked a significant local bottom.”；2024-01-26“The global bid ask ratio recently flipped positive...”

representative.name: Retail Long Percent Mean-Reversion Oscillator
representative.name_zh: 散户多头占比均值回归振荡器
representative.description_zh: 将散户多头占比视为反向振荡器：极低 long% 若开始回归上升，常对应底部；极高 long% 则常对应拥挤与清洗，需等多头出清、空头进入后再寻找反向机会。
representative.description: Treat true retail long percentage as an inverse oscillator: very low long% can precede bottoms if it starts reverting higher; very high long% can precede squeezes lower or a bottom only after longs flush and shorts enter.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-07-29“- Retail Long% is inversely correlated with price. - Retail Long% is an oscillator that is bounded by 0% to 100%. This is the alpha.”；2025-04-14 结合 histograms 观察 true retail long% 仍很低。

representative.name: Slippage Spike Reversal
representative.description_zh: 单根 K 线出现异常大的滑点峰值，特别是发生在恐慌性卖压或完成流动性扫单之后时，视为衰竭/反转标记，或至少意味着短期进入盘整。
representative.description: Large one-bar slippage spikes, especially on sell-side panic candles or at the end of a liquidity sweep, are treated as exhaustion/reversal markers or the start of short-term consolidation.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-08-11“Local top was marked by the largest spike in slippage ... plus a significant orderbook ask imbalance.”；2025-11-24“Slippage once again spiked above 100... often leads to reversals.”

all_proposals.name: Slippage Spike Reversal

representative.name: Open Interest Breakeven Magnet
representative.description_zh: 当某个价格带形成显著 OI 簇时，该区域会成为持仓者的心理回本位，容易吸引价格回访，并在回到该位时出现平仓/反应。
representative.description: When a large OI cluster forms at a specific price, that level becomes a psychological breakeven magnet where trapped participants often exit; price is likely to revisit it and react there.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-07-29“Aaaand we're back at the largest open interest cluster. The 'breakeven' psychological level.”；2024-12-29“Significant open interest emerged around the 95250 and 94450 levels. These zones often present great risk-reward opportunities...”

representative.name: Institutional Adoption Momentum
representative.description_zh: 跟踪大型机构、银行、ETF 或企业连续宣布采用、配置或增持某加密资产；当这类事件密集出现时，将其视为中期需求结构切换的看多信号。
representative.description: Track repeated announcements of large institutions, banks, ETFs, or corporates adopting or accumulating a crypto asset; cluster of adoption events is treated as a medium-term bullish demand regime shift.
representative.example_evidence: "BlackRock CEO said in Davos we must move fast on tokenization with one common blockchain"、"BNY will launch a tokenized fund on ethereum"、"JPMorgan planning to accept ETH as collateral"。

all_proposals.example_evidence: "BlackRock CEO said in Davos we must move fast on tokenization with one common blockchain"、"BNY will launch a tokenized fund on ethereum"、"JPMorgan planning to accept ETH as collateral"。

representative.name: Network Fundamentals Momentum
representative.description_zh: 把交易数、TPS、活跃地址、合约部署量、质押比例等指标同时创新高或连续多个季度增长，视为基本面领先价格的主信号，判断价格最终将向上追赶。
representative.description: Use synchronized all-time highs or multi-quarter growth in transactions, TPS, addresses, contract deployments, and staked supply as a primary signal that fundamentals are outrunning price and will eventually pull price higher.
representative.example_evidence: "ethereum just printed a new ALL-TIME HIGH in daily transactions"、"ethereum just hit a new all-time high in TPS"、"over 30% of eth is now staked"。

representative.name: Forced Selling Overhang Clearance
representative.description_zh: 当破产抛售、政府卖币、解锁或历史遗留卖盘接近尾声时，把强制供给移除视为趋势恢复的催化剂。
representative.description: When a market-wide overhang from bankruptcies, government sales, unlocks, or legacy holders is nearing completion, treat the removal of forced supply as a catalyst for trend resumption.
representative.example_evidence: "once forced selling from germany and gox are done, btc eth sol momentum will be back in full force. prob one more dip but fully confident"。

representative.name: Fair Launch Rotation
representative.description_zh: 在市场偏好向更健康供给结构切换时，优先选择公平发射或接近全流通的代币，而回避 VC 控盘、低流通高 FDV 代币。
representative.description: Prefer fair-launch or fully-unlocked tokens over VC-heavy low-float high-FDV tokens, especially when market sentiment rotates toward cleaner supply structures.
representative.example_evidence: "My prediction. In this kind of market, fair launch projects will do MUCH better. Bearish on VC tokens. Bullish on fair launch tokens."

representative.name: Box Consolidation Expansion
representative.description_zh: 识别长时间横向箱体或压缩区，认为价格在箱内蓄能，盘整越久，后续离开箱体后的扩张越大。
representative.description: Identify long horizontal consolidation or compression boxes and project a directional expansion after enough time has been spent building energy inside the box.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-07-30] "The bigger the consolidation, the bigger the expansion. $BTC"；[2024-04-30] "This long consolidation will be the last of this bull market"；图1、图4、图7都先画箱体/压缩区再画扩张路径。

representative.name: Crypto Calendar Seasonality
representative.description_zh: 利用月份收益分布形成方向偏置，例如 9 月偏弱、10 月和 Q4 偏强，用于择时。
representative.description: Use repeated monthly return tendencies such as weak September and strong October/Q4 to shape directional bias and timing.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-08-30] "September is bad October is good $BTC"；图5、图6都是月度回报热力图，并高亮了 9-10 月和 Q4。

representative.name: Level Reclaim With Acceptance
representative.name_zh: 关键位收复并站稳触发
representative.description_zh: 关键位跌破后不急于抄底，等待价格重新收复失守位置并出现站稳/接受，再启动交易。
representative.description: Do not trade the first touch after a breakdown; wait for price to reclaim a lost level and show acceptance above it before entering.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-02-23] "Planning to double position size if we find acceptance above 2.9k"；[2026-02-24] "Range low is broken... I'll wait for a reclaim"。

representative.name: ATH Disbelief Divergence
representative.description_zh: 当价格接近或创出历史新高，但市场情绪依旧冷淡或悲观时，将其视为看多延续而非见顶信号。
representative.description: When price is near or at all-time highs but sentiment remains muted or bearish, treat it as a bullish continuation sign rather than a top.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-05-22] "New ATH + silence = All sidelined"；[2025-06-30] "It's the first time $BTC is at ATH levels but sentiment is like we are in a bear market"。

representative.name: Bull Market Support Band
representative.description_zh: 使用周线牛市支撑带（通常是 20 周均线与 21 周 EMA 区域）作为主趋势分界。守住偏延续，失守偏更深回调或熊市阶段。
representative.description: Use the weekly bull market support band, typically the 20W SMA/21W EMA zone, as the primary trend support. Holding it supports continuation; losing it implies a deeper corrective or bearish phase.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-06-25] "#BTC now at its 21W EMA"；[2024-06-25] "#BTC dominance still holding support above its bull market support band"；图片 3 也直接展示该带。

representative.name: Logarithmic Regression Band Extremes
representative.description_zh: 把 BTC、ETH 或 ETH/BTC 放进对数回归带中，识别过热、合理价值和跨周期均值回归区域。
representative.description: Map BTC, ETH, or ETH/BTC into logarithmic regression bands to identify overextension, fair value, and likely mean-reversion zones across cycles.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-02-28] "#ETH is moving deeper into its lower logarithmic regression band"；[2025-12-31] "According to this model, the current 'fair value' of ETH is $1987."

representative.name: Midterm Year Seasonal Template
representative.name_zh: 中期选举年季节性模板
representative.description_zh: 使用美国中期选举年类比推演 BTC 路径：常见路径是 2 月低点、3 月更低高点、4 月再探底，随后年内再看宏观缓和窗口。
representative.description: Project BTC path using U.S. midterm-year analogs: common pattern is February low, March lower high, and April weakness, with macro relief later in the year.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-04-02] "Bitcoin tends to find a low in February, lower high in March, then it drops back down in April in midterm years."

representative.name: Alt/BTC Reckoning
representative.name_zh: 山寨对 BTC 清算期
representative.description_zh: 当 ALT/BTC 在前支撑变阻力或牛市支撑带被拒绝时，预期其相对 BTC 再走一轮弱势，而不是抢跑山寨季。
representative.description: When Alt/BTC pairs are rejected from prior support turned resistance or from the bull market support band, expect another leg of underperformance versus BTC rather than early altseason.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-09-25] "If they get rejected by the bull market support band... then it should lead to another move down by ALT/BTC pairs"；[2025-05-31] "#ALT / #BTC pairs were rejected from their bull market support band"。

representative.name: Realized Cap vs Market Cap Regime
representative.name_zh: 实现市值与总市值增速的周期判断
representative.description_zh: 比较总市值与实现市值的增速，判断上涨是由新资本吸收支撑，还是由投机性估值抬升驱动。总市值持续快于实现市值，偏向牛市中后段估值扩张；实现市值跟上，则偏向更健康的吸筹。
representative.description: Compare market cap growth with realized cap growth to infer whether price appreciation is supported by fresh capital absorption or speculative markup. Persistent market-cap outperformance indicates mid-to-late bull markup; realized-cap catch-up indicates healthier accumulation.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-05-17: “Its market cap is growing faster than its realized cap, a trend that typically lasts around two years.”

representative.name: Sell-side Liquidity Absorption
representative.description_zh: 评估政府、矿工、Mt.Gox、老鲸鱼等已知卖方来源，是否会被当前交易所、OTC、ETF 需求吸收而不破坏市场趋势。
representative.description: Estimate whether known selling sources such as governments, miners, Mt.Gox distributions, or old whales can be absorbed by current exchange, OTC, and ETF demand without regime damage.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-06-26: “US gov't sold 4K Bitcoin today, but less likely to impact the market. Coinbase Prime handled 20-49K BTC in sell-side liquidity daily...”

representative.name: Paper Bitcoin Buying Engine
representative.description_zh: 跟踪 ETF、信托、比特币金库公司、主经纪产品等“纸比特币”需求通道，把它们视为独立于链上散户现货流之外的持续买盘来源。
representative.description: Track synthetic or custodial demand channels such as ETFs, trusts, treasury companies, and prime brokerage products as persistent price support separate from visible retail spot flows.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-01-31: “The buying engine for paper Bitcoins is still running.”

representative.name: Old Whales to New Whales Rotation
representative.description_zh: 用币龄、已实现利润、休眠度和托管聚类判断老持有人是否在向机构/新鲸鱼而非散户换手，这会改变顶部形成方式。
representative.description: Use age bands, realized profits, dormancy, and custody clustering to detect whether old holders are distributing to institutions/new whales rather than retail, which changes top formation dynamics.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-03-28: “Old whales are selling Bitcoin to new whales(TradFi), not retail investors.”；2024-04-24 提到 Average Dormancy 13 年峰值。

representative.name: Composite On-chain Cycle Boundary
representative.name_zh: 链上综合牛熊边界信号
representative.description_zh: 把 PnL 指数、365 日均线振荡器、实现市值增速、供需关系、资本流入等合成为一个周期状态机：牛市、边界、熊市、复苏。
representative.description: Blend PnL index, 365-day moving average oscillator, realized cap growth, demand/supply, and capital inflow measures into a single cycle state machine: bull, boundary, bear, recovery.
representative.example_evidence: 图片 2 和图片 3 都是明确的周期 composite 图；2025-02-27 与 2025-03-17 多次使用“bull-bear boundary”“every on-chain metric signals a bear market”。

representative.name: Geopolitical Shock Buy-the-News
representative.name_zh: 地缘冲突利空落地反买
representative.description_zh: 当地缘军事事件引发第一波恐慌下跌时，如果袭击高度预告化、实际伤亡有限、风险资产很快止跌，则把首波下杀视为可反手买入的事件冲击，而不是新趋势起点。
representative.description: When war or military headlines trigger an initial panic gap lower, fade the first shock if the event is telegraphed, casualties are limited, and broader risk assets stabilize within a few sessions.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-02-28 'Bitcoin is now up on bad news, having fully reversed the initial crash'; 同日又说 S&P 在军事冲突中常见 'buy the news pattern'。附图 1 和附图 8 都体现他在盯事件时间线。

representative.name: Bad-News-Up Character Change
representative.description_zh: 市场面对明确利空却不再继续下跌，说明交易性格发生切换；比起新闻本身，价格对新闻的反应更重要。
representative.description: A market that stops going down on objectively bad news signals an important regime shift; the price response matters more than the headline.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-02-28 'Bitcoin is now up on bad news, having fully reversed the initial crash. First time this happens since March 2023.'

all_proposals.name: Bad-News-Up Character Change

representative.name: Policy Communication Regime Mapping
representative.name_zh: 政策沟通主导市场 regime
representative.description_zh: 将市场波动映射到政策沟通质量、关税表述路径和预期管理，而不是简单归因于单一变量。
representative.description: Map price action primarily to policy messaging quality, tariff communication, and signaling path rather than to simplistic single-cause narratives.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-03-28 'Stocks have been plummeting because Trump's tariffs are bad for growth and earnings, and his comms increase uncertainty'; 2025-03-31 'What a difference one week makes - messaging went from Narrower tariffs to Broader tariffs'.

representative.name: Creditor Distribution vs Reinvestment Flow
representative.name_zh: 债权人赔付现金流再配置
representative.description_zh: 区分实物赔付造成的直接抛压，与现金赔付可能回流加密市场形成买盘，两者对市场的作用方向相反。
representative.description: Distinguish between in-kind creditor distributions that create sell pressure and cash distributions that may recycle into crypto buying, producing opposite market effects.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-06-30 'Mt Gox selling. Germany selling. US selling. But FTX creditors will be buyers. Soon.'；附图 3 也明确区分 Gemini/Mt.Gox 的 in-kind 与 FTX 的 cash payments。

representative.name: Support Resistance Zone Mapping
representative.name_zh: 固定区间支撑阻力映射
representative.description_zh: 反复把行情拆成明确数字区间的支撑/阻力带，再围绕这些区间做方向判断和失效判断，而不是依赖复杂指标共振。
representative.description: Repeatedly map the market into explicit numeric support and resistance zones, then anchor trade direction and invalidation around those zones rather than around complex indicator confluence.

representative.name: Altcoin Weakness Leads Majors
representative.name_zh: 山寨先行走弱预警主流币下跌
representative.description_zh: 把山寨币的普遍走弱视为 BTC/ETH 尚未完全补跌前的领先信号，预示更大级别下跌可能随后到来。
representative.description: Treat broad altcoin underperformance as an early warning that BTC/ETH downside is not yet fully expressed and that a larger market breakdown may follow.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-07-30]“山寨先行，很多人在看牛市，看山寨季”；[2025-07-30]“山寨又开始砸盘了…大的要来”；[2025-07-29]“山寨一片红 就大饼二饼现在还绿色的”。

representative.name: Relative Strength Trap Read
representative.description_zh: 在整体偏空背景下，把 ETH 或部分主流币的异常抗跌/走强解读为吸引接盘的诱多，而非真正领涨。
representative.description: Interpret abnormal short-term strength in ETH or selected majors during an otherwise bearish regime as a liquidity draw or bull trap rather than genuine leadership.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-05-29]“ETH现在还没完全成立空头趋势…表现的很坚强，为了诱多而已”；[2025-07-29]“ETH一点不走寻常路啊…ETH反弹的有点多了”。

representative.name: Text First Broadcast Trading
representative.name_zh: 文字点位播报型交易表达
representative.description_zh: 以内容播报为核心的交易工作流：通过每日帖文和直播给出剧本、关键点位和执行偏向，公开表达上对复杂图表标注依赖较低。
representative.description: A content-led trading workflow where daily posts and live streams deliver directional scripts, key levels, and execution bias, with less reliance on publicly shared annotated charts.
representative.example_evidence: 大量帖子是“X号老韭菜说币：…行情回顾解析/今晚九点直播”；而本次提供的 8 张附件并非标准 K 线标注图，说明其公开 feed 更偏文字/直播驱动，而不是图表模板驱动。

representative.name: Gann Angle / Gann Level Reaction
representative.name_zh: 江恩角度/江恩价位反应
representative.description_zh: 使用江恩角度、几何价位与角度轮换来识别大级别底部、支撑阻力与时间拐点，主要用于周线/月线。
representative.description: Uses Gann angles, square-style geometric levels, and angle-to-angle rotations to identify major bottoms, support, resistance, and timing pivots on high time frames.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-09-30 写道“Using Gann's methods, I have successfully identified numerous market bottoms”；2026-04-06 说“$IREN has a great chance of holding this Gann level around 34”。

representative.name: High-Timeframe Ichimoku Reclaim
representative.name_zh: 高周期一目均衡表基准线/云层收复
representative.description_zh: 把周线/月线首次站上一目均衡表基准线或云层，视为重大趋势反转和支撑翻转信号。
representative.description: Treats a monthly or weekly close above the Ichimoku baseline or cloud, especially for the first time ever, as a major bullish trend reversal and support flip.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-11-29 说“两张图首次收在 monthly Ichimoku Baseline 上方”；2026-02-27 说“Waiting for an Ichimoku Cloud retest on the weekly chart is usually one of the strongest strategies”。

representative.name: Monthly Close Above Fib Extension
representative.name_zh: 月线收盘站上斐波扩展位
representative.description_zh: 将月线收盘站上 0.786、0.886、1.272、1.414 等关键斐波位，视为结构性突破，并指向更高扩展目标。
representative.description: Interprets a monthly close above major extension or retracement thresholds such as 0.786, 0.886, 1.272, or 1.414 as a structural breakout that unlocks the next extension targets.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-10-31 说 IWM 若月收高于 2021 high，“Fib extensions above are coming”；2025-07-31 说 COIN “surpassing the linear scale 0.786 Fibonacci level at $344.37... incredibly bullish”。

representative.name: Arc / Channel Confluence Framework
representative.description_zh: 使用多年弧线和等距通道作为动态支撑阻力，判断长期突破、回踩和顶部拒绝区。
representative.description: Uses long-duration arcs and parallel channels as dynamic support/resistance to frame where secular breakouts, pullbacks, or rejection tops should occur.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-08-31 说“$SOL is starting to flip my top arc to a support again”；附图 #4 为 SPY 多年斜率通道，附图 #6 为黄金白银多年上升通道共振。

representative.name: Social Sentiment Extreme Reversal
representative.description_zh: 用社交媒体提及量、恐惧贪婪极值和时间线情绪崩溃/狂热作为反向时机信号，捕捉局部底部或过热顶部。
representative.description: Use social mention spikes, fear/greed extremes, and timeline sentiment washouts as contrarian timing inputs for local bottoms or overheated tops.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-02-27: “The Crypto Fear and Greed Index just hit its lowest level since the 2022 bear market... often lead to a local bottom.”；2025-01-31: “Buy fear, sell greed.”；2025-02-27: “Social mentions for 'altseason' have plummeted...”

representative.name: Retail Attention Proxy
representative.description_zh: 通过 YouTube 播放量、社交提及增长、叙事传播度和时间线行为来估计散户参与度，从而判断行情拥挤度或所处早晚期。
representative.description: Track retail participation through YouTube views, social mention growth, viral narratives, and timeline behavior to estimate how crowded or early a move is.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-07-30: “YouTube is the best retail indicator in crypto.”；2024-11-30: “Retail don't come back for no reason. Retail come back because they see others making money.”；2025-01-31: “Social mentions across all platforms for 'tokenization' has 5xd...”

representative.name: Narrative Rotation Selectivity
representative.name_zh: 叙事轮动与选择性山寨框架
representative.description_zh: 不假设全面山寨季，而是识别真正有资金流、产品市场契合或社交动量的少数叙事，并进行选择性轮动配置。
representative.description: Instead of assuming broad altseason, identify the few narratives with actual flows, product-market fit, or social momentum and rotate selectively into them.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-08-30: “Memes/AI/RWA/L1s. That's the tweet.”；2024-12-31: “I don't think we're very close to a full blown alt season... certain”；2025-06-26: “increasing unlocks + dispersion, and decreasing demand... you h...”

representative.name: Conference / Calendar Seasonality Fade
representative.name_zh: 大会/日历事件季节性反手
representative.description_zh: 当价格对利好钝化且仓位拥挤时，把重复出现的加密日历事件当作情绪顶点或衰竭标记。
representative.description: Use recurring crypto calendar events as sentiment/exhaustion markers when price stops responding to good news and positioning is crowded.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-05-30: “$BTC always dumps after the Bitcoin Conference (5/5 track record)..” 以及同日“Market stopped reacting to good news, sign of exhaustion.”

representative.name: Regulatory Clarity Catalyst
representative.description_zh: 基于立法、SEC、白宫、OCC 或法院进展带来的监管清晰度变化，去交易单个代币、板块或整体市场方向。
representative.description: Trades directional crypto exposure based on legislative, SEC, White House, OCC, or court developments that improve or damage regulatory clarity for a token, sector, or market structure.

output_when_triggered.bias: bullish if clarity improves, bearish if blocked

representative.example_evidence: [2026-01-29] “CLARITY UPDATE...”; [2026-03-28] “Protect DEFI, developers, and self custody... crypto wins!”；[2026-04-09] “Crypto Now National Security! ... well-defined regulatory perimeter would strengthen...”

representative.name: American Crypto Narrative Rotation
representative.name_zh: 美国本土加密叙事轮动
representative.description_zh: 当某些代币被包装为美国政策、国家安全或机构采用受益者时，给予其结构性超配。
representative.description: Overweights tokens framed as strategic U.S. winners under policy, national-security, or institutional adoption narratives.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-07-31] “White House crypto report shows @hedera $HBAR as an American Crypto asset”; [2025-02-20] “what crypto will be the rails for crypto payments in #America?”

representative.name: Stablecoin Policy Arb
representative.description_zh: 围绕稳定币利息、储备金与银行准入政策变化，交易稳定币发行方、支付网络及相关公链/账本代币。
representative.description: Trades stablecoin issuers, payment rails, and related L1/Ledger tokens based on policy toward yield, reserves, and banking access.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-02-27] “Why is the administration so determined to kill retail yield?”；[2025-11-27] “And so it begins! #RLUSD”；[2025-05-26] 关于 Ripple/Circle/USDC 并购与稳定币版图。

representative.name: Multi-Timeframe Trend Ladder
representative.description_zh: 用 H1/H4/D1 趋势线与关键 EMA/MA 构成分层框架：低周期负责触发，高周期负责方向与失效。
representative.description: Use H1/H4/D1 trendlines and key EMAs/MAs as a hierarchy: lower timeframe for trigger, higher timeframe for bias and invalidation.
representative.example_evidence: 多次出现 “H1 trend”, “H4 trend”, “D1 trend”, “H1 200 EMA”, “D1 100 MA climbing”；[2024-10-31] 甚至明确给出 H1/H4 联立条件。

all_proposals.name: Multi-Timeframe Trend Ladder
all_proposals.description_zh: 用 H1/H4/D1 趋势线与关键 EMA/MA 构成分层框架：低周期负责触发，高周期负责方向与失效。
all_proposals.description: Use H1/H4/D1 trendlines and key EMAs/MAs as a hierarchy: lower timeframe for trigger, higher timeframe for bias and invalidation.
all_proposals.example_evidence: 多次出现 “H1 trend”, “H4 trend”, “D1 trend”, “H1 200 EMA”, “D1 100 MA climbing”；[2024-10-31] 甚至明确给出 H1/H4 联立条件。

representative.name: Weekend Session Trap Playbook
representative.description_zh: 把周末尤其周日晚间价格行为视为低可信微观结构，预期先诱骗/扫单，再在下周初或纽约开盘附近给出更可信方向。
representative.description: Treat weekend and Sunday evening price action as low-trust microstructure, often expecting traps before a clearer move around early next week or NY open.
representative.example_evidence: [2024-05-31] “greenish saturday, trappy sunday, resolution early next week”; [2024-06-30] “hard to trust [Sunday evening-Monday NYO] moves”.

all_proposals.name: Weekend Session Trap Playbook

representative.name: Alert-Driven Patience
representative.description_zh: 大部分时间保持不交易，直到预设价位的 alert 触发；尽量不在区间中段强行出手。
representative.description: Stay mostly inactive until alerts at preplanned levels fire; avoid forcing trades between levels.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-07-31] “Meanwhile still no alerts triggered no trades”; [2024-05-31] “alerts will hit if stopped or targets”; [2026-01-31] “receiving alerts of market tanking on its own”.

representative.name: Expectation-Pricing Gap
representative.description_zh: 不只看数据或事件本身，而是判断市场此前已经计价了多少；交易真正结果与一致预期、仓位拥挤之间的差值。
representative.description: Evaluate not just the data/event itself, but how much of it is already priced by the market; trade the gap between realized outcome and consensus positioning.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-08-31："市场对数据或者重大事件的预期程度或者计价程度是一个很有意思也值得深度探讨的话题。" 2025-04-30："数据感觉很炸裂...但是市场只是小幅下挫并没有暴跌。"

representative.name: Liquidity Plumbing Monitor
representative.description_zh: 跟踪 SOFR、逆回购、BTFP、财政部再融资、季末再平衡等流动性管道变量，预判跨资产波动与风险偏好变化。
representative.description: Track funding plumbing variables such as SOFR, RRP, BTFP, Treasury issuance/refunding, and quarter-end balance sheet effects to anticipate cross-asset pressure.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-05-28："金融压力指数FSI跟风险市场是标准的负相关走势。" 2024-12-31："sofr短期走高带来市场流动性的小幅度挤压。" 2024-01-26："BTFP到期不续以及逆回购用量消耗完。"

representative.name: BTC ATH Breadth Trigger
representative.name_zh: BTC 新高带动山寨广度扩散
representative.description_zh: 在 BTC 收复或突破前高之前，不默认山寨全面普涨；BTC 创历史新高是山寨广度扩散的制度切换触发器。
representative.description: Broad alt rotation is not assumed before BTC reclaims or breaks prior cycle highs; BTC ATH acts as a regime trigger for broader beta expansion.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-02-27："在大饼没有ATH之前，小币都只是结构化行情，大饼ATH全面普涨行情就会到来。"

representative.name: Event Cluster Window
representative.description_zh: 按宏观数据、财报、政策节点的密集程度给周/月做事件簇标注；事件密集窗口预期波动放大，事件稀疏期降低方向确信度。
representative.description: Map weeks or months by clustering macro events, earnings, and policy catalysts; expect volatility expansion in event-dense windows and reduce certainty outside them.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-11-30："12月市场前瞻，中旬应该是市场波动放大的时期。" 附图 7 本质上就是按月做事件簇管理。

representative.name: Re-Accumulation Range Breakout And Retest
representative.name_zh: 再积累区间突破与回踩确认
representative.description_zh: 识别牛市中的宏观横盘再积累区间，等待高周期有效收盘突破区间上沿，再把首次回踩视为进入下一段主升浪的确认。
representative.description: Identify a macro sideways range inside an ongoing bull market, wait for decisive higher-timeframe close above range high, then treat the first retest as confirmation for transition into the next expansion leg.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-10-29 “Bitcoin is on the cusp of fully transitioning out from its ReAccumulation phase”; 2024-11-30 “successfully Daily Closed above the trendline resistance… That's a breakout”; 图2展示了区间突破后回踩上沿。

representative.name: CME Gap Magnet And Fill
representative.description_zh: 跟踪比特币 CME 期货未回补缺口，把其视为短中期价格磁吸区；价格进入缺口后，观察是否完全回补，以及缺口区域随后转化为支撑或阻力。
representative.description: Track unfilled Bitcoin CME futures gaps as likely short-to-medium-term magnets; once price enters the gap zone, monitor whether the full fill completes and whether the zone flips into support or resistance.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-02-28 连发多条：“Bitcoin has finally filled its CME Gap between $78,000 and ~$80,700”；“Bitcoin is currently filling the CME Gap between $78,000 and ~$80,700”；图1直接标注 78,030 到 80,730 的缺口区。

representative.name: Price Discovery Week Sequencing
representative.name_zh: 价格发现阶段周序列模型
representative.description_zh: 当比特币进入价格发现阶段后，按周数跟踪上升过程，并预判历史上常见的修正窗口，用于安排止盈、降风险和重新介入。
representative.description: Once Bitcoin breaks into price discovery, map the advance by week count and expect historically corrective windows, then plan profit-taking, de-risking, and re-entry around those windows.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-12-23 “Historically, Week 8 in BTC Price Discovery tends to be a corrective week”；2025-05-23 “It is Week 1 of Price Discovery Uptrend 2”；2025-07-28 “It's technically Week 4 of Price Discovery Uptrend 2”。

representative.name: Bull Market Progress Meter
representative.description_zh: 把周期所处时间和历史类比转化为一个简化的牛市完成度百分比，用于表达市场位于再积累、价格发现还是抛物线成熟阶段。
representative.description: Convert cycle age and historical analogs into a simple bull-market completion percentage to communicate where the market sits between re-accumulation, price discovery, and parabolic maturity.

representative.name: BTC Dominance 71 Percent Rejection Trigger
representative.name_zh: BTC 市占率 71% 拒绝触发山寨季
representative.description_zh: 把 BTC 市占率 71% 区域视为宏观枢轴位；若在该区域附近遭拒，资金轮动到 ETH 和山寨的概率明显上升。
representative.description: Treat the 71% Bitcoin dominance region as a macro pivot; rejection from or near that level increases probability of capital rotating into ETH and altcoins.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-03-30 “the real Altseason everybody is waiting for would begin once Bitcoin Dominance rejects from 71%”; 2025-03-31 “The strongest Altseasons have occurred every time Bitcoin Dominance rejected from 71%”; 图6红线即 71.04%。

representative.name: Sentiment Gauge Dislocation
representative.description_zh: 把大众情绪指标当作反向过滤器；当恐惧贪婪等读数与价格体感明显错位时，视为市场情绪度量滞后或失真，从而提高对反向交易/均值回归的关注。
representative.description: Use popular sentiment gauges like Fear & Greed as a contrary overlay; when the readout stays elevated or depressed despite visibly different price action, treat it as evidence the crowd metric is stale or misleading.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-04-30: "There is NO way we are still at 'greed' lol." 配图是 Fear & Greed 仍显示 67 Greed，但他认为市场体感已不匹配。

representative.name: High-Timeframe Reversal Candle
representative.description_zh: 关注周线或月线在长趋势后即将形成的大级别反转实体或长影线，把它作为趋势拐点叙事信号，而不是精确入场信号。
representative.description: Focus on monthly or weekly candles that threaten to print a major reversal body/wick after an extended move; used as a narrative turning-point signal rather than a precise trigger.
representative.example_evidence: 2025-04-30: "$ETH MONTHLY Ethereum is about to print an epic reversal candle on the monthly chart."

representative.name: Asymmetric Support-defined Trade
representative.name_zh: 支撑定义清晰的不对称交易
representative.description_zh: 只在最后关键支撑或重要均线附近出手，前提是失效位非常清晰，这样才能获得显著偏斜的盈亏比。
representative.description: Enter near the last major support or a major moving average only when invalidation is obvious, because the setup offers unusually favorable reward relative to clearly limited downside.
representative.example_evidence: 2026-01-31: "$XRP ... at the last meaningful support ... best risk/reward ... Easy to cut loose"；同日对 SOL 也因 WEEKLY 200MA 支撑而买入。

all_proposals.name: Asymmetric Support-defined Trade

representative.name: Turnover Threshold Regime Filter
representative.name_zh: 成交量阈值市场状态过滤
representative.description_zh: 用绝对成交额阈值而非仅靠价格来定义市场状态。若成交量低于自定义门槛，则把反弹视为弱反弹，不轻易外推趋势。
representative.description: Classify market regime by absolute turnover/liquidity thresholds rather than price alone. If turnover stays below a trader-defined threshold, treat rebounds as weak and avoid extrapolating trend.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-11-25]“想要维持A股大级别的反弹行情，必要条件是日成交量要维持在2万亿以上”；[2026-04-10]“没有持续2.5万亿的量能维持，A股短期是很难站稳4000点的”。

representative.name: Geopolitical Headline Rotation
representative.description_zh: 围绕战争、停火、关税、政治头条做跨资产轮动交易，重点捕捉金银、原油、股市在升级与缓和时的领导权切换。
representative.description: Trade cross-asset rotations off war, ceasefire, tariff, and political headlines, especially gold/oil/equities leadership reversals around escalation and de-escalation.
representative.example_evidence: [2026-03-24]“伊朗冲突一旦缓和，哪些资产反弹空间最大？金银、光模、互联等”；[2026-04-08]“我不认为市场就反转了”；图3是 Kalshi 的政治概率图，说明她会把政治事件概率当作交易输入。

representative.name: Second-Order Earnings Spillover
representative.name_zh: 财报二阶传导与供应链外溢
representative.description_zh: 不是只交易公布财报的公司本身，而是根据财报、资本开支和管理层表述，向外推演下一层受益的供应链或邻近主题。
representative.description: Instead of trading the reporting company directly, infer the next beneficiary layer in the supply chain or adjacent theme from earnings, capex, and management commentary.
representative.example_evidence: 图6文字写得很直白：“交易1.0是科技巨头基本面判断股价，2.0是通过巨头们的财报去找到铲子股，3.0是直接发现下一个巨头。” 她的多条A股复盘也围绕“服务器电源”“AIDC链”“光模”“存储”等二阶受益方向展开。

all_proposals.name: Second-Order Earnings Spillover
all_proposals.name_zh: 财报二阶传导与供应链外溢
all_proposals.description_zh: 不是只交易公布财报的公司本身，而是根据财报、资本开支和管理层表述，向外推演下一层受益的供应链或邻近主题。
all_proposals.description: Instead of trading the reporting company directly, infer the next beneficiary layer in the supply chain or adjacent theme from earnings, capex, and management commentary.
all_proposals.example_evidence: 图6文字写得很直白：“交易1.0是科技巨头基本面判断股价，2.0是通过巨头们的财报去找到铲子股，3.0是直接发现下一个巨头。” 她的多条A股复盘也围绕“服务器电源”“AIDC链”“光模”“存储”等二阶受益方向展开。

representative.name: Cross-Asset Analogy Mapping
representative.description_zh: 把一个资产的行为映射到另一个相似资产上，以推断时点、情绪或风格切换，即使相关性并非严格统计意义上的稳定相关。
representative.description: Map one asset's behavior to another analogous asset class to infer timing, sentiment, or regime shift, even when correlation is loose or narrative-based.
representative.example_evidence: [2025-09-25]“白银和以太坊背离了…一般来说黄金下跌，比特币上涨，同理白银和以太坊也是这样的”；图7也直接写“你们的ETH，我的黄金，都会有光明的未来”。

representative.name: STH Cost Basis Framework
representative.name_zh: 短期持币者成本线框架
representative.description_zh: 以短期持币者成本线及其偏离度作为动态支撑/阻力、牛市重置与趋势延续判断框架。
representative.description: Uses the Short-Term Holder cost basis and its deviations as dynamic support/resistance, bull-market reset marker, and trend continuation filter.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-06-18“STH cost basis at $63.8k.”；2024-10-23“Reclaimed key levels: STH cost basis, 21-week, and 200-day moving averages.”；2025-09-05“Bouncing off the STH cost basis at ~$109K.”

representative.name: ETF Flow vs New Issuance Supply Squeeze
representative.name_zh: ETF 净流入对新发行供给挤压
representative.description_zh: 衡量现货 ETF 净流入是否吸收了数倍于新增挖矿发行的 BTC 供给；倍数越高，越说明结构性买盘与供给挤压越强。
representative.description: Measures whether spot ETF net inflows are absorbing a multiple of newly mined BTC supply; high multiples imply structural demand pressure and bullish squeeze conditions.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-02-27“That is 10x the issuance”；2024-10-22“record 9x the new supply issuance”；2025-04-28“over 11x the new supply issuance, a new record!”

representative.name: Spiral Quadrant Cycle Map
representative.description_zh: 将比特币价格路径映射到重复的 4 年螺旋/象限中，用于识别当前相对历史周期顶部、底部与减半点的位置。
representative.description: Maps Bitcoin price progression across repeated 4-year spirals/quadrants to identify where the market sits relative to prior cycle ATHs, bottoms, and halving points.
representative.example_evidence: 附图 1、2、5 都是他标志性的 Spiral / 4-Year Cycle 图；2024-12-05“Crossed the 100k ring! 🚀”说明他连整数价位都用同心圆/环带来表达周期推进。

representative.name: Cycle Bottom Normalized Comparison
representative.name_zh: 从周期底部归一化比较
representative.description_zh: 按“距离周期底部的天数”归一化每一轮 BTC 周期，并与历史周期对比，判断当前是落后、对齐还是跑赢。
representative.description: Normalizes each BTC cycle by days since bottom and compares the current path against prior cycles to estimate whether the market is lagging, in line, or outperforming.
representative.example_evidence: 2024-09-22“Recovery since cycle bottom.”；2024-08-27“Outperforming previous cycles.”；2024-12-21“Right in between the previous two cycles.”；附图 7 标题即“Bitcoin Cycles: comparison from cycle bottom”。

representative.name: Quarterly Seasonality Bias
representative.description_zh: 使用季度季节性，尤其是 Q3 偏弱、Q4 乐观，作为 BTC 趋势预期的上下文偏置层。
representative.description: Uses recurring quarter-based seasonality, especially Q3 softness and Q4 optimism, as a contextual bias overlay for BTC trend expectations.
